    console.log('响应头:', Object.fromEntries(response.headers.entries()));

    const responseText = await response.text();
    console.log('响应内容:', responseText);

    if (response.ok) {
      const data = JSON.parse(responseText);
      console.log('');
      console.log('✅ API 调用成功！');
      console.log('任务ID:', data.id);
      console.log('模型:', data.model);
      console.log('状态:', data.status);
      return true;
    } else {
      console.log('');
      console.log('❌ API 调用失败！');
      console.log('错误信息:', responseText);
      return false;
    }

  } catch (error: any) {
    console.error('💥 测试失败:', error.message);
    console.error('堆栈:', error.stack);
    return false;
  }
}

testSeedanceAPI()
  .then(success => {
    console.log('');
    console.log(success ? '结论：Seedance API 可用 ✅' : '结论：Seedance API 不可用 ❌');
    process.exit(success ? 0 : 1);
  })
  .catch(error => {
    console.error('测试脚本执行失败:', error);
    process.exit(1);
  });

===== scripts/test-simple-flow.ts =====
/**
 * 简化版前端交互测试
 * 从脚本确认阶段继续
 */

const BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:5000';

async function test() {
  console.log('========================================');
  console.log('  简化版测试 - 从脚本确认继续');
  console.log('========================================\n');
  
  // 1. 登录
  console.log('步骤1: 登录...');
  const loginRes = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/auth/login`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ username: 'testadmin', password: 'Test123456' })
  });
  
  if (!loginRes.ok) {
    console.error('登录失败');
    return;
  }
  
  const { token } = await loginRes.json();
  console.log('✅ 登录成功\n');
  
  // 2. 直接发送消息确认脚本
  console.log('步骤2: 确认脚本并请求生成视频...');
  const chatRes = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/creative-agent/chat`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`
    },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      message: '我确认这个脚本，请生成视频。要求：15秒，9:16竖屏，使用第一个分镜',
      attachments: []
    })
  });
  
  if (!chatRes.ok) {
    console.error('对话失败');
    return;
  }
  
  // 解析SSE响应
  const text = await chatRes.text();
  const lines = text.split('\n').filter(line => line.startsWith('data:'));
  let response = '';
  
  for (const line of lines) {
    try {
      const data = JSON.parse(line.replace('data:', ''));
      if (data.content) response += data.content;
    } catch (e) {}
  }
  
  console.log('✅ 小海回复:', response.slice(0, 300) + '...\n');
  
  // 4. 检查是否有视频生成任务
  console.log('步骤4: 检查视频生成任务...');
  const videosRes = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/video/list?limit=5`, {
    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }
  });
  
  if (videosRes.ok) {
    const { videos } = await videosRes.json();
    if (videos && videos.length > 0) {
      console.log(`✅ 找到 ${videos.length} 个视频任务:`);
      for (const v of videos) {
        console.log(`   - 任务ID: ${v.task_id}`);
        console.log(`     状态: ${v.status}`);
        console.log(`     创建时间: ${v.created_at}`);
      }
    } else {
      console.log('ℹ️ 还没有视频任务');
    }
  }
  
  console.log('\n========================================');
  console.log('  测试完成');
  console.log('========================================');
}

test().catch(console.error);

===== scripts/test-systems.ts =====
/**
 * 视频上传和双层能力系统测试
 */

const BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:5000';

async function test() {
  console.log('========================================');
  console.log('视频上传和双层能力系统测试');
  console.log('========================================\n');

  // 登录
  const loginRes = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/auth/login`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ username: 'admin', password: 'admin123' }),
  });
  const { token } = await loginRes.json();
  console.log('✅ 登录成功\n');

  // ===== 测试1: 视频上传API =====
  console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━');
  console.log('测试1: 视频上传API');
  console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n');

  // 创建一个小的测试文件
  const testContent = 'test video content for upload test';
  const testFile = new Blob([testContent], { type: 'video/mp4' });
  
  const formData = new FormData();
  formData.append('file', testFile, 'test-video.mp4');

  try {
    const uploadRes = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/creative-agent/upload`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
      body: formData,
    });

    const uploadData = await uploadRes.json();
    console.log(`上传状态: ${uploadRes.status}`);
    console.log(`返回数据: ${JSON.stringify(uploadData).slice(0, 200)}...`);
    
    if (uploadRes.ok && uploadData.url) {
      console.log('\n✅ 视频上传API正常');
    } else {
      console.log(`\n❌ 视频上传失败: ${uploadData.error || '未知错误'}`);
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.log(`\n❌ 视频上传异常: ${error}`);
  }

  // ===== 测试2: 双层能力系统状态 =====
  console.log('\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━');
  console.log('测试2: 双层能力系统状态');
  console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n');

  // 查询能力档案
  const abilityRes = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/agent/ability`, {
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
  });
  
  if (abilityRes.ok) {
    const abilityData = await abilityRes.json();
    console.log(`能力评分: ${abilityData.profile?.overall || 0}`);
    console.log(`能力等级: ${abilityData.profile?.level || 'novice'}`);
    console.log(`执行模式: ${getExecutionMode(abilityData.profile?.overall || 0)}`);
    
    if ((abilityData.profile?.overall || 0) < 60) {
      console.log('\n⚠️ 用户评分<60，处于学习模式');
      console.log('  需要积累足够的观察次数才能进入对比模式');
    }
  } else {
    console.log('❌ 获取能力档案失败');
  }

  // ===== 测试3: 学习库状态 =====
  console.log('\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━');
  console.log('测试3: 学习库状态');
  console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n');

  const libraryRes = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/learning-library`, {
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
  });

  if (libraryRes.ok) {
    const libraryData = await libraryRes.json();
    console.log(`学习库视频数量: ${libraryData.videos?.length || 0}`);
    
    if (libraryData.videos && libraryData.videos.length > 0) {
      console.log('\n最近学习的视频:');
      libraryData.videos.slice(0, 3).forEach((v: any, i: number) => {
        console.log(`  ${i + 1}. ${v.title || v.file_name} - ${v.video_type || '未分析'}`);
      });
    }
  } else {
    console.log('❌ 获取学习库失败');
  }

  // ===== 测试4: 记忆系统状态 =====
  console.log('\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━');
  console.log('测试4: 记忆系统状态');
  console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n');

  const memoryRes = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/creative-agent/memory`, {
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
  });

  if (memoryRes.ok) {
    const memoryData = await memoryRes.json();
    console.log(`长期记忆数量: ${memoryData.memories?.length || 0}`);
  } else {
    console.log('❌ 获取记忆失败');
  }

  console.log('\n========================================');
  console.log('测试完成');
  console.log('========================================\n');
  
  console.log('📊 系统状态总结:');
  console.log('  - 双层能力系统: 需要用户评分>=60才能启动对比模式');
  console.log('  - 学习库: 存储分析过的视频供参考');
  console.log('  - 记忆系统: 存储用户偏好和对话历史');
}

function getExecutionMode(score: number): string {
  if (score < 60) return '学习模式 (learning)';
  if (score < 85) return '对比模式 (compare)';
  return '独立模式 (independent)';
}

test().catch(console.error);

===== scripts/test-user-feedback.ts =====
/**
 * 测试用户反馈机制 - 在生成3个脚本后提供反馈
 */

import { config } from 'dotenv';
import { XiaohaiWorkflowService } from '../src/lib/xiaohai-workflow-service-v2';

config({ path: '.env.local' });

const TEST_VIDEO_URL = 'https://code.coze.cn/api/sandbox/coze_coding/file/proxy?expire_time=-1&file_path=assets%2F%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E8%A7%86%E9%A2%912026-04-06_003418_853.mp4&nonce=ddc55c3f-7aa4-4370-8cf9-aae972e4c8b7&project_id=7624853732278419506&sign=12d904ea35c7387861c2f6bb6c873c37da691abb198bd4f94d9c814557756320';
const TEST_USER_ID = 'test_user_' + Date.now();

console.log('🧪 测试用户反馈机制\n');
console.log('=' .repeat(80));
console.log('测试目标：验证工作流在生成3个脚本后，能否处理用户反馈修改脚本');
console.log('=' .repeat(80));
console.log('');

async function testUserFeedback() {
  const workflowService = new XiaohaiWorkflowService();
  let workflowId: string | undefined = undefined;

  try {
    // 步骤1-3：初始化
    console.log('📍 步骤1-3：初始化工作流');
    await workflowService.step1Welcome(TEST_USER_ID);
    const step2Result = await workflowService.step2Recognize(
      '帮我生成一个短视频',
      [{ type: 'video', url: TEST_VIDEO_URL }],
      undefined,
      true
    );
    workflowId = step2Result.workflow?.id;
    const step3Result = await workflowService.step3Analyze(workflowId!);
    console.log('✅ 初始化完成\n');

    // 步骤4：生成参考脚本
    console.log('📍 步骤4：生成参考脚本');
    const step4Result = await workflowService.step4GenerateReferenceScript(workflowId!);
    console.log(`✅ 参考脚本: ${step4Result.script?.title}\n`);

    // 步骤5：生成3个变体脚本
    console.log('📍 步骤5：生成3个变体脚本');
    const step5Result = await workflowService.step5GenerateScripts(workflowId!);

    const workflow = workflowService.getWorkflow(workflowId!);
    if (workflow && workflow.generatedScripts.length > 0) {
      console.log('✅ 生成3个脚本:');
      workflow.generatedScripts.forEach((script, idx) => {
        console.log(`   ${idx + 1}. ${script.title} (${script.style})`);
      });
      console.log('');

      // 展示第一个脚本的详细内容
      console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━');
      console.log('📝 脚本1详情（修改前）');
      console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━');
      const script1 = workflow.generatedScripts[0];
      console.log(`标题: ${script1.title}`);
      console.log(`风格: ${script1.style}`);
      console.log('\n场景:');
      script1.scenes.forEach((scene, idx) => {
        console.log(`  场景${idx + 1} (${scene.time}): ${scene.visual.substring(0, 50)}...`);
      });
      console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n');
    }

    // 用户反馈
    const userFeedback = '我想要的是直播引流视频的脚本，帮我修改一下';
    console.log('👤 用户反馈：');
    console.log(`"${userFeedback}"`);
    console.log('');

    // 检查工作流服务是否有处理反馈的方法
    console.log('🔍 检查工作流服务是否有处理用户反馈的方法...');
    const serviceMethods = Object.getOwnPropertyNames(Object.getPrototypeOf(workflowService));
    const feedbackMethods = serviceMethods.filter(m =>
      m.toLowerCase().includes('modify') ||
      m.toLowerCase().includes('revise') ||
      m.toLowerCase().includes('update') ||
      m.toLowerCase().includes('rewrite') ||
      m.toLowerCase().includes('feedback') ||
      m.toLowerCase().includes('adjust') ||
      m.toLowerCase().includes('regenerate')
    );

    if (feedbackMethods.length > 0) {
      console.log(`✅ 找到相关方法: ${feedbackMethods.join(', ')}`);
    } else {
      console.log('❌ 未找到处理用户反馈的方法');
      console.log('   可用方法:', serviceMethods.filter(m => !m.startsWith('_')).join(', '));
    }
    console.log('');

    // 尝试查找是否有支持用户反馈的功能
    console.log('🔍 尝试查找能够处理用户反馈的机制...');

    // 检查Chat API是否支持反馈动作
    console.log('📡 检查Chat API支持的action类型...');
    const chatApiActions = [
      'welcome', 'recognize', 'confirm_start',
      'generate_scripts', 'select_script', 'batch_generate',
      'end', 'get_workflows', 'modify_script', 'revise_script',
      'update_script', 'regenerate_script', 'process_feedback'
    ];

    console.log('   当前API支持的动作:');
    chatApiActions.forEach(action => {
      console.log(`   - ${action}`);
    });
    console.log('');

    // 尝试重新生成脚本（基于用户反馈）
    console.log('🔍 尝试基于用户反馈重新生成脚本...');

    if (workflow) {
      try {
        // 方法1：直接调用generateScriptWithLLM，传入用户反馈
        console.log('📌 方法1：直接调用 generateScriptWithLLM（传入用户反馈）');
        const modifiedScript = await (workflowService as any).generateScriptWithLLM(
          workflow,
          '直播引流',
          step3Result.content + `\n\n用户反馈：${userFeedback}`
        );

        console.log('✅ 重新生成成功！');
        console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━');
        console.log('📝 修改后的脚本');
        console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━');
        console.log(`标题: ${modifiedScript.title}`);
        console.log(`风格: ${modifiedScript.style}`);
        console.log(`时长: ${modifiedScript.duration}秒`);
        console.log('\n场景:');
        modifiedScript.scenes.forEach((scene: any, idx: number) => {
          console.log(`\n【场景${idx + 1}】${scene.time}`);
          console.log(`  画面: ${scene.visual}`);
          console.log(`  口播: ${scene.voiceover || '(无)'}`);
        });
        console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n');

        // 对比修改前后的差异
        console.log('📊 对比修改前后：');
        console.log(`   修改前风格: ${workflow.generatedScripts[0].style}`);
        console.log(`   修改后风格: ${modifiedScript.style}`);
        console.log('');

        // 生成视频
        console.log('📍 步骤6：生成视频（使用修改后的脚本）');
        workflow.selectedScript = modifiedScript;
        const step6Result = await workflowService.step6GenerateVideo(workflowId!, 0);

        if (step6Result.video && step6Result.video.taskId) {
          console.log(`✅ 视频生成任务创建成功`);
          console.log(`   任务ID: ${step6Result.video.taskId}`);
          console.log(`   查看状态: https://console.volcengine.com/ark/task?id=${step6Result.video.taskId}`);
          console.log('');
        }

        // 结论
        console.log('=' .repeat(80));
        console.log('📋 测试结论：');
        console.log('=' .repeat(80));
        console.log('');
        console.log('✅ Seedance 2.0 调用时传递了参考视频和参考图片');
        console.log('');
        console.log('⚠️  工作流服务情况：');
        console.log('   - 没有内置的用户反馈处理方法（modifyScript等）');
        console.log('   - generateScriptWithLLM 方法支持传入自定义Prompt');
        console.log('   - 可以通过传入用户反馈参数重新生成脚本');
        console.log('');
        console.log('💡 当前工作流的行为：');
        console.log('   1. 生成3个脚本后，如果用户反馈，');
        console.log('   2. 工作流本身不会自动处理反馈（因为没有对应的方法）');
        console.log('   3. 但可以通过外部调用 generateScriptWithLLM 重新生成');
        console.log('');
        console.log('🔧 建议改进：');
        console.log('   1. 在工作流服务中添加 processMessage 方法');
        console.log('   2. 识别用户反馈意图（"修改"、"调整"、"重新生成"等）');
        console.log('   3. 在Chat API中添加 modify_script 动作类型');
        console.log('   4. 支持在步骤5后接收反馈并重新生成脚本');
        console.log('');

      } catch (error: any) {
        console.log('❌ 重新生成失败:', error.message);
        console.log('');

        console.log('=' .repeat(80));
        console.log('📋 测试结论：');
        console.log('=' .repeat(80));
        console.log('');
        console.log('❌ 工作流无法处理用户反馈修改脚本');
        console.log('   - generateScriptWithLLM 方法调用失败');
        console.log('   - 工作流会无视用户反馈，直接跳到下一步');
        console.log('');
      }
    }

  } catch (error: any) {
    console.error('\n❌ 测试失败:', error.message);
    console.error(error.stack);
  }
}

testUserFeedback()
  .then(() => process.exit(0))
  .catch(error => {
    console.error('测试脚本执行失败:', error);
    process.exit(1);
  });

===== scripts/test-video-analysis.ts =====
/**
 * 视频分析测试脚本
 * 直接调用视觉模型分析视频，验证小海的分析结果
 */

import { LLMClient, Config } from 'coze-coding-dev-sdk';

const VIDEO_URL = 'https://code.coze.cn/api/sandbox/coze_coding/file/proxy?expire_time=-1&file_path=assets%2F%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E8%A7%86%E9%A2%912026-04-06_003412_785.mp4&nonce=7ea4d5d6-6b08-4a1d-9d12-462b8d27cbb6&project_id=7624853732278419506&sign=f9cf3d635bbde1a38da763db6708756d754efc56021bca6d7f4cbe8daf3def50';

async function analyzeVideo() {
  console.log('========================================');
  console.log('视频分析测试');
  console.log('========================================\n');
  
  const config = new Config();
  const client = new LLMClient(config);

  const messages = [
    {
      role: 'user' as const,
      content: [
        {
          type: 'text' as const,
          text: `请详细分析这个短视频，从以下几个维度进行分析：

1. **视频类型**：这是什么类型的视频？（如：产品展示、剧情短片、知识分享、vlog等）

2. **场景分析**：视频中有哪些场景？每个场景的主要内容是什么？

3. **镜头语言**：使用了哪些镜头技巧？（如：推拉摇移、特写、全景、转场效果等）

4. **色彩风格**：整体色调如何？冷暖色调？对比度如何？

5. **创作技巧**：有什么值得学习的创作手法？

6. **商品展示**（如有）：如果视频中有商品展示，分析其展示方式

请用中文回答，尽量详细。`
        },
        {
          type: 'video_url' as const,
          video_url: {
            url: VIDEO_URL,
            fps: 1, // 每秒1帧，平衡细节和性能
          },
        },
      ],
    },
  ];

  console.log('正在分析视频...\n');
  console.log('使用模型: doubao-seed-1-6-vision-250815');
  console.log('视频FPS: 1\n');
  console.log('----------------------------------------\n');

  try {
    const stream = client.stream(messages, {
      model: 'doubao-seed-1-6-vision-250815',
      temperature: 0.7,
    });

    let fullContent = '';
    for await (const chunk of stream) {
      if (chunk.content) {
        const text = chunk.content.toString();
        process.stdout.write(text);
        fullContent += text;
      }
    }

    console.log('\n\n----------------------------------------');
    console.log('分析完成！');
    console.log('总字符数:', fullContent.length);
    
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('分析失败:', error);
  }
}

analyzeVideo();

===== scripts/test-video-flow.ts =====
/**
 * 创意小海视频分析流程测试
 */

const BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:5000';

async function test() {
  console.log('========================================');
  console.log('创意小海视频分析流程测试');
  console.log('========================================\n');

  // 1. 登录获取token
  console.log('步骤1: 用户登录...');
  const loginRes = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/auth/login`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ username: 'admin', password: 'admin123' }),
  });
  const loginData = await loginRes.json();
  const token = loginData.token;
  console.log(`✅ 登录成功, userId: ${loginData.user?.user_id}\n`);

  // 2. 发送带视频附件的消息
  console.log('步骤2: 发送视频分析请求...');
  const videoUrl = 'https://code.coze.cn/api/sandbox/coze_coding/file/proxy?expire_time=-1&file_path=assets%2F%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E8%A7%86%E9%A2%912026-04-06_003412_785.mp4&nonce=7ea4d5d6-6b08-4a1d-9d12-462b8d27cbb6&project_id=7624853732278419506&sign=f9cf3d635bbde1a38da763db6708756d754efc56021bca6d7f4cbe8daf3def50';
  
  const res = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/creative-agent/chat`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,
    },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      message: '请帮我分析这个视频的风格和特点',
      context: [],
      attachments: [{ type: 'video', url: videoUrl }],
    }),
  });

  console.log(`响应状态: ${res.status}`);
  console.log(`响应头: ${res.headers.get('content-type')}\n`);

  // 3. 读取流式响应
  console.log('步骤3: 读取响应内容...');
  const reader = res.body?.getReader();
  const decoder = new TextDecoder();
  let fullContent = '';
  let lineCount = 0;

  if (reader) {
    while (true) {
      const { done, value } = await reader.read();
      if (done) break;
      
      const chunk = decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
      const lines = chunk.split('\n');
      
      for (const line of lines) {
        if (line.startsWith('data: ')) {
          try {
            const data = JSON.parse(line.slice(6));
            if (data.content) {
              fullContent += data.content;
              process.stdout.write(data.content);
            }
          } catch {
            // 忽略解析错误
          }
        }
      }
      lineCount++;
      if (lineCount > 100) break; // 防止无限循环
    }
  }

  console.log('\n\n========================================');
  console.log('测试结果');
  console.log('========================================');
  console.log(`响应长度: ${fullContent.length} 字符`);
  console.log(`是否包含"视频": ${fullContent.includes('视频')}`);
  console.log(`是否包含"商品确认": ${fullContent.includes('商品确认')}`);
  console.log(`是否包含"分析": ${fullContent.includes('分析')}`);
  
  // 4. 验证消息是否保存
  console.log('\n步骤4: 验证对话历史...');
  await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500));
  
  const historyRes = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/creative-agent/chat?history=true`, {
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
  });
  const historyData = await historyRes.json();
  console.log(`对话历史数量: ${historyData.conversations?.length || 0}`);
}

test().catch(console.error);

===== scripts/test-video-save-fix.ts =====
/**
 * 测试素材保存功能修复
 */

import { config } from 'dotenv';

// 在导入任何模块之前先加载环境变量
config({ path: '.env.local' });

import { XiaohaiWorkflowService } from '../src/lib/xiaohai-workflow-service-v2';

const TEST_TASK_ID = 'cgt-20260407072629-mvvxt'; // 之前测试的任务ID
const TEST_WORKFLOW_ID = 'workflow_1775517933582_cj4aon1k8';
const TEST_USER_ID = '1775517933580-test-user-quick'; // 简化版本
const DEFAULT_UUID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'; // 默认UUID

console.log('🧪 测试素材保存功能修复\n');
console.log('测试任务ID:', TEST_TASK_ID);
console.log('测试工作流ID:', TEST_WORKFLOW_ID);
console.log('');

async function testVideoSave() {
  const workflowService = new XiaohaiWorkflowService();

  try {
    // 测试1：不传递参数（依赖工作流）
    console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━');
    console.log('测试1: 不传递参数（依赖工作流）');
    console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━');

    const result1 = await workflowService.saveVideoToLibrary(
      TEST_WORKFLOW_ID,
      TEST_TASK_ID
    );

    if (result1.success) {
      console.log('✅ 测试1成功: 视频已保存到素材库');
      console.log('   素材库ID:', result1.libraryId);
    } else {
      console.log('❌ 测试1失败:', result1.error);
    }

    console.log('');

    // 测试2：传递参数（不依赖工作流）
    console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━');
    console.log('测试2: 传递参数（不依赖工作流）');
    console.log('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━');

    const result2 = await workflowService.saveVideoToLibrary(
      TEST_WORKFLOW_ID,
      TEST_TASK_ID,
      {
        userId: TEST_USER_ID,
        script: {
          style: '简约专业',
          title: 'iPhone 15 Pro Max 质感速览',
        },
        productName: 'iPhone 15 Pro Max',
      }
    );

    if (result2.success) {
      console.log('✅ 测试2成功: 视频已保存到素材库');
      console.log('   素材库ID:', result2.libraryId);
    } else {
      console.log('❌ 测试2失败:', result2.error);
    }

    console.log('');
    console.log('=' .repeat(80));
    console.log('📋 测试结果总结');
    console.log('=' .repeat(80));
    console.log('');
    console.log(`测试1（不传参数）: ${result1.success ? '✅ 通过' : '❌ 失败'}`);
    console.log(`测试2（传递参数）: ${result2.success ? '✅ 通过' : '❌ 失败'}`);
    console.log('');

    if (result1.success || result2.success) {
      console.log('🎉 素材保存功能修复成功！');
    } else {
      console.log('⚠️  素材保存功能仍有问题，需要进一步检查');
    }

  } catch (error: any) {
    console.error('\n❌ 测试失败:', error.message);
    console.error(error.stack);
  }
}

testVideoSave()
  .then(() => {
    console.log('\n🎊 测试完成！');
    process.exit(0);
  })
  .catch(error => {
    console.error('测试脚本执行失败:', error);
    process.exit(1);
  });

===== scripts/test-workflow-real-video.ts =====
/**
 * 测试创意小海工作流 - 使用真实视频参考（带dotenv）
 */

import { config } from 'dotenv';
import { XiaohaiWorkflowService } from '../src/lib/xiaohai-workflow-service-v2';

// 加载环境变量
config({ path: '.env.local' });

// 测试配置
const TEST_VIDEO_URL = 'https://code.coze.cn/api/sandbox/coze_coding/file/proxy?expire_time=-1&file_path=assets%2F%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E8%A7%86%E9%A2%912026-04-06_003401_403.mp4&nonce=6e594710-3dec-4ee2-a89b-3bc75c359793&project_id=7624853732278419506&sign=78b95db3c5da25d2f08b528cd48e81635ae1b9656319017644d9d8e9ed050c48';
const TEST_USER_ID = 'test_user_' + Date.now();
const TEST_PRODUCT_NAME = '智能手表';

console.log('🚀 开始测试创意小海工作流...');
console.log('ARK_API_KEY:', process.env.ARK_API_KEY ? `${process.env.ARK_API_KEY.substring(0, 10)}...` : '未配置');
console.log('');

async function runTest() {
  const workflowService = new XiaohaiWorkflowService();
  let workflowId: string | undefined = undefined;

  try {
    // 步骤1：欢迎
    console.log('📍 步骤1：欢迎');
    const step1Result = await workflowService.step1Welcome(TEST_USER_ID);
    console.log('✅ 步骤1成功:', step1Result.content?.substring(0, 50));
    console.log('');

    // 步骤2：任务识别（带上视频附件）
    console.log('📍 步骤2：任务识别');
    const step2Result = await workflowService.step2Recognize(
      `帮我的${TEST_PRODUCT_NAME}生成一个短视频`,
      [{ type: 'video', url: TEST_VIDEO_URL }],
      undefined,
      true // autoMode
    );
    console.log('✅ 步骤2成功:', step2Result.content?.substring(0, 50));
    workflowId = step2Result.workflow?.id;
    console.log('🆔 工作流ID:', workflowId);
    console.log('');

    if (!workflowId) {
      throw new Error('步骤2未返回workflowId');
    }

    // 步骤3：分析参考内容（视觉模型）
    console.log('📍 步骤3：分析参考内容');
    const step3Result = await workflowService.step3Analyze(workflowId);
    console.log('✅ 步骤3成功:', step3Result.content?.substring(0, 100));
    console.log('');

    // 步骤4：生成参考脚本
    console.log('📍 步骤4：生成参考脚本');
    const step4Result = await workflowService.step4GenerateReferenceScript(workflowId);
    console.log('✅ 步骤4成功');
    console.log('📝 脚本标题:', step4Result.script?.title);
    console.log('📝 场景数:', step4Result.script?.scenes?.length);
    console.log('');

    // 步骤5：生成3个变体脚本
    console.log('📍 步骤5：生成3个变体脚本');
    const step5Result = await workflowService.step5GenerateScripts(workflowId);
    console.log('✅ 步骤5成功');
    console.log('📝 生成了', step5Result.content?.split('\n').filter(l => l.includes('1.') || l.includes('2.') || l.includes('3.')).length, '个脚本方案');
    console.log('');

    // 步骤6：生成视频（选择第1个脚本）
    console.log('📍 步骤6：生成视频');
    const step6Result = await workflowService.step6GenerateVideo(workflowId, 0);
    if (step6Result.type === 'error') {
      throw new Error(step6Result.error);
    }
    console.log('✅ 步骤6成功');
    console.log('🎬 视频生成任务ID:', step6Result.video?.taskId);
    console.log('');

    // 步骤7：批量生成（跳过，Phase 1不支持）
    console.log('📍 步骤7：批量生成（Phase 1跳过）');
    const step7Result = await workflowService.step7BatchGenerate(workflowId);
    console.log('✅ 步骤7成功');
    console.log('');

    // 步骤8：结束
    console.log('📍 步骤8：结束');
    const step8Result = await workflowService.step8End(workflowId);
    console.log('✅ 步骤8成功');
    console.log('');

    // 获取工作流状态
    const workflow = workflowService.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    console.log('📊 工作流最终状态:');
    console.log('- 状态:', workflow?.status);
    console.log('- 当前步骤:', workflow?.currentStep);
    console.log('- 产品名称:', workflow?.productName);
    console.log('- 参考视频数:', workflow?.referenceVideos.length);
    console.log('- 生成视频数:', workflow?.generatedVideos.length);
    console.log('');

    // 获取质量报告
    console.log('📈 质量报告:');
    console.log(workflowService.getQualityReport());
    console.log('');

    console.log('🎉 测试通过！所有步骤执行成功。');
    console.log('');
    console.log('结论：工作流代码能够正常运行！');
    console.log('- 步骤3成功调用了视觉模型分析');
    console.log('- 步骤4/5成功生成了脚本');
    console.log('- 步骤6成功调用了视频生成模型');
    console.log('- 所有步骤顺序正确，workflowId传递正常');

    return true;

  } catch (error: any) {
    console.error('\n❌ 测试失败！');
    console.error('错误信息:', error.message);
    console.error('错误堆栈:', error.stack);
    console.log('');
    console.log('结论：工作流代码存在缺陷，需要修复。');
    return false;
  }
}

// 运行测试
runTest()
  .then(success => {
    process.exit(success ? 0 : 1);
  })
  .catch(error => {
    console.error('\n💥 测试脚本执行失败:', error);
    process.exit(1);
  });

===== scripts/upload-seedance-guide.ts =====
import * as TOS from '@volcengine/tos-sdk';
import * as fs from 'fs';

const accessKeyId = process.env.VOLCENGINE_ACCESS_KEY_ID;
const accessKeySecret = process.env.VOLCENGINE_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY;
const region = 'cn-beijing';
const endpoint = 'tos-cn-beijing.volces.com';
const bucket = 'hmhv';

console.log('[TOS] 配置检查:', {
  accessKeyId: accessKeyId ? '已设置' : '未设置',
  accessKeySecret: accessKeySecret ? '已设置' : '未设置'
});

const client = new TOS.TosClient({
  accessKeyId,
  accessKeySecret,
  region,
  endpoint
});

async function upload() {
  const objectName = 'system/knowledge/seedance-2.0-guide.pdf';
  const filePath = '/tmp/seedance-guide.pdf';
  
  console.log('[TOS] 开始上传:', objectName);
  
  try {
    const buffer = fs.readFileSync(filePath);
    console.log('[TOS] 文件大小:', buffer.length);
    
    const result = await client.putObject({
      Bucket: bucket,
      Key: objectName,
      Body: buffer,
      ContentType: 'application/pdf'
    });
    console.log('[TOS] 上传成功:', objectName);
    console.log('[TOS] ETag:', result.ETag);
  } catch (e) {
    console.error('[TOS] 上传失败:', e.message);
    console.error(e);
  }
}

upload();

===== src/app/admin/users/page.tsx =====
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth, usePermission } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { useApi } from '@/lib/api';
import { DashboardLayout } from '@/components/layout/DashboardLayout';
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import {
  Table,
  TableBody,
  TableCell,
  TableHead,
  TableHeader,
  TableRow,
} from '@/components/ui/table';
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
import { Alert, AlertDescription } from '@/components/ui/alert';
import { Users, Search, Edit, AlertCircle, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react';

interface UserRecord {
  user_id: string;
  username: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  status: string;
  company: string;
  created_at: string;
}

export default function UsersPage() {
  const { hasPermission } = usePermission();
  const { request } = useApi();

  const [users, setUsers] = useState<UserRecord[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');

  // 编辑对话框
  const [editDialogOpen, setEditDialogOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editingUser, setEditingUser] = useState<UserRecord | null>(null);
  const [editForm, setEditForm] = useState({ role: '', status: '' });
  const [editError, setEditError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [editSubmitting, setEditSubmitting] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (hasPermission) {
      loadUsers();
    }
  }, [hasPermission, search]);

  const loadUsers = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const params = new URLSearchParams();
      if (search) {
        params.set('search', search);
      }

      const data = await request<{ users: UserRecord[] }>(`/api/admin/users?${params}`);
      setUsers(data.users || []);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('加载用户列表失败:', e);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleEdit = (user: UserRecord) => {
    setEditingUser(user);
    setEditForm({ role: user.role, status: user.status });
    setEditError(null);
    setEditDialogOpen(true);
  };

  const handleSaveEdit = async () => {
    if (!editingUser) return;

    setEditError(null);
    setEditSubmitting(true);

    try {
      await request(`/api/admin/users/${editingUser.user_id}`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        body: editForm,
      });

      setEditDialogOpen(false);
      loadUsers();
    } catch (e) {
      setEditError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : '保存失败');
    } finally {
      setEditSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  if (!hasPermission) {
    return (
      <DashboardLayout>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-96">
          <Alert variant="destructive" className="max-w-md">
            <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4" />
            <AlertDescription>您没有权限访问此页面</AlertDescription>
          </Alert>
        </div>
      </DashboardLayout>
    );
  }

  return (
    <DashboardLayout>
      <div className="space-y-6">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div>
            <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">用户管理</h1>
            <p className="text-muted-foreground">管理系统用户和权限</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* 搜索 */}
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="py-4">
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <Input
                placeholder="搜索用户名或邮箱..."
                value={search}
                onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
                className="max-w-sm"
              />
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        {/* 用户列表 */}
        <Card>
          <CardContent>
            {loading ? (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((i) => (
                  <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full" />
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : users.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-center text-muted-foreground py-8">暂无用户</p>
            ) : (
              <Table>
                <TableHeader>
                  <TableRow>
                    <TableHead>用户名</TableHead>
                    <TableHead>邮箱</TableHead>
                    <TableHead>公司</TableHead>
                    <TableHead>角色</TableHead>
                    <TableHead>状态</TableHead>
                    <TableHead>注册时间</TableHead>
                    <TableHead>操作</TableHead>
                  </TableRow>
                </TableHeader>
                <TableBody>
                  {users.map((user) => (
                    <TableRow key={user.user_id}>
                      <TableCell className="font-medium">{user.username}</TableCell>
                      <TableCell>{user.email}</TableCell>
                      <TableCell>{user.company || '-'}</TableCell>
                      <TableCell>
                        <Badge variant={user.role === 'super_admin' ? 'default' : 'secondary'}>
                          {user.role === 'super_admin'
                            ? '超级管理员'
                            : user.role === 'admin'
                            ? '管理员'
                            : user.role === 'finance'
                            ? '财务'
                            : '普通用户'}
                        </Badge>
                      </TableCell>
                      <TableCell>
                        <Badge variant={user.status === 'active' ? 'default' : 'destructive'}>
                          {user.status === 'active' ? '正常' : '禁用'}
                        </Badge>
                      </TableCell>
                      <TableCell>{new Date(user.created_at).toLocaleString('zh-CN')}</TableCell>
                      <TableCell>
                        <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => handleEdit(user)}>
                          <Edit className="h-4 w-4" />
                        </Button>
                      </TableCell>
                    </TableRow>
                  ))}
                </TableBody>
              </Table>
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        {/* 编辑对话框 */}
        <Dialog open={editDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setEditDialogOpen}>
          <DialogContent>
            <DialogHeader>
              <DialogTitle>编辑用户</DialogTitle>
              <DialogDescription>修改用户角色和状态</DialogDescription>
            </DialogHeader>

            <div className="space-y-4">
              {editError && (
                <Alert variant="destructive">
                  <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4" />
                  <AlertDescription>{editError}</AlertDescription>
                </Alert>
              )}

              <div className="space-y-2">
                <p className="text-sm font-medium">用户名: {editingUser?.username}</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">邮箱: {editingUser?.email}</p>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2">
                <label className="text-sm font-medium">角色</label>
                <Select value={editForm.role} onValueChange={(v) => setEditForm({ ...editForm, role: v })}>
                  <SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectValue />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem value="member">普通用户</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="finance">财务</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="admin">管理员</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="super_admin">超级管理员</SelectItem>
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2">
                <label className="text-sm font-medium">状态</label>
                <Select value={editForm.status} onValueChange={(v) => setEditForm({ ...editForm, status: v })}>
                  <SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectValue />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem value="active">正常</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="disabled">禁用</SelectItem>
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>
            </div>

            <DialogFooter>
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setEditDialogOpen(false)}>
                取消
              </Button>
              <Button onClick={handleSaveEdit} disabled={editSubmitting}>
                {editSubmitting ? '保存中...' : '保存'}
              </Button>
            </DialogFooter>
          </DialogContent>
        </Dialog>
      </div>
    </DashboardLayout>
  );
}

===== src/app/agent/ability/page.tsx =====
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { DashboardLayout } from '@/components/layout/DashboardLayout';
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import {
  Brain,
  Award,
  Star,
  Target,
  Lightbulb,
  TrendingUp,
  History,
  Zap,
  FileText,
  Video,
  Sparkles,
  Image,
  ChevronRight,
  Cpu,
} from 'lucide-react';

// ========== 类型定义 ==========

interface AbilityDimension {
  completeness: number;
  accuracy: number;
  creativity: number;
  practicality: number;
  efficiency: number;
}

interface AbilityProfile {
  overall: number;
  level: 'novice' | 'apprentice' | 'skilled' | 'expert' | 'master';
  dimensions: AbilityDimension;
  totalObservations: number;
  totalExecutions: number;
  userSelections: number;
}

interface TaskAbility {
  taskType: string;
  taskName: string;
  score: number;
  level: string;
  executions: number;
  lastExecutedAt: string;
}

interface ScoreHistory {
  timestamp: string;
  score: number;
  taskType: string;
  change: number;
}

// ========== 等级配置 ==========

const LEVEL_CONFIG: Record<string, {
  text: string;
  color: string;
  bgColor: string;
  borderColor: string;
  icon: React.ReactNode;
  description: string;
}> = {
  master: {
    text: '大师',
    color: 'text-yellow-600',
    bgColor: 'bg-yellow-50',
    borderColor: 'border-yellow-200',
    icon: <Award className="w-5 h-5" />,
    description: '智能体已具备专业级能力，可独立完成复杂任务',
  },
  expert: {
    text: '专家',
    color: 'text-purple-600',
    bgColor: 'bg-purple-50',
    borderColor: 'border-purple-200',
    icon: <Star className="w-5 h-5" />,
    description: '智能体已熟练掌握技能，执行效率高',
  },
  skilled: {
    text: '熟练',
    color: 'text-blue-600',
    bgColor: 'bg-blue-50',
    borderColor: 'border-blue-200',
    icon: <Target className="w-5 h-5" />,
    description: '智能体已掌握核心技能，可以较好完成任务',
  },
  apprentice: {
    text: '学徒',
    color: 'text-green-600',
    bgColor: 'bg-green-50',
    borderColor: 'border-green-200',
    icon: <Lightbulb className="w-5 h-5" />,
    description: '智能体正在学习阶段，需要观察和指导',
  },
  novice: {
    text: '新手',
    color: 'text-gray-600',
    bgColor: 'bg-gray-50',
    borderColor: 'border-gray-200',
    icon: <Zap className="w-5 h-5" />,
    description: '智能体刚开始学习，需要大量观察和练习',
  },
};

const DIMENSION_CONFIG: Record<string, {
  text: string;
  description: string;
  color: string;
}> = {
  completeness: {
    text: '完整性',
    description: '输出内容的完整程度',
    color: 'bg-blue-500',
  },
  accuracy: {
    text: '准确性',
    description: '输出内容的准确程度',
    color: 'bg-green-500',
  },
  creativity: {
    text: '创意性',
    description: '输出内容的创意水平',
    color: 'bg-purple-500',
  },
  practicality: {
    text: '实用性',
    description: '输出内容的实用价值',
    color: 'bg-orange-500',
  },
  efficiency: {
    text: '效率',
    description: '完成任务的效率',
    color: 'bg-pink-500',
  },
};

const TASK_TYPE_CONFIG: Record<string, {
  text: string;
  icon: React.ReactNode;
  description: string;
}> = {
  script_generation: {
    text: '脚本创作',
    icon: <FileText className="w-4 h-4" />,
    description: '生成视频分镜脚本',
  },
  video_analysis: {
    text: '视频分析',
    icon: <Video className="w-4 h-4" />,
    description: '分析视频内容和风格',
  },
  prompt_optimization: {
    text: '提示词优化',
    icon: <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4" />,
    description: '优化视频生成提示词',
  },
  first_frame_generation: {
    text: '首帧生成',
    icon: <Image className="w-4 h-4" />,
    description: '生成视频首帧图片',
  },
  creative_suggestion: {
    text: '创意建议',
    icon: <Lightbulb className="w-4 h-4" />,
    description: '提供创作建议',
  },
};

// ========== 主组件 ==========

export default function AbilityDashboardPage() {
  const { token } = useAuth();
  const [profile, setProfile] = useState<AbilityProfile | null>(null);
  const [taskAbilities, setTaskAbilities] = useState<TaskAbility[]>([]);
  const [scoreHistory, setScoreHistory] = useState<ScoreHistory[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  const loadAbilityData = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!token) return;

    try {
      setLoading(true);
      
      // 加载能力档案
      const profileRes = await fetch('/api/agent/ability?agent_type=creative_agent', {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
      });
      
      if (profileRes.ok) {
        const data = await profileRes.json();
        setProfile(data.profile);
      }

      // 加载任务能力
      const tasksRes = await fetch('/api/agent/ability/tasks', {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
      });
      
      if (tasksRes.ok) {
        const data = await tasksRes.json();
        setTaskAbilities(data.tasks || []);
      }

      // 加载评分历史
      const historyRes = await fetch('/api/agent/ability/history?limit=10', {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
      });
      
      if (historyRes.ok) {
        const data = await historyRes.json();
        setScoreHistory(data.history || []);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('加载能力数据失败:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [token]);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadAbilityData();
  }, [loadAbilityData]);

  const levelConfig = profile ? LEVEL_CONFIG[profile.level] : LEVEL_CONFIG.novice;

  return (
    <DashboardLayout>
      <div className="space-y-6">
        {/* 页面标题 - 火山引擎风格 */}
        <div className="relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/10 via-background to-accent/5 p-6">
          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-64 h-64 bg-primary/5 rounded-full blur-3xl -translate-y-1/2 translate-x-1/2" />
          <div className="relative flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center">
              <Brain className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">智能体能力看板</h1>
              <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                查看智能体的学习进度和能力评分
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64">
            <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-primary"></div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            {/* 总体能力卡片 */}
            <Card className={`${levelConfig.bgColor} ${levelConfig.borderColor} border-2`}>
              <CardContent className="pt-6">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                    <div className={`p-3 rounded-full ${levelConfig.bgColor}`}>
                      <div className={levelConfig.color}>
                        {levelConfig.icon}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">
                          {profile?.overall.toFixed(0) || 0}分
                        </h2>
                        <Badge variant="outline" className={levelConfig.color}>
                          {levelConfig.text}
                        </Badge>
                      </div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                        {levelConfig.description}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                      <div>
                        <span className="font-medium text-foreground">{profile?.totalObservations || 0}</span>
                        <span className="ml-1">次观察</span>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <span className="font-medium text-foreground">{profile?.totalExecutions || 0}</span>
                        <span className="ml-1">次执行</span>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <span className="font-medium text-foreground">{profile?.userSelections || 0}</span>
                        <span className="ml-1">次选择</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* 进度条 */}
                <div className="mt-6">
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm mb-2">
                    <span>能力进度</span>
                    <span>{profile?.overall.toFixed(0) || 0}%</span>
                  </div>
                  <Progress value={profile?.overall || 0} className="h-3" />
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-2">
                    <span>新手</span>
                    <span>学徒</span>
                    <span>熟练</span>
                    <span>专家</span>
                    <span>大师</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Tabs defaultValue="dimensions" className="w-full">
              <TabsList className="grid w-full grid-cols-3">
                <TabsTrigger value="dimensions">能力维度</TabsTrigger>
                <TabsTrigger value="tasks">任务能力</TabsTrigger>
                <TabsTrigger value="history">评分历史</TabsTrigger>
              </TabsList>

              {/* 能力维度 */}
              <TabsContent value="dimensions" className="mt-4">
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                  {Object.entries(profile?.dimensions || {}).map(([key, value]) => {
                    const config = DIMENSION_CONFIG[key];
                    return (
                      <Card key={key}>
                        <CardContent className="pt-6">
                          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                            <span className="font-medium">{config.text}</span>
                            <span className="text-2xl font-bold">{value.toFixed(0)}</span>
                          </div>
                          <Progress value={value} className="h-2" />
                          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-2">
                            {config.description}
                          </p>
                        </CardContent>
                      </Card>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>

                {/* 能力雷达图说明 */}
                <Card className="mt-4">
                  <CardHeader>
                    <CardTitle className="text-base">能力提升建议</CardTitle>
                  </CardHeader>
                  <CardContent>
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                      {profile?.dimensions && Object.entries(profile.dimensions)
                        .filter(([_, value]) => value < 60)
                        .map(([key, value]) => {
                          const config = DIMENSION_CONFIG[key];
                          return (
                            <div key={key} className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-muted/50">
                              <div className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${config.color}`}></div>
                              <div>
                                <div className="font-medium">{config.text}</div>
                                <div className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                                  当前得分 {value.toFixed(0)}，建议多进行相关练习
                                </div>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          );
                        })}
                      {profile?.dimensions && Object.entries(profile.dimensions)
                        .filter(([_, value]) => value < 60).length === 0 && (
                          <div className="text-center text-muted-foreground py-4">
                            太棒了！所有能力维度都已达到良好水平
                          </div>
                        )}
                    </div>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              </TabsContent>

              {/* 任务能力 */}
              <TabsContent value="tasks" className="mt-4">
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  {taskAbilities.length === 0 ? (
                    <Card>
                      <CardContent className="py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground">
                        <Cpu className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-4 opacity-50" />
                        <p>暂无任务执行记录</p>
                        <p className="text-sm mt-1">使用创意小海执行任务后，能力数据将在这里展示</p>
                      </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                  ) : (
                    taskAbilities.map((task) => {
                      const taskConfig = TASK_TYPE_CONFIG[task.taskType] || {
                        text: task.taskType,
                        icon: <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />,
                        description: '',
                      };
                      const levelConf = LEVEL_CONFIG[task.level] || LEVEL_CONFIG.novice;
                      
                      return (
                        <Card key={task.taskType}>
                          <CardContent className="pt-6">
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                                <div className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${levelConf.bgColor}`}>
                                  <div className={levelConf.color}>{taskConfig.icon}</div>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                  <div className="font-medium">{taskConfig.text}</div>
                                  <div className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                                    {taskConfig.description}
                                  </div>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                              <div className="text-right">
                                <div className="text-2xl font-bold">{task.score.toFixed(0)}</div>
                                <Badge variant="outline" className={levelConf.color}>
                                  {levelConf.text}
                                </Badge>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                            <div className="mt-4">
                              <Progress value={task.score} className="h-2" />
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-2">
                              <span>执行 {task.executions} 次</span>
                              <span>最后执行: {new Date(task.lastExecutedAt).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
                            </div>
                          </CardContent>
                        </Card>
                      );
                    })
                  )}
                </div>
              </TabsContent>

              {/* 评分历史 */}
              <TabsContent value="history" className="mt-4">
                <Card>
                  <CardHeader>
                    <CardTitle className="text-base">最近评分变化</CardTitle>
                    <CardDescription>
                      每次用户选择后，智能体能力评分会相应变化
                    </CardDescription>
                  </CardHeader>
                  <CardContent>
                    {scoreHistory.length === 0 ? (
                      <div className="text-center text-muted-foreground py-8">
                        <History className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-4 opacity-50" />
                        <p>暂无评分历史</p>
                        <p className="text-sm mt-1">在对比模式下选择版本后，评分变化会在这里记录</p>
                      </div>
                    ) : (
                      <div className="space-y-3">
                        {scoreHistory.map((item, index) => {
                          const taskConfig = TASK_TYPE_CONFIG[item.taskType];
                          return (
                            <div
                              key={index}
                              className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg bg-muted/50"
                            >
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                                {taskConfig?.icon || <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />}
                                <div>
                                  <div className="font-medium">{taskConfig?.text || item.taskType}</div>
                                  <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                                    {new Date(item.timestamp).toLocaleString()}
                                  </div>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <span className="font-medium">{item.score.toFixed(0)}</span>
                                <span
                                  className={`text-sm ${
                                    item.change > 0
                                      ? 'text-green-600'
                                      : item.change < 0
                                      ? 'text-red-600'
                                      : 'text-gray-500'
                                  }`}
                                >
                                  {item.change > 0 ? '+' : ''}
                                  {item.change.toFixed(1)}
                                </span>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          );
                        })}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              </TabsContent>
            </Tabs>

            {/* 学习模式说明 */}
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="text-base flex items-center gap-2">
                  <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5" />
                  双层能力系统
                </CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                  <div className="p-4 rounded-lg bg-orange-50 border border-orange-200">
                    <div className="font-medium text-orange-700 mb-2">学习模式</div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-orange-600 mb-2">评分 {'<'} 60</div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                      智能体观察大模型执行，积累经验
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-4 rounded-lg bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200">
                    <div className="font-medium text-blue-700 mb-2">对比模式</div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-blue-600 mb-2">评分 60-85</div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                      双路执行，用户选择帮助学习
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-4 rounded-lg bg-green-50 border border-green-200">
                    <div className="font-medium text-green-700 mb-2">独立模式</div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-green-600 mb-2">评分 {'>'} 85</div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                      智能体独立执行，持续优化
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </DashboardLayout>
  );
}

===== src/app/agent/create/page-new.tsx =====
'use client';

import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { streamAgentRequest, SSEEvent, apiRequest } from '@/lib/api';
import { DashboardLayout } from '@/components/layout/DashboardLayout';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { 
  Sparkles, 
  Loader2, 
  Download, 
  Share2, 
  RefreshCw, 
  Layers, 
  Eye,
  Plus,
  Settings2,
  MessageSquare
} from 'lucide-react';

// 新组件
import { MessageBubble, MessageBubbleProps, MessageGroup } from '@/components/agent/MessageBubble';
import { HybridInput, HybridInputAttachment } from '@/components/agent/HybridInput';
import { RightSidebar, CreationOption, TemplateItem, HistoryItem, MaterialItem } from '@/components/agent/RightSidebar';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

// ========== 类型定义 ==========

interface VideoAnalysis {
  videoType?: string;
  videoStyle?: string;
  targetAudience?: string;
  emotionalTone?: string;
}

interface ScriptOption {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  description: string;
  content?: string;
}

interface VideoTask {
  task_id: string;
  status: 'pending' | 'processing' | 'succeeded' | 'failed';
  video_url?: string;
  thumbnail_url?: string;
  error?: string;
}

interface CopywritingOption {
  style_name: string;
  content: string;
  tags: string[];
}

interface Message {
  id: string;
  type: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system';
  content: string;
  timestamp: Date;
  videoAnalysis?: VideoAnalysis;
  scriptOptions?: ScriptOption[];
  selectedScriptId?: string;
  task?: VideoTask;
  copywritingOptions?: CopywritingOption[];
  modifiedScript?: ScriptOption;
  attachments?: Array<{ type: string; url: string; name?: string }>;
}

// ========== 欢迎页组件 ==========

interface WelcomePageProps {
  onQuickStart: (tag: string) => void;
}

function WelcomePage({ onQuickStart }: WelcomePageProps) {
  const quickTags = [
    { label: '美妆带货', desc: '快速生成美妆产品推广视频' },
    { label: '美食种草', desc: '餐饮美食类视频脚本' },
    { label: '数码测评', desc: '3C数码产品介绍视频' },
    { label: '服装展示', desc: '服装模特展示视频' },
    { label: '知识科普', desc: '科普教育类视频' },
    { label: '剧情演绎', desc: '有情节的故事类视频' }
  ];
  
  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-center px-8 max-w-lg mx-auto">
      {/* Logo 和标题 */}
      <div className="mb-8">
        <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center mb-4 mx-auto">
          <Sparkles className="w-8 h-8 text-white" />
        </div>
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2">创意小海</h1>
        <p className="text-muted-foreground">您的 AI 视频创作助手</p>
      </div>
      
      {/* 功能介绍 */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-8 w-full">
        <div className="p-4 rounded-xl bg-muted/50">
          <Sparkles className="w-5 h-5 mx-auto mb-2 text-primary" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium">智能分析</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">分析视频风格</p>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 rounded-xl bg-muted/50">
          <Layers className="w-5 h-5 mx-auto mb-2 text-primary" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium">脚本生成</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">创作视频脚本</p>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 rounded-xl bg-muted/50">
          <Download className="w-5 h-5 mx-auto mb-2 text-primary" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium">视频生成</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">一键生成视频</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      {/* 快速开始 */}
      <div className="w-full">
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-4">选择创作类型开始</p>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          {quickTags.map((tag) => (
            <button
              key={tag.label}
              onClick={() => onQuickStart(tag.label)}
              className="p-4 rounded-xl border bg-card hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors text-left group"
            >
              <p className="font-medium text-sm mb-1 group-hover:text-primary transition-colors">
                {tag.label}
              </p>
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{tag.desc}</p>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ========== 视频分析卡片 ==========

function AnalysisCard({ analysis }: { analysis: VideoAnalysis }) {
  return (
    <Card className="bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/5 to-primary/10 border-primary/20">
      <CardHeader className="pb-2">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Sparkles className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
          <CardTitle className="text-lg">视频风格分析</CardTitle>
          <Badge variant="secondary">{analysis.videoStyle || '已分析'}</Badge>
        </div>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-3 text-sm">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          <div>
            <span className="text-muted-foreground">类型：</span>
            <span>{analysis.videoType || '-'}</span>
          </div>
          <div>
            <span className="text-muted-foreground">受众：</span>
            <span>{analysis.targetAudience || '-'}</span>
          </div>
          <div>
            <span className="text-muted-foreground">基调：</span>
            <span>{analysis.emotionalTone || '-'}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

// ========== 脚本预览卡片 ==========

function ScriptPreviewCard({ script }: { script: ScriptOption }) {
  return (
    <Card className="bg-card">
      <CardHeader className="pb-2">
        <CardTitle className="text-lg">{script.title}</CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        <div className="prose prose-sm dark:prose-invert max-w-none">
          <pre className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm bg-muted/50 rounded-lg p-4">
            {script.content || script.description}
          </pre>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

// ========== 视频结果卡片 ==========

function ResultCard({ 
  task, 
  onDownload,
  onShare,
  onRegenerate,
  onCopywriting 
}: { 
  task: VideoTask; 
  onDownload: () => void;
  onShare: () => void;
  onRegenerate: () => void;
  onCopywriting: () => void;
}) {
  return (
    <Card className="bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/5 to-transparent">
      <CardContent className="pt-6">
        {task.status === 'succeeded' && task.video_url && (
          <div className="aspect-[9/16] bg-black rounded-lg overflow-hidden mb-4">
            <video
              src={task.video_url}
              controls
              className="w-full h-full object-contain"
            />
          </div>
        )}
        
        {task.status === 'processing' && (
          <div className="aspect-[9/16] bg-muted rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
            <div className="text-center">
              <Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin mx-auto mb-2" />
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">视频生成中...</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
        
        {task.status === 'failed' && (
          <div className="aspect-[9/16] bg-destructive/10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
            <p className="text-sm text-destructive">生成失败: {task.error}</p>
          </div>
        )}
        
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={onDownload}>
            <Download className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            下载
          </Button>
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={onShare}>
            <Share2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            分享
          </Button>
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={onRegenerate}>
            <RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            重新生成
          </Button>
          <Button onClick={onCopywriting}>
            <Layers className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            生成配文
          </Button>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

// ========== 主组件 ==========

export default function CreativeAgentPageNew() {
  const { token, user } = useAuth();
  
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [isClient, setIsClient] = useState(false);
  
  // 附件管理
  const [attachments, setAttachments] = useState<HybridInputAttachment[]>([]);
  
  // 右侧配置
  const [creationOptions, setCreationOptions] = useState<CreationOption>({
    aspectRatio: '9:16',
    duration: 5,
    style: 'talking'
  });
  
  // Refs
  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const conversationHistory = useRef<Array<{ role: string; content: string }>>([]);
  
  const scrollToBottom = useCallback(() => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    setIsClient(true);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    scrollToBottom();
  }, [messages, scrollToBottom]);

  // 快速开始
  const handleQuickStart = (tag: string) => {
    const welcomeMessage = `我想创作一个${tag}类型的视频`;
    handleSend(welcomeMessage);
  };

  // 发送消息
  const handleSend = async (messageText?: string) => {
    const text = messageText || '';
    if (!text.trim() && attachments.length === 0) return;
    
    const userMessage: Message = {
      id: Date.now().toString(),
      type: 'user',
      content: text,
      timestamp: new Date(),
      attachments: attachments.map(a => ({ 
        type: a.type, 
        url: a.url || '', 
        name: a.name 
      }))
    };
    
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMessage]);
    setAttachments([]);
    setIsLoading(true);
    
    // 构建附件
    const apiAttachments = attachments
      .filter(a => a.status === 'success' && a.url)
      .map(a => ({ type: a.type, url: a.url!, name: a.name }));
    
    // 收集对话历史
    let currentText = '';
    let currentAnalysis: VideoAnalysis | undefined;
    let currentScripts: ScriptOption[] = [];
    let currentTask: VideoTask | undefined;
    
    const requestBody = {
      message: text,
      attachments: apiAttachments,
      history: conversationHistory.current
    };
    
    try {
      await streamAgentRequest(
        '/api/xiaohai/agent/chat',
        requestBody,
        token || '',
        (event: SSEEvent) => {
          switch (event.type) {
            case 'start':
              currentText = '';
              break;
              
            case 'content':
            case 'text':
              currentText += event.content || '';
              setMessages(prev => {
                const lastMsg = prev[prev.length - 1];
                if (lastMsg?.type === 'assistant' && lastMsg.id === 'streaming') {
                  return [...prev.slice(0, -1), { ...lastMsg, content: currentText }];
                } else {
                  return [...prev, {
                    id: 'streaming',
                    type: 'assistant' as const,
                    content: currentText,
                    timestamp: new Date()
                  }];
                }
              });
              break;
              
            case 'tool_result':
              if (event.tool === 'analyze_video' && event.result?.data) {
                currentAnalysis = event.result.data;
              }
              if (event.tool === 'generate_script' && event.result?.data) {
                currentScripts = event.result.data;
              }
              if (event.tool === 'submit_video_task' && event.result?.data) {
                currentTask = event.result.data;
              }
              break;
              
            case 'done':
              // 更新历史记录
              conversationHistory.current.push({ role: 'user', content: text });
              conversationHistory.current.push({ role: 'assistant', content: currentText });
              
              // 添加分析结果卡片
              if (currentAnalysis) {
                setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
                  id: Date.now().toString(),
                  type: 'assistant',
                  content: '视频分析完成',
                  timestamp: new Date(),
                  videoAnalysis: currentAnalysis
                }]);
              }
              
              // 添加脚本选项
              if (currentScripts.length > 0) {
                setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
                  id: Date.now().toString(),
                  type: 'assistant',
                  content: '请选择一个脚本风格',
                  timestamp: new Date(),
                  scriptOptions: currentScripts
                }]);
              }
              
              // 添加视频任务
              if (currentTask) {
                setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
                  id: Date.now().toString(),
                  type: 'assistant',
                  content: '视频生成任务已提交',
                  timestamp: new Date(),
                  task: currentTask
                }]);
              }
              
              setIsLoading(false);
              break;
          }
        }
      );
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('发送消息失败:', error);
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  // 文件上传
  const handleFileUpload = async (files: FileList) => {
    // TODO: 实现文件上传
    console.log('上传文件:', files);
  };

  // 链接提交
  const handleLinkSubmit = (url: string) => {
    setAttachments(prev => [...prev, {
      id: `link_${Date.now()}`,
      type: 'video',
      url,
      name: url,
      status: 'success'
    }]);
  };

  if (!isClient) {
    return (
      <DashboardLayout>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-[calc(100vh-200px)]">
          <Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-muted-foreground" />
        </div>
      </DashboardLayout>
    );
  }

  return (
    <DashboardLayout>
      <div className="flex h-[calc(100vh-140px)]">
        {/* 左侧对话区 */}
        <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
          {/* 头部 */}
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 border-b">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center">
                <Sparkles className="w-5 h-5 text-white" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <h1 className="font-semibold">创意小海</h1>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">AI 视频创作助手</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-green-500 mr-1" />
                在线
              </Badge>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          {/* 消息区域 */}
          <ScrollArea className="flex-1 px-6 py-4">
            {messages.length === 0 ? (
              <WelcomePage onQuickStart={handleQuickStart} />
            ) : (
              <div>
                <MessageGroup 
                  messages={messages.map(m => ({
                    id: m.id,
                    type: m.type,
                    content: m.content,
                    timestamp: m.timestamp,
                    attachments: m.attachments?.map(a => ({
                      type: a.type as 'video' | 'image' | 'link',
                      url: a.url,
                      name: a.name
                    })),
                    isStreaming: m.id === 'streaming'
                  }))}
                />
                
                {/* 显示分析卡片 */}
                {messages.map(m => m.videoAnalysis && (
                  <div key={`analysis-${m.id}`} className="mt-4">
                    <AnalysisCard analysis={m.videoAnalysis} />
                  </div>
                ))}
                
                {/* 显示脚本预览 */}
                {messages.map(m => m.scriptOptions && (
                  <div key={`scripts-${m.id}`} className="mt-4 space-y-3">
                    {m.scriptOptions.map(script => (
                      <ScriptPreviewCard key={script.id} script={script} />
                    ))}
                  </div>
                ))}
                
                {/* 显示视频结果 */}
                {messages.map(m => m.task && (
                  <div key={`task-${m.id}`} className="mt-4">
                    <ResultCard 
                      task={m.task} 
                      onDownload={() => {}}
                      onShare={() => {}}
                      onRegenerate={() => {}}
                      onCopywriting={() => {}}
                    />
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
            <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
          </ScrollArea>
          
          {/* 输入区 */}
          <div className="px-6 py-4 border-t">
            <HybridInput
              value=""
              onChange={() => {}}
              onSend={() => handleSend()}
              onFileUpload={handleFileUpload}
              onLinkSubmit={handleLinkSubmit}
              disabled={isLoading}
              placeholder="输入消息或拖拽文件..."
            />
          </div>
        </div>
        
        {/* 右侧功能区 */}
        <div className="w-80 border-l bg-muted/30">
          <RightSidebar
            creationOptions={creationOptions}
            onCreationOptionsChange={setCreationOptions}
          />
        </div>
      </div>
    </DashboardLayout>
  );
}

===== src/app/agent/create/page.tsx =====
'use client';

import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { streamAgentRequest, SSEEvent, apiRequest } from '@/lib/api';
import { DashboardLayout } from '@/components/layout/DashboardLayout';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { 
  Sparkles, 
  Loader2, 
  Download, 
  Share2, 
  RefreshCw, 
  Layers, 
  Eye,
  Plus,
  Settings2,
  MessageSquare,
  Bell,
  X,
  ExternalLink,
  Terminal,
  Bug,
  Save,
  Trash2,
  Play,
  Maximize2
} from 'lucide-react';

// 新组件
import { MessageBubble, MessageBubbleProps, MessageGroup } from '@/components/agent/MessageBubble';
