 * - get_video_tasks: 获取视频任务列表
 * - get_financial_overview: 获取财务概览
 * 
 * 请求格式：
 * {
 *   "action": "操作名称",
 *   "data": { 操作相关参数 }
 * }
 */

// 可分配的角色
const ASSIGNABLE_ROLES = [
  { value: 'material_member', label: '素材团队工作人员', description: '基础操作权限，个人素材历史' },
  { value: 'material_leader', label: '素材业务负责人', description: '团队管理，查看所有素材历史' },
  { value: 'finance', label: '财务', description: '查看财务数据，导出账单，管理发票' },
] as const;

type Action = 
  | 'approve_user' 
  | 'reject_user' 
  | 'get_pending_users' 
  | 'get_system_status' 
  | 'get_video_tasks' 
  | 'get_financial_overview';

interface CommandRequest {
  action: Action;
  data?: Record<string, unknown>;
}

/**
 * 验证 API 密钥
 */
function validateApiKey(request: NextRequest): boolean {
  const apiKey = request.headers.get('Authorization')?.replace('Bearer ', '');
  const validKey = process.env.AGENT_API_KEY || 'hmh-agent-2024';
  return apiKey === validKey;
}

/**
 * 审核通过用户
 */
async function approveUser(data: { user_id: string; role: string }) {
  const { user_id, role } = data;
  
  if (!user_id) {
    return { success: false, message: '缺少用户ID' };
  }
  
  const validRoles = ASSIGNABLE_ROLES.map(r => r.value);
  if (!role || !validRoles.includes(role)) {
    return { 
      success: false, 
      message: `角色无效，可选值：${validRoles.join(', ')}` 
    };
  }
  
  const client = getSupabaseClient();
  
  // 查询用户
  const { data: user, error: userError } = await client
    .from('users')
    .select('id, username, status, display_name')
    .eq('id', user_id)
    .single();
  
  if (userError || !user) {
    return { success: false, message: '用户不存在' };
  }
  
  if (user.status !== 'pending') {
    return { success: false, message: `用户状态不是待审核（当前：${user.status}）` };
  }
  
  // 更新用户状态
  const { error: updateError } = await client
    .from('users')
    .update({
      status: 'active',
      role: role,
      updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    })
    .eq('id', user_id);
  
  if (updateError) {
    console.error('更新用户状态失败:', updateError);
    return { success: false, message: '审核失败，请稍后重试' };
  }
  
  // 记录操作日志
  await client.from('operation_logs').insert({
    user_id,
    action: 'user_approved',
    details: { role, approved_by: 'agent_api' },
  });
  
  const roleLabel = ASSIGNABLE_ROLES.find(r => r.value === role)?.label || role;
  
  return {
    success: true,
    message: `用户 ${user.display_name || user.username} 审核通过，已分配角色：${roleLabel}`,
    data: {
      user_id,
      username: user.username,
      display_name: user.display_name,
      role: roleLabel,
    }
  };
}

/**
 * 拒绝用户
 */
async function rejectUser(data: { user_id: string }) {
  const { user_id } = data;
  
  if (!user_id) {
    return { success: false, message: '缺少用户ID' };
  }
  
  const client = getSupabaseClient();
  
  // 查询用户
  const { data: user, error: userError } = await client
    .from('users')
    .select('id, username, status, display_name')
    .eq('id', user_id)
    .single();
  
  if (userError || !user) {
    return { success: false, message: '用户不存在' };
  }
  
  if (user.status !== 'pending') {
    return { success: false, message: `用户状态不是待审核（当前：${user.status}）` };
  }
  
  // 更新用户状态
  const { error: updateError } = await client
    .from('users')
    .update({
      status: 'disabled',
      updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    })
    .eq('id', user_id);
  
  if (updateError) {
    console.error('更新用户状态失败:', updateError);
    return { success: false, message: '操作失败，请稍后重试' };
  }
  
  // 记录操作日志
  await client.from('operation_logs').insert({
    user_id,
    action: 'user_rejected',
    details: { rejected_by: 'agent_api' },
  });
  
  return {
    success: true,
    message: `用户 ${user.display_name || user.username} 的注册申请已拒绝`,
    data: {
      user_id,
      username: user.username,
    }
  };
}

/**
 * 获取待审核用户列表
 */
async function getPendingUsers() {
  const client = getSupabaseClient();
  
  const { data: users, error } = await client
    .from('users')
    .select('id, username, display_name, created_at')
    .eq('status', 'pending')
    .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
  
  if (error) {
    console.error('查询待审核用户失败:', error);
    return { success: false, message: '查询失败' };
  }
  
  return {
    success: true,
    message: `当前有 ${users?.length || 0} 个待审核用户`,
    data: {
      users: users || [],
      assignable_roles: ASSIGNABLE_ROLES,
    }
  };
}

/**
 * 获取系统状态
 */
async function getSystemStatus() {
  const client = getSupabaseClient();
  
  // 获取用户统计
  const { count: totalUsers } = await client
    .from('users')
    .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true });
  
  const { count: activeUsers } = await client
    .from('users')
    .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true })
    .eq('status', 'active');
  
  const { count: pendingUsers } = await client
    .from('users')
    .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true })
    .eq('status', 'pending');
  
  // 获取视频统计
  const { count: totalVideos } = await client
    .from('videos')
    .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true });
  
  const { count: processingVideos } = await client
    .from('videos')
    .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true })
    .eq('status', 'processing');
  
  return {
    success: true,
    message: '系统运行正常',
    data: {
      users: {
        total: totalUsers || 0,
        active: activeUsers || 0,
        pending: pendingUsers || 0,
      },
      videos: {
        total: totalVideos || 0,
        processing: processingVideos || 0,
      },
      server_time: new Date().toISOString(),
    }
  };
}

/**
 * 获取视频任务列表
 */
async function getVideoTasks(data: { status?: string; limit?: number }) {
  const { status, limit = 10 } = data || {};
  const client = getSupabaseClient();
  
  let query = client
    .from('videos')
    .select('task_id, user_id, prompt, status, created_at, video_url')
    .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    .limit(limit);
  
  if (status) {
    query = query.eq('status', status);
  }
  
  const { data: videos, error } = await query;
  
  if (error) {
    console.error('查询视频任务失败:', error);
    return { success: false, message: '查询失败' };
  }
  
  return {
    success: true,
    message: `获取到 ${videos?.length || 0} 个视频任务`,
    data: {
      videos: videos || [],
    }
  };
}

/**
 * 获取财务概览
 */
async function getFinancialOverview() {
  const client = getSupabaseClient();
  
  // 获取今日统计
  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
  const { data: todayStats } = await client
    .from('daily_stats')
    .select('*')
    .eq('date', today)
    .single();
  
  // 获取账单统计
  const { data: billingStats } = await client
    .from('billing')
    .select('task_type, amount')
    .gte('created_at', today);
  
  const taskTypeAmounts: Record<string, number> = {};
  billingStats?.forEach(b => {
    taskTypeAmounts[b.task_type] = (taskTypeAmounts[b.task_type] || 0) + (b.amount || 0);
  });
  
  return {
    success: true,
    message: '财务数据获取成功',
    data: {
      today: todayStats || { date: today },
      task_type_amounts: taskTypeAmounts,
    }
  };
}

/**
 * 处理 POST 请求
 */
export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    // 验证 API 密钥
    if (!validateApiKey(request)) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { success: false, message: '无效的访问密钥' },
        { status: 401 }
      );
    }
    
    const body: CommandRequest = await request.json();
    const { action, data = {} } = body;
    
    console.log(`[智能体API] 收到指令: ${action}`, data);
    
    // 路由到对应的处理函数
    let result;
    
    switch (action) {
      case 'approve_user':
        result = await approveUser(data as { user_id: string; role: string });
        break;
      
      case 'reject_user':
        result = await rejectUser(data as { user_id: string });
        break;
      
      case 'get_pending_users':
        result = await getPendingUsers();
        break;
      
      case 'get_system_status':
        result = await getSystemStatus();
        break;
      
      case 'get_video_tasks':
        result = await getVideoTasks(data as { status?: string; limit?: number });
        break;
      
      case 'get_financial_overview':
        result = await getFinancialOverview();
        break;
      
      default:
        result = { 
          success: false, 
          message: `未知操作: ${action}。支持的操作：approve_user, reject_user, get_pending_users, get_system_status, get_video_tasks, get_financial_overview` 
        };
    }
    
    console.log(`[智能体API] 响应:`, result.message);
    
    return NextResponse.json(result);
    
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[智能体API] 错误:', error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { success: false, message: '服务器内部错误' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

/**
 * 处理 GET 请求 - 返回 API 说明
 */
export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  // 验证 API 密钥
  if (!validateApiKey(request)) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { success: false, message: '无效的访问密钥' },
      { status: 401 }
    );
  }
  
  return NextResponse.json({
    success: true,
    message: '海盟会智能体指令 API',
    version: '1.0.0',
    supported_actions: [
      {
        action: 'approve_user',
        description: '审核通过用户',
        params: { user_id: '用户ID', role: '角色 (material_member/material_leader/finance)' }
      },
      {
        action: 'reject_user',
        description: '拒绝用户注册',
        params: { user_id: '用户ID' }
      },
      {
        action: 'get_pending_users',
        description: '获取待审核用户列表',
        params: {}
      },
      {
        action: 'get_system_status',
        description: '获取系统状态',
        params: {}
      },
      {
        action: 'get_video_tasks',
        description: '获取视频任务列表',
        params: { status: '状态过滤 (可选)', limit: '数量限制 (默认10)' }
      },
      {
        action: 'get_financial_overview',
        description: '获取财务概览',
        params: {}
      },
    ],
    assignable_roles: ASSIGNABLE_ROLES,
  });
}

===== src/app/api/agent/compare/route.ts =====
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
import { createDualLayerService, type TaskType } from '@/lib/dual-layer-service';

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your-secret-key-change-in-production';

/**
 * 双层能力系统 - 对比模式API
 * 
 * POST /api/agent/compare
 * 
 * 请求体:
 * - action: 'execute' | 'record_choice'
 * - taskType: 'script_generation' | 'video_analysis' | 'prompt_optimization' | 'creative_suggestion'
 * - userInput: 用户输入
 * - style?: 风格要求
 * - productInfo?: 商品信息
 * 
 * 记录选择:
 * - action: 'record_choice'
 * - recordId: 记录ID
 * - choice: 'master' | 'agent' | 'both' | 'neither'
 */

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    // 验证用户身份
    const authHeader = request.headers.get('authorization');
    if (!authHeader?.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: '未登录' }, { status: 401 });
    }

    const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET) as { userId: string; username: string };

    const body = await request.json();
    const { action } = body;

    // 获取请求头（用于SDK调用）
    const headers: Record<string, string> = {};
    request.headers.forEach((value, key) => {
      if (key.toLowerCase().startsWith('x-') || key.toLowerCase() === 'authorization') {
        headers[key] = value;
      }
    });

    const service = createDualLayerService(headers);

    if (action === 'record_choice') {
      // 记录用户选择
      return await handleRecordChoice(service, body, decoded.userId);
    } else {
      // 执行任务
      return await handleExecute(service, body, decoded.userId);
    }

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[对比模式API] 错误:', error);
    
    if (error instanceof jwt.JsonWebTokenError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: '登录已过期' }, { status: 401 });
    }
    
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '执行失败' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

/**
 * 执行任务
 */
async function handleExecute(
  service: ReturnType<typeof createDualLayerService>,
  body: {
    taskType: string;
    userInput: string;
    style?: string;
    productInfo?: string;
  },
  userId: string
) {
  const { taskType, userInput, style, productInfo } = body;

  if (!taskType || !userInput) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: '缺少必要参数' }, { status: 400 });
  }

  // 任务类型映射
  const taskTypeMap: Record<string, TaskType> = {
    script_generation: { type: 'script_generation', name: '脚本创作', description: '创作视频分镜脚本' },
    video_analysis: { type: 'video_analysis', name: '视频分析', description: '分析视频内容' },
    prompt_optimization: { type: 'prompt_optimization', name: 'Prompt优化', description: '优化视频生成提示词' },
    creative_suggestion: { type: 'creative_suggestion', name: '创意建议', description: '提供创意建议' },
  };

  const task = taskTypeMap[taskType];
  if (!task) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: '不支持的任务类型' }, { status: 400 });
  }

  console.log(`[对比模式API] 执行任务: ${taskType}, 用户: ${userId}`);

  // 执行任务
  const result = await service.executeTask(userId, task, userInput, { style, productInfo });

  // 根据模式返回不同结果
  if (result.mode === 'compare') {
    // 对比模式：返回两个版本
    const compareResult = result.result as {
      masterOutput: unknown;
      masterContext: unknown;
      agentOutput: unknown;
      agentContext: unknown;
    };
    return NextResponse.json({
      mode: 'compare',
      profile: result.profile,
      master: {
        output: compareResult.masterOutput,
        context: compareResult.masterContext,
      },
      agent: {
        output: compareResult.agentOutput,
        context: compareResult.agentContext,
      },
      message: '请选择更好的版本，帮助智能体学习成长',
    });
  } else if (result.mode === 'learning') {
    // 学习模式：只返回大模型输出
    return NextResponse.json({
      mode: 'learning',
      profile: result.profile,
      master: {
        output: result.result,
        context: '标准输出（学习中）',
      },
      message: '智能体正在学习阶段，观察大师的输出',
    });
  } else {
    // 独立模式：只返回智能体输出
    return NextResponse.json({
      mode: 'independent',
      profile: result.profile,
      agent: {
        output: result.result,
        context: '智能体独立输出',
      },
      message: '智能体已成长，可以独立完成任务',
    });
  }
}

/**
 * 记录用户选择
 */
async function handleRecordChoice(
  service: ReturnType<typeof createDualLayerService>,
  body: {
    recordId: string;
    choice: 'master' | 'agent' | 'both' | 'neither';
    taskType: string;
    masterOutput?: string;
    agentOutput?: string;
  },
  userId: string
) {
  const { recordId, choice, taskType, masterOutput, agentOutput } = body;

  if (!choice || !taskType) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: '缺少必要参数' }, { status: 400 });
  }

  console.log(`[对比模式API] 记录选择: ${choice}, 任务: ${taskType}`);

  const result = await service.recordUserChoice(
    userId,
    recordId || `choice_${Date.now()}`,
    choice,
    taskType,
    masterOutput || '',
    agentOutput || ''
  );

  return NextResponse.json({
    success: true,
    newProfile: result.newProfile,
    message: choice === 'agent' 
      ? '智能体进步了！继续加油！' 
      : choice === 'master' 
        ? '智能体会继续学习大师的输出' 
        : '感谢反馈，智能体会继续努力',
  });
}

/**
 * 获取能力档案
 */
export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const authHeader = request.headers.get('authorization');
    if (!authHeader?.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: '未登录' }, { status: 401 });
    }

    const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET) as { userId: string };

    const headers: Record<string, string> = {};
    request.headers.forEach((value, key) => {
      if (key.toLowerCase().startsWith('x-') || key.toLowerCase() === 'authorization') {
        headers[key] = value;
      }
    });

    const service = createDualLayerService(headers);
    const profile = await service.getAbilityProfile(decoded.userId);

    return NextResponse.json({ profile });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[对比模式API] 获取档案错误:', error);
    
    if (error instanceof jwt.JsonWebTokenError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: '登录已过期' }, { status: 401 });
    }
    
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '获取失败' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

===== src/app/api/agent/finance/route.ts =====
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { LLMClient, Config, HeaderUtils, Message } from 'coze-coding-dev-sdk';
import { createBillingClient, BillDetailItem, BalanceInfo, CouponInfo, ResourcePackage, BudgetInfo } from '@/lib/volcengine-client';
import { getUserFromRequest } from '@/lib/auth';

// 财务智能体系统提示词
const FINANCE_AGENT_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `你是海盟会的财务智能体助手，专门帮助用户查询和管理火山引擎财务相关信息。

## 你的能力
你可以帮助用户：
1. **账单查询**：查询账单明细、账单总览、按产品分类的账单等
2. **余额查询**：查询账户余额、代金券余额等
3. **订单管理**：查询订单列表、订单详情等
4. **代金券管理**：查询代金券列表、核销记录等
5. **资源包管理**：查询资源包列表、使用明细等
6. **预算管理**：查询预算列表、预算详情等
7. **费用分析**：帮助用户分析费用趋势、优化成本

## 响应格式
当用户请求查询财务数据时，你需要：
1. 理解用户意图
2. 以JSON格式返回需要调用的API和参数，格式如下：
\`\`\`json
{
  "action": "api_call",
  "api": "API名称",
  "params": { 参数对象 }
}
\`\`\`

可用的API包括：
- listBillDetail: 查询账单明细
- listBill: 查询账单列表
- listBillOverviewByCategory: 按账号汇总查询账单总览
- listBillOverviewByProd: 按产品汇总查询账单总览
- queryBalanceAcct: 查询账户余额
- listOrders: 查询订单列表
- getOrder: 查询订单详情
- listCoupons: 查询代金券列表
- listCouponUsageRecords: 查询代金券核销记录
- listResourcePackages: 查询资源包列表
- listPackageUsageDetails: 查询资源包使用明细
- listBudget: 查询预算列表
- queryBudgetDetail: 查询预算详情
- listCostAnalysis: 查询费用分析数据

## 注意事项
- 如果用户没有指定时间范围，默认查询当月数据
- 金额单位默认为元（CNY）
- 如果需要用户提供更多信息（如订单号、预算ID等），请友好地询问
- 如果API返回错误，请友好地告知用户并建议可能的解决方案

## 示例对话

用户: "查询本月账单"
助手: 我将为您查询本月账单明细。
\`\`\`json
{
  "action": "api_call",
  "api": "listBillDetail",
  "params": {
    "BillPeriod": "2024-01"
  }
}
\`\`\`

用户: "查看账户余额"
助手: 我来为您查询账户余额信息。
\`\`\`json
{
  "action": "api_call",
  "api": "queryBalanceAcct",
  "params": {}
}
\`\`\`

用户: "我有哪些代金券？"
助手: 我来为您查询可用的代金券。
\`\`\`json
{
  "action": "api_call",
  "api": "listCoupons",
  "params": {
    "Status": "Available"
  }
}
\`\`\`
`;

// 请求体格式
interface FinanceRequest {
  action?: string;
  data?: {
    message: string;
    history?: Array<{ role: 'user' | 'assistant'; content: string }>;
  };
  message?: string;
  history?: Array<{ role: 'user' | 'assistant'; content: string }>;
}

interface ApiCallRequest {
  action: 'api_call';
  api: string;
  params: Record<string, unknown>;
}

// 检查文本中是否包含API调用JSON
function extractApiCall(text: string): ApiCallRequest | null {
  const jsonMatch = text.match(/```json\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*```/);
  if (jsonMatch) {
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[1]);
      if (parsed.action === 'api_call' && parsed.api) {
        return parsed;
      }
    } catch {
      // 忽略解析错误
    }
  }
  return null;
}

// 执行API调用
async function executeApiCall(api: string, params: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<unknown> {
  const client = createBillingClient();
  if (!client) {
    return { error: '财务API未配置，请联系管理员配置火山引擎凭证' };
  }

  try {
    switch (api) {
      case 'listBillDetail':
        return await client.listBillDetail(params as Parameters<typeof client.listBillDetail>[0]);
      case 'listBill':
        return await client.listBill(params as Parameters<typeof client.listBill>[0]);
      case 'listBillOverviewByCategory':
        return await client.listBillOverviewByCategory(params as Parameters<typeof client.listBillOverviewByCategory>[0]);
      case 'listBillOverviewByProd':
        return await client.listBillOverviewByProd(params as Parameters<typeof client.listBillOverviewByProd>[0]);
      case 'queryBalanceAcct':
        return await client.queryBalanceAcct();
      case 'listOrders':
        return await client.listOrders(params as Parameters<typeof client.listOrders>[0]);
      case 'getOrder':
        return await client.getOrder(params as Parameters<typeof client.getOrder>[0]);
      case 'listCoupons':
        return await client.listCoupons(params as Parameters<typeof client.listCoupons>[0]);
      case 'listCouponUsageRecords':
        return await client.listCouponUsageRecords(params as Parameters<typeof client.listCouponUsageRecords>[0]);
      case 'listResourcePackages':
        return await client.listResourcePackages(params as Parameters<typeof client.listResourcePackages>[0]);
      case 'listPackageUsageDetails':
        return await client.listPackageUsageDetails(params as Parameters<typeof client.listPackageUsageDetails>[0]);
      case 'listBudget':
        return await client.listBudget(params as Parameters<typeof client.listBudget>[0]);
      case 'queryBudgetDetail':
        return await client.queryBudgetDetail(params as Parameters<typeof client.queryBudgetDetail>[0]);
      case 'listCostAnalysis':
        return await client.listCostAnalysis(params as Parameters<typeof client.listCostAnalysis>[0]);
      default:
        return { error: `未知的API: ${api}` };
    }
  } catch (error) {
    return { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'API调用失败' };
  }
}

// 格式化API结果为用户友好的文本
function formatApiResult(api: string, result: unknown): string {
  if (!result || typeof result !== 'object') {
    return '查询结果为空';
  }

  if ('error' in result) {
    return `查询失败：${result.error}`;
  }

  switch (api) {
    case 'queryBalanceAcct': {
      // 火山引擎实际返回的字段格式
      const balance = result as {
        AccountID?: number;
        ArrearsBalance?: string;
        AvailableBalance?: string;
        CashBalance?: string;
        CreditLimit?: string;
        FreezeAmount?: string;
      };
      
      const availableBalance = parseFloat(balance.AvailableBalance || '0');
      const cashBalance = parseFloat(balance.CashBalance || '0');
      const creditLimit = parseFloat(balance.CreditLimit || '0');
      const freezeAmount = parseFloat(balance.FreezeAmount || '0');
      const arrearsBalance = parseFloat(balance.ArrearsBalance || '0');
      
      return `📊 **账户余额信息**

💰 可用余额：¥${availableBalance.toFixed(2)}
💵 现金余额：¥${cashBalance.toFixed(2)}
💳 信用额度：¥${creditLimit.toFixed(2)}
❄️ 冻结金额：¥${freezeAmount.toFixed(2)}
⚠️ 欠款余额：¥${arrearsBalance.toFixed(2)}
`;
    }

    case 'listBillDetail':
    case 'listBill': {
      const bill = result as { TotalCount?: number; Items?: BillDetailItem[] };
      if (!bill.Items || bill.Items.length === 0) {
        return '暂无账单数据';
      }
      
      let text = `📋 **账单明细** (共 ${bill.TotalCount || 0} 条)\n\n`;
      bill.Items.slice(0, 5).forEach((item, index) => {
        const price = (item.RealTotalPrice || 0) / 100;
        text += `${index + 1}. **${item.ProductZh || item.Product || '未知产品'}**\n`;
        text += `   - 实例：${item.InstanceName || item.InstanceId || '-'}\n`;
        text += `   - 金额：¥${price.toFixed(2)}\n`;
        text += `   - 时间：${item.BillDay || '-'}\n\n`;
      });
      
      if ((bill.TotalCount || 0) > 5) {
        text += `... 还有 ${(bill.TotalCount || 0) - 5} 条记录\n`;
      }
      return text;
    }

    case 'listCoupons': {
      const coupons = result as { TotalCount?: number; Coupons?: CouponInfo[] };
      if (!coupons.Coupons || coupons.Coupons.length === 0) {
        return '暂无可用代金券';
      }
      
      let text = `🎟️ **代金券列表** (共 ${coupons.TotalCount || 0} 张)\n\n`;
      coupons.Coupons.forEach((coupon, index) => {
        const faceValue = (coupon.FaceValue || 0) / 100;
        const balance = (coupon.Balance || 0) / 100;
        text += `${index + 1}. **${coupon.CouponName || '代金券'}**\n`;
        text += `   - 面值：¥${faceValue.toFixed(2)}\n`;
        text += `   - 余额：¥${balance.toFixed(2)}\n`;
        text += `   - 有效期：${coupon.EffectiveStartTime || '-'} ~ ${coupon.EffectiveEndTime || '-'}\n`;
        text += `   - 状态：${coupon.StatusZh || coupon.Status || '-'}\n\n`;
      });
      return text;
    }

    case 'listResourcePackages': {
      const packages = result as { TotalCount?: number; Packages?: ResourcePackage[] };
      if (!packages.Packages || packages.Packages.length === 0) {
        return '暂无资源包';
      }
      
      let text = `📦 **资源包列表** (共 ${packages.TotalCount || 0} 个)\n\n`;
      packages.Packages.forEach((pkg, index) => {
        text += `${index + 1}. **${pkg.PackageName || '资源包'}**\n`;
        text += `   - 类型：${pkg.ProductZh || pkg.Product || '-'} - ${pkg.PackageTypeZh || pkg.PackageType || '-'}\n`;
        text += `   - 总量：${pkg.TotalCapacity || 0} ${pkg.Unit || ''}\n`;
        text += `   - 已用：${pkg.UsedCapacity || 0} ${pkg.Unit || ''}\n`;
        text += `   - 剩余：${pkg.RemainingCapacity || 0} ${pkg.Unit || ''}\n`;
        text += `   - 状态：${pkg.StatusZh || pkg.Status || '-'}\n\n`;
      });
      return text;
    }

    case 'listBudget': {
      const budgets = result as { TotalCount?: number; Budgets?: BudgetInfo[] };
      if (!budgets.Budgets || budgets.Budgets.length === 0) {
        return '暂无预算设置';
      }
      
      let text = `📊 **预算列表** (共 ${budgets.TotalCount || 0} 个)\n\n`;
      budgets.Budgets.forEach((budget, index) => {
        const budgetAmount = (budget.BudgetAmount || 0) / 100;
        const actualSpend = (budget.ActualSpend || 0) / 100;
        text += `${index + 1}. **${budget.BudgetName || '预算'}**\n`;
        text += `   - 类型：${budget.BudgetTypeZh || budget.BudgetType || '-'}\n`;
        text += `   - 周期：${budget.BudgetPeriodZh || budget.BudgetPeriod || '-'}\n`;
        text += `   - 预算金额：¥${budgetAmount.toFixed(2)}\n`;
        text += `   - 实际支出：¥${actualSpend.toFixed(2)}\n`;
        text += `   - 状态：${budget.StatusZh || budget.Status || '-'}\n\n`;
      });
      return text;
    }

    default:
      return JSON.stringify(result, null, 2);
  }
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    // 权限检查：只有超级管理员可以访问
    const user = getUserFromRequest(request);
    if (!user) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: '未登录或登录已过期' },
        { status: 401 }
      );
    }
    
    if (user.role !== 'super_admin') {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: '权限不足，财务助手仅对超级管理员开放' },
        { status: 403 }
      );
    }
    
    const body: FinanceRequest = await request.json();
    
    // 兼容两种请求格式
    const userMessage = body.data?.message || body.message;
    const history = body.data?.history || body.history || [];

    if (!userMessage) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: '消息不能为空' }, { status: 400 });
    }

    // 检查是否配置了火山引擎凭证
    const hasCredentials = process.env.VOLCENGINE_ACCESS_KEY_ID && process.env.VOLCENGINE_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY;
    if (!hasCredentials) {
      // 演示模式
      const demoResponse = `您好！我是海盟会的财务智能体助手。

⚠️ **当前为演示模式**

火山引擎财务API尚未配置，请联系管理员配置以下环境变量：
- \`VOLCENGINE_ACCESS_KEY_ID\`：访问密钥ID
- \`VOLCENGINE_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY\`：访问密钥

配置完成后，我可以帮您：
1. 📋 查询账单明细和账单总览
2. 💰 查询账户余额
3. 🎟️ 查询代金券列表
4. 📦 查询资源包使用情况
5. 📊 查询预算管理
6. 📈 费用分析和成本优化建议

请问有什么可以帮您的？`;

      // 返回SSE格式的流式响应
      const stream = new ReadableStream({
        async start(controller) {
          const encoder = new TextEncoder();
          
          for (const char of demoResponse) {
            // SSE格式: data: {"content":"x"}\n\n
            const sseData = `data: ${JSON.stringify({ content: char })}\n\n`;
            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(sseData));
            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 10));
          }
          
          // 发送完成信号
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ done: true })}\n\n`));
          controller.close();
        }
      });

      return new Response(stream, {
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'text/event-stream',
          'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
          'Connection': 'keep-alive'
        }
      });
    }

    // 创建LLM客户端
    const customHeaders = HeaderUtils.extractForwardHeaders(request.headers);
    const config = new Config();
    const llmClient = new LLMClient(config, customHeaders);

    // 构建消息历史
    const messages: Message[] = [
      { role: 'system', content: FINANCE_AGENT_SYSTEM_PROMPT },
      ...history.map(m => ({
        role: m.role as 'user' | 'assistant',
        content: m.content
      })),
      { role: 'user', content: userMessage }
    ];

    // 创建SSE格式的流式响应
    const stream = new ReadableStream({
      async start(controller) {
        const encoder = new TextEncoder();
        let fullResponse = '';

        try {
          const llmStream = llmClient.stream(messages);

          for await (const chunk of llmStream) {
            const content = chunk.content;
            if (typeof content === 'string' && content) {
              fullResponse += content;
              // SSE格式: data: {"content":"x"}\n\n
              const sseData = `data: ${JSON.stringify({ content })}\n\n`;
              controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(sseData));
            }
          }

          // 检查是否有API调用
          const apiCall = extractApiCall(fullResponse);
          if (apiCall) {
            const result = await executeApiCall(apiCall.api, apiCall.params);
            const formattedResult = formatApiResult(apiCall.api, result);
            
            // 发送API调用结果
            for (const char of formattedResult) {
              const sseData = `data: ${JSON.stringify({ content: char })}\n\n`;
              controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(sseData));
              await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 5));
            }
          }

          // 发送完成信号
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ done: true })}\n\n`));
          controller.close();
        } catch (error) {
          console.error('Finance agent error:', error);
          const errorMessage = '\n\n抱歉，处理您的请求时出现错误，请稍后重试。';
          for (const char of errorMessage) {
            const sseData = `data: ${JSON.stringify({ content: char })}\n\n`;
            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(sseData));
          }
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ done: true })}\n\n`));
          controller.close();
        }
      }
    });

    return new Response(stream, {
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'text/event-stream',
        'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
        'Connection': 'keep-alive'
      }
    });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Finance agent API error:', error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '服务器内部错误' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

===== src/app/api/agent/permission/route.ts =====
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { getSupabaseClient } from '@/storage/database/supabase-client';
import { LLMClient, Config, HeaderUtils } from 'coze-coding-dev-sdk';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your-secret-key-change-in-production';

/**
 * 权限智能体 API
 * POST /api/agent/permission
 * 
 * 功能：处理用户权限申请、审批流程、角色分配等
 * 飞书集成：发送通知消息到飞书群
 */
export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const authHeader = request.headers.get('authorization');
    if (!authHeader?.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: '未登录' }, { status: 401 });
    }

    const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET) as {
      userId: string;
      username: string;
      role: string;
    };

    const body = await request.json();
    const { action, data } = body;

    const client = getSupabaseClient();

    switch (action) {
      case 'apply_role': {
        // 申请角色升级
        const { target_role, reason } = data;

        if (!target_role || !reason) {
          return NextResponse.json({ error: '缺少必要参数' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        // 获取用户信息
        const { data: user, error: userError } = await client
          .from('users')
          .select('*')
          .eq('user_id', decoded.userId)
          .single();

        if (userError || !user) {
          return NextResponse.json({ error: '用户不存在' }, { status: 404 });
        }

        // 记录操作日志
        await client.from('operation_logs').insert({
          user_id: decoded.userId,
          operation_type: 'role_apply',
          operation_detail: {
            current_role: user.role,
            target_role,
            reason,
          },
        });

        // TODO: 发送飞书通知
        // 这里可以集成飞书开放平台 API
        // 示例：await sendFeishuNotification(...)

        return NextResponse.json({
          success: true,
          message: '申请已提交，请等待管理员审批',
          application: {
            user_id: decoded.userId,
            username: decoded.username,
            current_role: user.role,
            target_role,
            reason,
            status: 'pending',
            created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
          },
        });
      }

      case 'approve_role': {
        // 审批角色申请（仅管理员）
        if (!['super_admin', 'admin'].includes(decoded.role)) {
          return NextResponse.json({ error: '无权限' }, { status: 403 });
        }

        const { user_id, approved } = data;

        if (!user_id || approved === undefined) {
          return NextResponse.json({ error: '缺少必要参数' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        // 获取申请记录
        const { data: logs, error: logError } = await client
          .from('operation_logs')
          .select('*')
          .eq('user_id', user_id)
          .eq('operation_type', 'role_apply')
          .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
          .limit(1);

        if (logError || !logs || logs.length === 0) {
          return NextResponse.json({ error: '申请记录不存在' }, { status: 404 });
        }

        const application = logs[0];
        const detail = application.operation_detail as { target_role: string };

        if (approved) {
          // 更新用户角色
          const { error: updateError } = await client
            .from('users')
            .update({ role: detail.target_role })
            .eq('user_id', user_id);

          if (updateError) {
            throw new Error(`更新失败: ${updateError.message}`);
          }
        }

        // 更新申请状态
        await client
          .from('operation_logs')
          .update({
            operation_detail: {
              ...detail,
              status: approved ? 'approved' : 'rejected',
              approved_by: decoded.userId,
              approved_at: new Date().toISOString(),
            },
          })
          .eq('log_id', application.log_id);

        return NextResponse.json({
          success: true,
          message: approved ? '审批通过' : '审批拒绝',
        });
      }

      case 'query_permissions': {
        // 查询权限申请记录
        const { user_id } = data;
        const queryUserId = user_id || decoded.userId;

        // 非管理员只能查看自己的申请
        if (!['super_admin', 'admin'].includes(decoded.role) && queryUserId !== decoded.userId) {
          return NextResponse.json({ error: '无权限' }, { status: 403 });
        }

        const { data: logs, error } = await client
          .from('operation_logs')
          .select('*')
          .eq('user_id', queryUserId)
          .eq('operation_type', 'role_apply')
          .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
          .limit(10);

        if (error) {
          throw new Error(`查询失败: ${error.message}`);
        }

        return NextResponse.json({ applications: logs });
      }

      case 'chat': {
        // 权限咨询对话
        const { message } = data;

        if (!message) {
          return NextResponse.json({ error: '消息不能为空' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        const customHeaders = HeaderUtils.extractForwardHeaders(request.headers);
        const config = new Config();
        const llmClient = new LLMClient(config, customHeaders);

        const messages = [
          {
            role: 'system' as const,
            content: `你是海盟会的权限管理助手，专注于用户权限和账号管理。

你的职责：
1. 解答用户关于权限和角色的疑问
2. 引导用户申请合适的角色
3. 解释平台权限体系

角色体系：
- super_admin: 超级管理员，拥有所有权限
- admin: 管理员，可管理用户和查看所有数据
- finance: 财务，可查看账单和发票
- member: 普通成员，可生成视频和管理自己的数据

回答风格：
- 简洁明了
- 主动引导用户进行操作
- 提供具体的申请步骤`,
          },
          { role: 'user' as const, content: message },
        ];

        const stream = llmClient.stream(messages, {
          model: 'doubao-seed-1-6-lite-251015',
          temperature: 0.5,
        });

        const encoder = new TextEncoder();
        const readableStream = new ReadableStream({
          async start(controller) {
            try {
              for await (const chunk of stream) {
                if (chunk.content) {
                  const event = `data: ${JSON.stringify({ content: chunk.content.toString() })}\n\n`;
                  controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(event));
                }
              }
              controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ done: true })}\n\n`));
              controller.close();
            } catch (error) {
              console.error('流式输出错误:', error);
              controller.close();
            }
          },
        });

        return new Response(readableStream, {
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'text/event-stream',
            'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
            'Connection': 'keep-alive',
          },
        });
      }

      default:
        return NextResponse.json({ error: '未知操作' }, { status: 400 });
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('权限智能体错误:', error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '操作失败' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

===== src/app/api/analyze-design/route.ts =====
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { LLMClient, Config } from "coze-coding-dev-sdk";
import fs from "fs";
import path from "path";

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { imagePath } = await request.json();
    
    // 读取图片文件
    const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'public', imagePath);
    const imageBuffer = fs.readFileSync(fullPath);
    const base64Image = imageBuffer.toString("base64");
    const dataUri = `data:image/png;base64,${base64Image}`;

    const config = new Config();
    const client = new LLMClient(config);

    const messages = [
      {
        role: "user",
        content: [
          {
            type: "text",
            text: `请详细分析这张UI设计图，从以下维度进行描述：

1. **整体布局结构**
   - 页面的分栏方式（左右/上下分栏比例）
   - 主要区域划分和功能定位
   - 元素的空间分布

2. **视觉层次与重点**
   - 页面的第一视觉焦点在哪里
   - 主要内容和次要内容的区分方式
   - 视觉引导路径

3. **核心UI元素**
   - 卡片样式（圆角大小、阴影效果、背景色）
   - 按钮样式（形状、颜色、大小）
   - 输入框样式
   - 图标使用方式

4. **配色方案**
   - 主色调和辅助色
   - 背景色和前景色搭配
   - 强调色的使用位置

5. **交互设计**
   - 用户操作流程
   - 关键交互元素的位置
   - 状态提示方式

请用结构化的方式输出，方便开发实现。`,
          },
          {
            type: "image_url",
            image_url: {
              url: dataUri,
              detail: "high",
            },
          },
        ],
      },
    ];

    const response = await client.invoke(messages, {
      model: "doubao-seed-1-6-vision-250815",
      temperature: 0.3,
    });

    return NextResponse.json({ analysis: response.content });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("分析设计图片失败:", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "分析失败" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

===== src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts =====
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { getSupabaseClient } from '@/storage/database/supabase-client';
import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your-secret-key-change-in-production';

/**
 * 用户登录
 * POST /api/auth/login
 */
export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { username, password } = await request.json();

    if (!username || !password) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: '用户名和密码不能为空' },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const client = getSupabaseClient();

    // 查询用户
    const { data: user, error: userError } = await client
      .from('users')
      .select('*')
      .eq('username', username)
      .single();

    if (userError || !user) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: '用户名或密码错误' },
        { status: 401 }
      );
    }

    // 检查用户状态
    if (user.status === 'pending') {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: '账号正在审核中，请等待管理员批准' },
        { status: 403 }
      );
    }

    if (user.status === 'disabled') {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: '账号已被禁用' },
        { status: 403 }
      );
    }

    // 验证密码
    const isValidPassword = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);
    if (!isValidPassword) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: '用户名或密码错误' },
        { status: 401 }
      );
    }

    // 生成 JWT token
    const token = jwt.sign(
      { 
        userId: user.id, 
        username: user.username, 
        role: user.role 
      },
      JWT_SECRET,
      { expiresIn: '7d' }
    );

    // 记录登录日志
    await client.from('operation_logs').insert({
      user_id: user.id,
      action: 'login',
      ip_address: request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for') || request.headers.get('x-real-ip') || 'unknown',
      details: { method: 'password' },
    });

    return NextResponse.json({
      token,
      user: {
        user_id: user.id,
        username: user.username,
        email: user.email,
        role: user.role,
        status: user.status,
        display_name: user.display_name,
        avatar_url: user.avatar_url,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('登录错误:', error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '登录失败' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

===== src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts =====
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { getSupabaseClient } from '@/storage/database/supabase-client';
import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';
import { sendRegisterApprovalNotification } from '@/lib/feishu-webhook';

/**
 * 用户注册
 * POST /api/auth/register
 * 
 * 注册成功后自动创建用户存储路径
 * 非首个用户需要管理员审核
 */
export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { username, password, email } = await request.json();

    if (!username || !password) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: '用户名和密码不能为空' },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    if (password.length < 6) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: '密码至少需要6位' },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const client = getSupabaseClient();

    // 检查用户名是否已存在
    const { data: existingUser, error: checkError } = await client
      .from('users')
      .select('id, status')
      .eq('username', username)
      .maybeSingle();

    if (checkError) {
      throw new Error(`检查用户失败: ${checkError.message}`);
    }

    if (existingUser) {
      // 如果用户已存在且状态为 pending，提示审核中
      if (existingUser.status === 'pending') {
        return NextResponse.json(
          { error: '该用户注册申请审核中，请稍后', pending: true },
          { status: 400 }
        );
      }
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: '用户名已存在' },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    // 检查是否是第一个用户
    const { count: userCount, error: countError } = await client
      .from('users')
      .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true });

    if (countError) {
      throw new Error(`检查用户数量失败: ${countError.message}`);
    }

    const isFirstUser = userCount === 0;
    const role = isFirstUser ? 'super_admin' : 'material_member';
    const status = isFirstUser ? 'active' : 'pending';

    // 加密密码
    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);

    // 生成用户存储路径
    // 使用时间戳 + 随机字符串确保唯一性
    const timestamp = Date.now();
    const randomSuffix = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8);
    const storagePath = `users/${timestamp}_${randomSuffix}`;

    // 创建用户
    const { data: user, error: insertError } = await client
      .from('users')
      .insert({
        username,
        password_hash: passwordHash,
        email: email || null,
        role,
        status,
        storage_path: storagePath,
        storage_quota: 10737418240, // 10GB
        storage_used: 0,
      })
      .select('id, username, email, role, status, storage_path, created_at')
      .single();

    if (insertError) {
      throw new Error(`创建用户失败: ${insertError.message}`);
    }

    console.log(`[Register] 用户 ${username} 注册成功，存储路径: ${storagePath}`);

    // 非首个用户发送飞书审核通知
    if (!isFirstUser) {
      // 异步发送通知，不阻塞注册流程
      sendRegisterApprovalNotification({
        username: user.username,
        user_id: user.id,
        registered_at: new Date(user.created_at).toLocaleString('zh-CN'),
      }).catch(err => {
        console.error('发送飞书审核通知失败:', err);
      });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: isFirstUser ? '注册成功，您是第一个用户，已自动成为超级管理员' : '注册成功，等待管理员审核',
      user,
      needApproval: !isFirstUser,
      storage: {
        path: storagePath,
        quota: '10GB',
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('注册错误:', error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '注册失败' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

===== src/app/api/billing/export/route.ts =====
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { getSupabaseClient } from '@/storage/database/supabase-client';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your-secret-key-change-in-production';

/**
 * 导出账单明细为 CSV
 * GET /api/billing/export
 * 
 * 需要权限：super_admin 或 finance
 */
export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const authHeader = request.headers.get('authorization');
    if (!authHeader?.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: '未登录' }, { status: 401 });
    }

    const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET) as { userId: string; role: string };

    // 权限检查
    if (!['super_admin', 'finance'].includes(decoded.role)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: '无权访问' }, { status: 403 });
    }

    const client = getSupabaseClient();

    // 获取账单数据
    const { data: bills, error } = await client
      .from('billing')
      .select(`
        id,
        user_id,
        video_id,
        amount,
        task_type,
        description,
        created_at,
        users!inner(username)
      `)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
      .limit(1000);

    if (error) {
      throw new Error(`查询失败: ${error.message}`);
    }

    // 生成 CSV 内容
    const headers = ['账单ID', '用户名', '任务类型', '金额(元)', '描述', '创建时间'];
    const csvRows = [headers.join(',')];

    for (const bill of bills || []) {
      // 处理 Supabase 返回的 users 字段（可能是对象或数组）
      let username = '-';
      if (bill.users) {
        if (Array.isArray(bill.users)) {
          username = bill.users[0]?.username || '-';
        } else if (typeof bill.users === 'object') {
          username = (bill.users as { username: string }).username || '-';
        }
      }
      
      const row = [
        bill.id,
        username,
        bill.task_type || '-',
        parseFloat(bill.amount || '0').toFixed(2),
        `"${(bill.description || '').replace(/"/g, '""')}"`, // 转义引号
        new Date(bill.created_at).toLocaleString('zh-CN'),
      ];
      csvRows.push(row.join(','));
    }

    const csvContent = csvRows.join('\n');

    // 添加 BOM 以支持中文
    const bom = '\uFEFF';
    const csvWithBom = bom + csvContent;

    return new NextResponse(csvWithBom, {
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8',
        'Content-Disposition': `attachment; filename="billing-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.csv"`,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('导出账单失败:', error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '导出失败' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

===== src/app/api/billing/route.ts =====
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { getSupabaseClient } from '@/storage/database/supabase-client';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your-secret-key-change-in-production';

/**
 * 账单查询 API
 * GET /api/billing?page=1&pageSize=20
 */
export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const authHeader = request.headers.get('authorization');
    if (!authHeader?.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: '未登录' }, { status: 401 });
    }

    const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET) as { userId: string; role: string };

    const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
    const page = parseInt(searchParams.get('page') || '1');
    const pageSize = parseInt(searchParams.get('pageSize') || '20');
    const userId = searchParams.get('userId'); // 管理员可查看所有用户

    const client = getSupabaseClient();
    
    // 判断权限：管理员可查看所有，普通用户只能查看自己
    const isAdmin = ['super_admin', 'admin', 'finance'].includes(decoded.role);

    // 构建查询
    let query = client
      .from('billing')
      .select('*', { count: 'exact' });

    // 非管理员只能查看自己的账单
    if (!isAdmin) {
      query = query.eq('user_id', decoded.userId);
    }

    // 查询账单
    const { data, error, count } = await query
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
      .range((page - 1) * pageSize, page * pageSize - 1);

    if (error) {
      throw new Error(`查询失败: ${error.message}`);
    }

    // 获取用户名（如果有用户ID）
    let billsWithUsername = data || [];
    if (isAdmin && data && data.length > 0) {
      const userIds = [...new Set(data.map(b => b.user_id))];
      const { data: users } = await client
        .from('users')
        .select('id, username')
        .in('id', userIds);
      
      const userMap = new Map(users?.map(u => [u.id, u.username]) || []);
      billsWithUsername = data.map(b => ({
        ...b,
        users: { username: userMap.get(b.user_id) || '未知' }
      }));
    }

    // 计算总金额
    let totalAmount = 0;
    if (isAdmin) {
      const { data: totalData } = await client
        .from('billing')
        .select('amount');
      totalAmount = totalData?.reduce((sum, item) => sum + parseFloat(item.amount || '0'), 0) || 0;
    } else {
      const { data: totalData } = await client
        .from('billing')
        .select('amount')
        .eq('user_id', decoded.userId);
      totalAmount = totalData?.reduce((sum, item) => sum + parseFloat(item.amount || '0'), 0) || 0;
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      bills: billsWithUsername,
      total: count,
      totalAmount,
      page,
      pageSize,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('查询账单错误:', error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '查询失败' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

===== src/app/api/cleanup/conversation-history/route.ts =====
/**
 * 双笔记本系统：清理 24 小时前的对话历史
 * 
 * POST /api/cleanup/conversation-history
 * 
 * 用于定时任务调用，每小时执行一次
 */

import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { getSupabaseClient } from '@/storage/database/supabase-client';

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    console.log('🧹 [清理任务] 开始执行...');

    const supabase = getSupabaseClient();
    
    // 计算 24 小时前的时间
    const cutoffTime = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
    
    console.log(`🧹 [清理任务] 清理 ${cutoffTime.toISOString()} 之前的记录`);

    // 执行删除
    const { count, error } = await supabase
      .from('agent_conversation_messages')
      .delete()
      .lt('created_at', cutoffTime.toISOString())
      .select('count'); // 获取删除的记录数

    if (error) {
      console.error('🧹 [清理任务] 删除失败:', error);
      return Response.json({
        success: false,
        error: error.message
      }, { status: 500 });
    }

    const deletedCount = count || 0;
    console.log(`🧹 [清理任务] 成功删除 ${deletedCount} 条记录`);

    return Response.json({
      success: true,
      data: {
        deleted_count: deletedCount,
        cutoff_time: cutoffTime.toISOString()
      }
    });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('🧹 [清理任务] 异常:', error);
    return Response.json({
      success: false,
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '清理失败'
    }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

/**
 * GET /api/cleanup/conversation-history
 * 
 * 查询当前有多少 24 小时前的记录待清理
 */
export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const supabase = getSupabaseClient();
    
    const cutoffTime = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
    
    const { count, error } = await supabase
      .from('agent_conversation_messages')
      .select('count', { count: 'exact' })
      .lt('created_at', cutoffTime.toISOString());

    if (error) {
      return Response.json({
        success: false,
        error: error.message
      }, { status: 500 });
    }

    return Response.json({
      success: true,
      data: {
        pending_count: count || 0,
        cutoff_time: cutoffTime.toISOString()
      }
    });

  } catch (error) {
    return Response.json({
      success: false,
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '查询失败'
    }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
===== src/app/api/creative-agent/chat/route.ts =====
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { LLMClient, Config, HeaderUtils } from 'coze-coding-dev-sdk';
import { creativeAgentService, WorkflowType } from '@/lib/creative-agent-service';
import { getSupabaseClient } from '@/storage/database/supabase-client';
import { createVideoLearningService } from '@/lib/video-learning-service';
import { createAgentLearningService } from '@/lib/agent-learning-service';
import { agentMemoryService } from '@/lib/agent-memory-service';
import { VideoLinkParser, PLATFORM_CONFIG, VideoPlatform } from '@/lib/video-link-parser';
import { LearningLibraryStorage } from '@/lib/tos-storage';
import { createCreativeWorkflowService } from '@/lib/creative-workflow-service';
import { verifyToken } from '@/lib/auth';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your-secret-key-change-in-production';

/**
 * 检测消息中的视频链接并解析
 */
function extractVideoLinks(text: string): string[] {
  const patterns = [
    // 抖音
    /https?:\/\/v\.douyin\.com\/[A-Za-z0-9]+/g,
    /https?:\/\/www\.douyin\.com\/video\/\d+/g,
    // 快手
    /https?:\/\/v\.kuaishou\.com\/[A-Za-z0-9]+/g,
    /https?:\/\/www\.kuaishou\.com\/short-video\/[A-Za-z0-9]+/g,
    // B站
    /https?:\/\/www\.bilibili\.com\/video\/BV[A-Za-z0-9]+/g,
    /https?:\/\/b23\.tv\/[A-Za-z0-9]+/g,
    // 小红书
    /https?:\/\/www\.xiaohongshu\.com\/discovery\/item\/[A-Za-z0-9]+/g,
    /https?:\/\/xhslink\.com\/[A-Za-z0-9]+/g,
    // 微博
    /https?:\/\/weibo\.com\/\d+\/[A-Za-z0-9]+/g,
    /https?:\/\/m\.weibo\.cn\/status\/\d+/g,
  ];
  
  const links: string[] = [];
  for (const pattern of patterns) {
    const matches = text.match(pattern);
    if (matches) {
      links.push(...matches);
    }
  }
  
  return [...new Set(links)]; // 去重
}

/**
 * 视频链接解析结果
 */
interface VideoLinkResult {
  link: string;
  platform: VideoPlatform;
  platformName: string;
  info: {
    title: string;
    author?: string;
    duration?: number;
    videoId?: string;
    likes?: number;
    description?: string;
    cover?: string;
  };
  addedToLibrary: boolean;
  learningId?: string;
  error?: string;
}

/**
 * 解析视频链接并自动保存到学习库
 */
async function parseAndSaveVideoLinks(
  links: string[],
  userId: string,
  headers: Record<string, string>
): Promise<VideoLinkResult[]> {
  const results: VideoLinkResult[] = [];
  const client = getSupabaseClient();
  
  for (const link of links) {
    try {
      const platform = VideoLinkParser.detectPlatform(link);
      const platformName = PLATFORM_CONFIG[platform]?.name || '未知平台';
      const info = await VideoLinkParser.parse(link);
      
      const result: VideoLinkResult = {
        link,
        platform,
        platformName,
        info: {
          title: info.title,
          author: info.author,
          duration: info.duration,
          videoId: info.videoId,
          likes: info.likes,
          description: info.description,
          cover: info.cover,
        },
        addedToLibrary: false,
      };
      
      // 如果有视频URL，下载并保存到学习库
      if (info.videoUrl) {
        try {
          console.log(`[创意小海] 下载视频到学习库: ${link}`);
          
          // 下载视频
          const videoResponse = await fetch(info.videoUrl, {
            headers: {
              'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 14_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15',
              'Referer': link,
            },
          });
          
          if (videoResponse.ok) {
            const arrayBuffer = await videoResponse.arrayBuffer();
            const buffer = Buffer.from(arrayBuffer);
            const fileSize = buffer.length;
            
            // 上传到学习库
            const fileName = `${platform}_${info.videoId}.mp4`;
            const fileKey = await LearningLibraryStorage.uploadLearningVideo(
              userId,
              buffer,
              fileName,
              'video/mp4'
            );
            
            // 生成访问URL
            const storedUrl = await LearningLibraryStorage.getLearningVideoUrl(fileKey, 24 * 60 * 60);
            
            // 创建学习记录
            const { data: learning, error: insertError } = await client
              .from('learning_library')
              .insert({
                user_id: userId,
                video_name: info.title,
                video_key: fileKey,
                video_url: storedUrl,
                video_size: fileSize,
                video_duration: info.duration,
                analysis_status: 'pending',
                scene_analysis: {
                  source: platform,
                  sourceName: platformName,
                  author: info.author,
                  authorId: info.authorId,
                  videoId: info.videoId,
                  originalUrl: link,
                  cover: info.cover,
                  likes: info.likes,
                  comments: info.comments,
                  shares: info.shares,
                  tags: info.tags,
                },
              })
              .select()
              .single();
            
            if (!insertError && learning) {
              result.addedToLibrary = true;
              result.learningId = learning.id;
              
              // 异步启动分析
              setTimeout(() => {
                startLearningAnalysis(learning.id, storedUrl, info.title, headers);
              }, 1000);
              
              console.log(`[创意小海] 视频已添加到学习库: ${info.title}`);
            }
          }
        } catch (downloadError) {
          console.error(`[创意小海] 下载视频失败:`, downloadError);
          result.error = downloadError instanceof Error ? downloadError.message : '下载失败';
        }
      } else {
        result.error = '无法获取视频下载地址';
      }
      
      results.push(result);
    } catch (error) {
      results.push({
        link,
        platform: 'other',
        platformName: '未知平台',
        info: { title: link },
        addedToLibrary: false,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '解析失败',
      });
    }
  }
  
  return results;
}

/**
 * 格式化视频链接解析结果为文本
 */
function formatVideoLinkResults(results: VideoLinkResult[]): string {
  return results.map(r => {
    const lines = [
      `## ${r.platformName}视频解析结果`,
      `- 链接: ${r.link}`,
      `- 平台: ${r.platformName}`,
      `- 标题: ${r.info.title}`,
    ];
    
    if (r.info.author) lines.push(`- 作者: ${r.info.author}`);
    if (r.info.duration) lines.push(`- 时长: ${r.info.duration}秒`);
    if (r.info.videoId) lines.push(`- 视频ID: ${r.info.videoId}`);
    if (r.info.likes) lines.push(`- 点赞: ${r.info.likes}`);
    
    if (r.addedToLibrary) {
      lines.push(``);
      lines.push(`✅ **已自动添加到学习库**，系统将在后台分析视频风格、镜头、色彩等元素。`);
      lines.push(`后续对话中，创意小海会参考这个视频的创作技巧。`);
    } else if (r.error) {
      lines.push(``);
      lines.push(`⚠️ 未能自动下载: ${r.error}`);
      lines.push(`你可以手动下载后上传到学习库。`);
    }
    
    lines.push(``);
    lines.push(`用户可以要求你基于这个视频进行风格分析、模仿创作或提取元素。`);
    
    return lines.join('\n');
  }).join('\n\n');
}

/**
 * 异步执行学习库视频分析（增强版）
 */
async function startLearningAnalysis(
  learningId: string,
  videoUrl: string,
  videoName: string,
  headers: Record<string, string>
) {
  const client = getSupabaseClient();
  const videoLearningService = createVideoLearningService(headers);
  
  try {
    await client
      .from('learning_library')
      .update({ analysis_progress: 10 })
      .eq('id', learningId);

    // 使用增强版视频分析（包含帧提取和视觉分析）
    const result = await videoLearningService.analyzeVideo(videoUrl, videoName, headers);

    await client
      .from('learning_library')
      .update({ analysis_progress: 80 })
      .eq('id', learningId);

    await videoLearningService.saveAnalysisResult(learningId, result);

    // 同时保存到长期记忆（增强版）
    const { data: learningData } = await client
      .from('learning_library')
      .select('user_id')
      .eq('id', learningId)
      .single();

    if (learningData?.user_id) {
      await client
        .from('creative_memories')
        .insert({
          user_id: learningData.user_id,
          memory_type: 'video_reference',
          title: `视频学习: ${videoName}`,
          summary: result.summary,
          content: JSON.stringify({
            style: result.videoStyle,
            theme: result.videoTheme,
            sceneAnalysis: result.sceneAnalysis,
            cameraAnalysis: result.cameraAnalysis,
            keyLearnings: result.keyLearnings,
            colorAnalysis: result.colorAnalysis,
            videoType: result.videoType,
          }),
          source_type: 'learning_library',
          keywords: result.styleKeywords,
          embedding: result.videoEmbedding ? JSON.stringify(result.videoEmbedding) : null,
          importance_score: 0.8,
        });
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('学习库视频分析失败:', error);
    await client
      .from('learning_library')
      .update({
        analysis_status: 'failed',
        analysis_error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '分析失败',
      })
      .eq('id', learningId);
  }
}

/**
 * 获取用户的对话历史记忆
 */
async function getConversationHistory(userId: string, limit: number = 20): Promise<Array<{ role: string; content: string }>> {
  try {
    const client = getSupabaseClient();
    const { data: conversations, error } = await client
      .from('agent_conversations')
      .select('message, response, created_at, status')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .eq('agent_type', 'creative')
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
      .limit(limit);
    
    if (error || !conversations) {
      console.error('[对话历史] 查询失败:', error);
      return [];
    }
    
    // 转换为对话历史格式（倒序变正序）
    const history: Array<{ role: string; content: string }> = [];
    const reversedConvos = conversations.reverse();
    
    for (const conv of reversedConvos) {
      // 用户消息（如果有）
      if (conv.message && conv.message.trim()) {
        history.push({ role: 'user', content: conv.message });
      }
      // 助手回复（如果有）
      if (conv.response && conv.response.trim()) {
        history.push({ role: 'assistant', content: conv.response });
      }
    }
    
    console.log(`[对话历史] 加载成功: ${history.length} 条消息`);
    return history;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('获取对话历史失败:', error);
    return [];
  }
}

/**
 * 保存对话到数据库
 */
async function saveConversation(
  userId: string,
  message: string,
  response: string
): Promise<void> {
  try {
    const client = getSupabaseClient();
    await client
      .from('agent_conversations')
      .insert({
        user_id: userId,
        agent_type: 'creative',
        message,
        response,
        status: 'completed',
      });
    
    // 同时保存到长期记忆（提取重要信息）
    if (response.length > 50) {
      // 如果是脚本创作，保存用户偏好
      if (message.includes('生成') || message.includes('创作') || message.includes('制作')) {
        await agentMemoryService.recordPreference('creative', userId, 'recent_creation', message);
      }
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('保存对话失败:', error);
  }
}

/**
 * 获取用户的相关记忆（语义搜索版）
 */
async function getRelevantMemories(userId: string, query: string, headers: Record<string, string>): Promise<string> {
  const contextParts: string[] = [];
  
  try {
    // 1. 使用智能体学习服务进行语义搜索
    const agentLearningService = createAgentLearningService(headers);
    const learningContext = await agentLearningService.getLearningContext(userId, query);
    
    if (learningContext) {
      contextParts.push(learningContext);
    }
    
    // 2. 使用视频学习服务进行语义搜索
    const videoLearningService = createVideoLearningService(headers);
    const videoResults = await videoLearningService.semanticSearch(userId, query, 3);
    
    if (videoResults.length > 0) {
      const videoContext = videoResults
        .map((v, i) => `${i + 1}. 《${v.videoName}》(${v.style})\n   相似度: ${(v.score * 100).toFixed(0)}%\n   摘要: ${v.summary.slice(0, 100)}...`)
        .join('\n\n');
      
      contextParts.push(`\n## 学习库中的相关视频\n${videoContext}`);
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.warn('语义搜索失败，回退到关键词搜索:', error);
    
    // 回退到关键词搜索
    const client = getSupabaseClient();
    const keywords = query
      .replace(/[，。！？；：""''【】（）《》、\n\r\t]/g, ' ')
      .split(/\s+/)
      .filter(word => word.length >= 2)
      .slice(0, 5);
    
    if (keywords.length > 0) {
      // 从长期记忆中检索
      const { data: memories, error: memError } = await client
        .from('creative_memories')
        .select('title, summary, keywords')
        .eq('user_id', userId)
        .or(keywords.map(kw => `title.ilike.%${kw}%,summary.ilike.%${kw}%`).join(','))
        .order('importance_score', { ascending: false })
        .limit(3);
      
      if (!memError && memories && memories.length > 0) {
        const memoryContext = memories
          .map((m, i) => `${i + 1}. ${m.title}: ${m.summary}`)
          .join('\n');
        contextParts.push(`\n## 用户的相关记忆（从之前学习的文档中检索）\n${memoryContext}`);
      }
      
      // 从学习库中检索相关视频参考
      const videoLearningService = createVideoLearningService(headers);
      const references = await videoLearningService.getRelevantReferences(userId, query);
      if (references.length > 0) {
        const learningContext = references
          .map((ref, i) => `${i + 1}. ${ref.videoName}: ${ref.summary}`)
          .join('\n');
        contextParts.push(`\n## 学习库中的相关视频参考\n${learningContext}`);
      }
    }
  }
  
  return contextParts.join('\n');
}

/**
 * 创意小海 - 智能对话 API（流式输出）
 * POST /api/creative-agent/chat
 * 
 * 集成工作流服务，支持8阶段状态机
 */
export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const authHeader = request.headers.get('authorization');
    if (!authHeader?.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: '未登录' }, { status: 401 });
    }

    const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET) as { userId: string; username: string; role: string };

    const body = await request.json();
    const { message, context, action, attachments } = body;

    if (!message && !action && (!attachments || attachments.length === 0)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: '消息或操作不能为空' }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const customHeaders = HeaderUtils.extractForwardHeaders(request.headers);

    // ===== 使用工作流服务处理 =====
    // 检查是否有视频附件需要特殊处理
    const hasVideoAttachment = attachments?.some((a: { type: string }) => a.type === 'video');
    
    console.log('[创意小海] 请求参数:', {
      messageLength: message?.length,
      hasVideoAttachment,
      attachmentsCount: attachments?.length,
      attachments: attachments?.map((a: { type: string; url: string }) => ({ type: a.type, url: a.url })),
    });
    
    // 先检查是否有活动工作流
    const workflowService = createCreativeWorkflowService(customHeaders);
    let workflow = await workflowService.getActiveWorkflow(decoded.userId);
    
    // 判断是否应该使用工作流服务
    const shouldUseWorkflow = hasVideoAttachment || 
                              message?.length > 20 || 
                              workflow != null; // 如果有活动工作流，优先使用工作流服务
    
    if (shouldUseWorkflow) {
      // 使用工作流服务
      console.log('[创意小海] 使用工作流服务处理请求');
      
      // 获取或创建活动工作流
      if (!workflow) {
        console.log('[创意小海] 创建新工作流');
        workflow = await workflowService.createWorkflow(decoded.userId);
      }
      
      console.log(`[创意小海] 当前工作流阶段: ${workflow.current_stage}`);
      
      // 处理用户输入
      const result = await workflowService.processUserInput(
        workflow.id,
        decoded.userId,
        message || '',
        attachments
      );
      
      console.log(`[创意小海] 处理结果: 阶段=${result.stage}, 需要操作=${result.requiresAction}`);
      
      // 创建流式响应
      const encoder = new TextEncoder();
      const stream = new ReadableStream({
        async start(controller) {
          // 发送响应内容
          const responseLines = result.response.split('\n');
          for (const line of responseLines) {
            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ content: line + '\n' })}\n\n`));
            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 20)); // 模拟打字效果
          }
          
          // 如果有脚本，发送特殊操作
          if (result.script) {
            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ 
              action: 'create_script', 
              data: result.script 
            })}\n\n`));
          }
          
          // 如果有对比结果，发送特殊操作
          if (result.compareResult) {
            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ 
              action: 'compare_result', 
              data: result.compareResult 
            })}\n\n`));
          }
          
          controller.close();
        }
      });
      
      return new Response(stream, {
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'text/event-stream',
          'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
          'Connection': 'keep-alive',
        },
      });
    }

    // ===== 原有逻辑：简单对话 =====
    // 处理附件中的视频
    let attachmentContext = '';
    if (attachments && attachments.length > 0) {
      console.log(`[创意小海] 收到 ${attachments.length} 个附件:`, JSON.stringify(attachments));
      
      const videoAttachments = attachments.filter((a: { type: string; url: string }) => a.type === 'video');
      
      if (videoAttachments.length > 0) {
        console.log(`[创意小海] 处理 ${videoAttachments.length} 个视频附件`);
        
        for (const video of videoAttachments) {
          // 视频URL是已上传到TOS的真实URL
          if (video.url.startsWith('http')) {
            attachmentContext += `\n## 用户上传的视频\n`;
            attachmentContext += `- 视频地址: ${video.url}\n`;
            attachmentContext += `- 用户希望基于这个视频进行创作或分析\n`;
            attachmentContext += `\n你可以：\n`;
            attachmentContext += `1. 分析视频风格并提供创作建议\n`;
            attachmentContext += `2. 根据视频风格生成类似的脚本\n`;
            attachmentContext += `3. 建议如何模仿或改进这个视频\n`;
            console.log(`[创意小海] 添加视频上下文: ${video.url}`);
          } else {
            console.log(`[创意小海] 视频URL无效: ${video.url}`);
          }
        }
      }
    }

    // 检测并解析视频链接，自动保存到学习库
    let videoLinkContext = '';
    const videoLinks = extractVideoLinks(message || '');
    if (videoLinks.length > 0) {
      const linkResults = await parseAndSaveVideoLinks(videoLinks, decoded.userId, customHeaders);
      videoLinkContext = formatVideoLinkResults(linkResults);
    }

    // 处理特定操作
    if (action) {
      return await handleAction(action, body, customHeaders);
    }

    // 获取用户的相关记忆（使用语义搜索）
    const memoryContext = await getRelevantMemories(decoded.userId, message || '', customHeaders);

    // 获取可用风格
    const styles = creativeAgentService.getAvailableStyles();
    const styleList = styles.map(s => `- ${s.name}: ${s.description}`).join('\n');

    // 构建系统提示词
    const systemPrompt = `你是创意小海，海盟会的智能视频创作助手。

## 你的身份
- 名字：创意小海
- 定位：专业的短视频创作智能体
- 专长：抖音信息流视频、直播引流视频、短视频脚本创作

## 视频生成能力（Seedance 2.0）
- 文字生成视频：5-15秒，支持多种比例（16:9、9:16、1:1）
- 图片生成视频：首帧控制、尾帧控制、双帧控制
- 多模态参考：参考图片、参考视频、参考音频
- 视频延长：支持连续延长和自动拼接

## 可用视频风格
${styleList}

${memoryContext ? `\n## 用户的记忆知识\n${memoryContext}` : ''}
${videoLinkContext ? `\n## 当前对话中的视频链接解析\n${videoLinkContext}` : ''}
${attachmentContext ? `\n## 用户上传的视频附件\n${attachmentContext}` : ''}

## 工具清单
你可以使用以下工具来自主完成任务：

1. **analyze_video** - 分析视频内容，提取风格、镜头、色调等元素
2. **generate_script** - 生成视频脚本
3. **generate_video** - 使用 Seedance 2.0 生成视频
4. **save_workflow_progress** - 保存工作进度
5. **get_workflow_progress** - 获取工作进度
6. **record_user_feedback** - 记录用户反馈
7. **search_learning_library** - 搜索学习库中的参考视频
8. **rule_get_all** - 获取创作规则
9. **apply_learning** - 应用学习结果
10. **health_check** - 健康检查

## 工作原则
- **自主决策**：你可以自主决定是否调用工具、调用哪些工具
- **按需调用**：只在需要时才调用工具，不需要时不调用
- **直接回答**：简单问题可以直接回答，不需要调用工具
- **工具辅助**：遇到需要生成视频、分析视频等任务时，自主调用相应工具

## 语言规范
- 所有回复使用中文
- 脚本描述、镜头运动、转场效果等全部使用中文
- prompt 字段使用英文（用于 AI 生成）

当前用户: ${decoded.username}

请用专业、友好、有创意的方式与用户交流，帮助他们创作出满意的视频作品！`;

    // 获取用户的对话历史记忆（从数据库加载）
    const dbHistory = await getConversationHistory(decoded.userId, 10);
    
    // 合并前端传入的context和数据库历史（优先使用前端传入的，因为它是最新的）
    // 如果前端没有传context，使用数据库历史
    const conversationHistory = context && context.length > 0 ? context : dbHistory;
    
    // 构建消息历史
    const messages = [
      { role: 'system' as const, content: systemPrompt },
      ...conversationHistory.map((msg: { role: string; content: string }) => ({
        role: msg.role as 'user' | 'assistant',
        content: msg.content,
      })),
      { role: 'user' as const, content: message },
    ];

    // 创建流式响应
    const encoder = new TextEncoder();
    const stream = new ReadableStream({
      async start(controller) {
        try {
          const llmClient = new LLMClient(new Config(), customHeaders);
          const llmStream = llmClient.stream(messages, {
            model: 'doubao-seed-2-0-pro-260215',
            temperature: 0.8,
            reasoning_effort: 'high',
          });

          let fullResponse = '';

          for await (const chunk of llmStream) {
            if (chunk.content) {
              const text = chunk.content.toString();
              fullResponse += text;
              
              // 检查特殊指令并处理
              if (fullResponse.includes('__CREATE_SCRIPT__')) {
                // 移除标记，发送纯文本
                const cleanText = text.replace(/__CREATE_SCRIPT__|__END_SCRIPT__/g, '');
                if (cleanText.trim()) {
                  controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ content: cleanText })}\n\n`));
                }
              } else if (fullResponse.includes('__ANALYZE_VIDEO__')) {
                const cleanText = text.replace(/__ANALYZE_VIDEO__|__END_ANALYZE__/g, '');
                if (cleanText.trim()) {
                  controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ content: cleanText })}\n\n`));
                }
              } else if (fullResponse.includes('__EXECUTE_WORKFLOW__')) {
                const cleanText = text.replace(/__EXECUTE_WORKFLOW__|__END_WORKFLOW__/g, '');
                if (cleanText.trim()) {
                  controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ content: cleanText })}\n\n`));
                }
              } else {
                controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ content: text })}\n\n`));
              }
            }
          }

          // 解析特殊指令
          const scriptMatch = fullResponse.match(/__CREATE_SCRIPT__\n?([\s\S]*?)\n?__END_SCRIPT__/);
          if (scriptMatch) {
            try {
              const scriptData = JSON.parse(scriptMatch[1]);
              controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ action: 'create_script', data: scriptData })}\n\n`));
            } catch {
              // 解析失败
            }
          }

          const analyzeMatch = fullResponse.match(/__ANALYZE_VIDEO__\n?([\s\S]*?)\n?__END_ANALYZE__/);
          if (analyzeMatch) {
            try {
              const analyzeData = JSON.parse(analyzeMatch[1]);
              controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ action: 'analyze_video', data: analyzeData })}\n\n`));
            } catch {
              // 解析失败
            }
          }

          const workflowMatch = fullResponse.match(/__EXECUTE_WORKFLOW__\n?([\s\S]*?)\n?__END_WORKFLOW__/);
          if (workflowMatch) {
            try {
              const workflowData = JSON.parse(workflowMatch[1]);
              controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ action: 'execute_workflow', data: workflowData })}\n\n`));
            } catch {
              // 解析失败
            }
          }

          // 保存对话到数据库（异步执行，不阻塞响应）
          saveConversation(decoded.userId, message, fullResponse).catch(err => {
            console.error('保存对话失败:', err);
          });

          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ done: true })}\n\n`));
          controller.close();
        } catch (error) {
          console.error('流式输出错误:', error);
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ error: '生成回复失败' })}\n\n`));
          controller.close();
        }
      },
    });

    return new Response(stream, {
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'text/event-stream',
        'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
        'Connection': 'keep-alive',
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('创意小海对话错误:', error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '对话失败' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

/**
 * 处理特定操作
 */
async function handleAction(
  action: string,
  body: Record<string, unknown>,
  headers: Record<string, string>
): Promise<NextResponse> {
  switch (action) {
    case 'analyze_video': {
      const videoUrl = body.videoUrl as string;
      if (!videoUrl) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: '缺少视频链接' }, { status: 400 });
      }
      
      const analysis = await creativeAgentService.analyzeVideo(videoUrl, headers);
      return NextResponse.json({ analysis });
    }

    case 'create_script': {
      const { topic, style, duration, platform, referenceUrl, referenceImage } = body as {
        topic: string;
        style?: string;
        duration?: number;
        platform?: 'douyin' | 'kuaishou' | 'shipinhao' | 'bilibili' | 'other';
        referenceUrl?: string;
        referenceImage?: string;
      };
      
      if (!topic) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: '缺少创作主题' }, { status: 400 });
      }

      const script = await creativeAgentService.createScript({
        topic,
        style,
        duration,
        platform,
        referenceUrl,
        referenceImage,
        headers,
      });
      
      return NextResponse.json({ script });
    }

    case 'execute_workflow': {
      const { type, script, options } = body as {
        type: WorkflowType;
        script?: Parameters<typeof creativeAgentService.executeWorkflow>[0]['script'];
        options?: Parameters<typeof creativeAgentService.executeWorkflow>[0]['options'];
      };

      if (!type) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: '缺少工作流类型' }, { status: 400 });
      }

      // 工作流执行是异步的，返回任务ID
      const taskId = crypto.randomUUID();
      
      // 在后台执行工作流
      creativeAgentService.executeWorkflow({
        type,
        script,
        options,
        headers,
        onProgress: (progress, message) => {
          // 可以通过 WebSocket 或轮询通知进度
          console.log(`Workflow ${taskId}: ${progress}% - ${message}`);
        },
      }).then(task => {
        // 保存任务结果
        console.log(`Workflow ${taskId} completed:`, task.status);
      }).catch(error => {
        console.error(`Workflow ${taskId} failed:`, error);
      });

      return NextResponse.json({ 
        taskId, 
        status: 'running',
        message: '工作流已开始执行'
      });
    }

    case 'get_styles': {
      const styles = creativeAgentService.getAvailableStyles();
      return NextResponse.json({ styles });
    }

    case 'parse_douyin': {
      const url = body.url as string;
      if (!url) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: '缺少抖音链接' }, { status: 400 });
      }

      try {
        const videoInfo = await creativeAgentService.parseDouyinUrl(url);
        return NextResponse.json({ videoInfo });
      } catch (error) {
