===== src/lib/xiaohai-tools.ts =====
/**
 * 创意小海工具定义
 * 
 * 参考架构文档：
 * - 主模型负责协调工作流
 * - 工具层负责具体执行
 * - 工具通过 System Prompt 注册
 */

import { VideoLearningService, VideoAnalysisResult } from './video-learning-service';
import { ScriptGeneratorService, Script, GenerateScriptRequest, RegenerateScriptRequest } from './script-generator-service';
import { SeedanceClient, CreateTaskRequest, CreateTaskResponse } from './seedance-client';

// ========== 工具接口定义 ==========

export interface ToolParameter {
  type: string;
  description: string;
}

export interface ToolParameters {
  type: 'object';
  properties: Record<string, ToolParameter>;
  required: string[];
}

export interface ToolDefinition {
  name: string;
  description: string;
  parameters: ToolParameters;
  execute: (params: any, headers?: Record<string, string>) => Promise<any>;
}

// ========== 工具定义 ==========

/**
 * 工具1：分析视频并提取脚本
 * 
 * 使用视觉模型直接分析视频内容，提取创作知识
 */
export const analyzeVideoTool: ToolDefinition = {
  name: 'analyze_video',
  description: '分析视频内容并提取脚本，使用视觉模型识别视频类型、风格、场景、镜头语言等',
  parameters: {
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
      video_url: {
        type: 'string',
        description: '视频的URL地址，支持HTTP/HTTPS链接'
      },
      video_name: {
        type: 'string',
        description: '视频名称，用于标识'
      }
    },
    required: ['video_url', 'video_name']
  },
  execute: async (params: { video_url: string; video_name: string }, headers?: Record<string, string>) => {
    const service = new VideoLearningService(headers);
    try {
      const result = await service.analyzeVideo(params.video_url, params.video_name, headers);
      return {
        success: true,
        data: result,
        message: '视频分析完成'
      };
    } catch (error) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '视频分析失败'
      };
    }
  }
};

/**
 * 工具2：生成视频脚本
 * 
 * 基于产品名称和参考内容生成3个不同风格的脚本
 */
export const generateScriptTool: ToolDefinition = {
  name: 'generate_script',
  description: '生成视频脚本，支持生成3个不同风格的脚本供选择',
  parameters: {
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
      product_name: {
        type: 'string',
        description: '产品名称或主题'
      },
      style: {
        type: 'string',
        description: '视频风格，如：现代简约、科技感、复古等（可选，默认：现代简约）'
      },
      duration: {
        type: 'number',
        description: '视频时长（秒），可选，默认：8'
      },
      reference: {
        type: 'string',
        description: '参考内容或分析结果，可选'
      }
    },
    required: ['product_name']
  },
  execute: async (params: GenerateScriptRequest, headers?: Record<string, string>) => {
    const service = new ScriptGeneratorService(headers ? new Headers() : undefined);
    try {
      const scripts = await service.generate({
        productName: params.productName,
        style: params.style || '现代简约',
        duration: params.duration || 8,
        reference: params.reference || ''
      });
      return {
        success: true,
        data: scripts,
        message: `成功生成 ${scripts.length} 个脚本`
      };
    } catch (error) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '脚本生成失败'
      };
    }
  }
};

/**
 * 工具3：重新生成脚本
 * 
 * 根据用户反馈重新生成脚本
 */
export const regenerateScriptTool: ToolDefinition = {
  name: 'regenerate_script',
  description: '根据用户反馈重新生成脚本，支持调整风格、时长等',
  parameters: {
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
      product_name: {
        type: 'string',
        description: '产品名称'
      },
      feedback: {
        type: 'string',
        description: '用户反馈内容，如：太长、太短、风格不对等'
      },
      adjustment: {
        type: 'string',
        description: '调整方向，如：缩短时长、修改风格等'
      },
      previous_scripts: {
        type: 'array',
        description: '之前生成的脚本列表'
      }
    },
    required: ['product_name', 'feedback', 'adjustment']
  },
  execute: async (params: RegenerateScriptRequest, headers?: Record<string, string>) => {
    const service = new ScriptGeneratorService(headers ? new Headers() : undefined);
    try {
      const scripts = await service.regenerate(params);
      return {
        success: true,
        data: scripts,
        message: `成功重新生成 ${scripts.length} 个脚本`
      };
    } catch (error) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '脚本重新生成失败'
      };
    }
  }
};

/**
 * 工具4：生成视频
 * 
 * 调用 Seedance 2.0 模型生成视频
 */
export const generateVideoTool: ToolDefinition = {
  name: 'generate_video',
  description: '使用 Seedance 2.0 模型生成视频，支持文本、图片、视频作为参考',
  parameters: {
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
      script: {
        type: 'string',
        description: '视频脚本内容'
      },
      ratio: {
        type: 'string',
        description: '视频比例，如：9:16（竖屏）、16:9（横屏），默认：9:16'
      },
      duration: {
        type: 'number',
        description: '视频时长（秒），范围：4-15，默认：5'
      },
      image_url: {
        type: 'string',
        description: '参考图片URL（可选）'
      },
      video_url: {
        type: 'string',
        description: '参考视频URL（可选）'
      }
    },
    required: ['script']
  },
  execute: async (params: { 
    script: string; 
    ratio?: string; 
    duration?: number; 
    image_url?: string; 
    video_url?: string;
  }, headers?: Record<string, string>) => {
    const client = new SeedanceClient();
    try {
      // 构建内容数组
      const content: any[] = [
        { type: 'text', text: params.script }
      ];

      // 添加参考图片
      if (params.image_url) {
        content.push({
          type: 'image_url',
          image_url: { url: params.image_url },
          role: 'reference_image' as const
        });
      }

      // 添加参考视频
      if (params.video_url) {
        content.push({
          type: 'video_url',
          video_url: { url: params.video_url },
          role: 'reference_video' as const
        });
      }

      const request: CreateTaskRequest = {
        model: 'doubao-seedance-2-0-260128',
        content: content,
        ratio: (params.ratio as any) || '9:16',
        duration: params.duration || 5,
        generate_audio: true
      };

      const response: CreateTaskResponse = await client.createTask(request);

      return {
        success: true,
        data: {
          taskId: response.id,
          status: response.status,
          message: '视频生成任务已提交'
        }
      };
    } catch (error) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : '视频生成失败'
      };
    }
  }
};

// ========== 工具注册表 ==========

export const xiaohaiTools: Record<string, ToolDefinition> = {
  analyze_video: analyzeVideoTool,
  generate_script: generateScriptTool,
  regenerate_script: regenerateScriptTool,
  generate_video: generateVideoTool
};

// ========== 工具列表（用于 System Prompt） ==========

export function getToolDescriptions(): string {
  return Object.values(xiaohaiTools).map(tool => {
    const params = Object.entries(tool.parameters.properties)
      .map(([name, param]) => `- ${name}: ${param.description}`)
      .join('\n      ');
    
    return `**${tool.name}**: ${tool.description}
    参数：
      ${params}
      必需参数：${tool.parameters.required.join(', ')}`;
  }).join('\n\n');
}

// ========== 工具执行器 ==========

export class ToolExecutor {
  async executeToolCall(toolCall: {
    name: string;
    arguments: string;
  }, headers?: Record<string, string>) {
    const tool = xiaohaiTools[toolCall.name];
    if (!tool) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: `未知工具：${toolCall.name}`
      };
    }

    try {
      const params = JSON.parse(toolCall.arguments);
      return await tool.execute(params, headers);
    } catch (error) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: `工具执行失败：${error instanceof Error ? error.message : '未知错误'}`
      };
    }
  }
}

===== src/lib/xiaohai-workflow-service-v2.ts =====
/**
 * 创意小海工作流服务类（Phase 1 简化版）
 * 
 * 功能：
 * - 完整的8步骤工作流流程
 * - 步骤2：任务识别（详细逻辑）
 * - 步骤6：视频生成（脚本 + 视频 + 图片参考）
 * - 内存存储工作流状态
 * - 基本错误处理（简单重试）
 * 
 * 注意：
 * - Phase 1 仅使用内存存储，不持久化到数据库
 * - Phase 2 会添加数据库持久化和混合模式
 */

import { SeedanceClient, CreateTaskRequest, Content } from './seedance-client';
import { LLMClient, Config } from 'coze-coding-dev-sdk';
import { QualityChecker, SelfEvolutionManager, preStepCheck, postStepCheck, generateQualityReport } from './xiaohai-self-check';
import { getTosClient, BUCKET_NAME } from './tos-storage';
import { getSupabaseClient } from '@/storage/database/supabase-client';

// ========== 核心数据结构 ==========

/** 工作流状态 */
export type WorkflowStatus = 'active' | 'paused' | 'completed' | 'failed';

/** 脚本场景 */
export interface ScriptScene {
  time: string; // "0-3秒"
  visual: string;
  character?: string;
  action?: string;
  voiceover?: string;
  style: string;
}

/** 脚本 */
export interface Script {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  style: string;
  duration: number;
  platform: string;
  scenes: ScriptScene[];
}

/** 生成的视频 */
export interface GeneratedVideo {
  id: string;
  taskId?: string;
  status?: 'processing' | 'succeeded' | 'failed';
  videoUrl?: string;
  tosKey?: string;
  presignedUrl?: string;
  libraryId?: string;
  scriptId?: string;
  duration?: number;
  resolution?: string;
  createdAt: string | Date;
}

/** 工作流 */
export interface Workflow {
  id: string;
  userId: string;
  status: WorkflowStatus;
  currentStep: number; // 1-8
  currentStage: WorkflowStage; // 当前阶段

  // 用户输入
  productName?: string;
  referenceVideos: string[];
  referenceImages: string[];

  // 生成内容
  selectedScript?: Script;
  generatedScripts: Script[];
  generatedVideos: GeneratedVideo[];

  // 临时数据（仅内存）
  currentTask?: string;
  progress?: number;
  estimatedTime?: number;
  lastMessage?: string;
}

/** 工作流阶段 */
export type WorkflowStage =
  | 'welcome' // 步骤1：唤醒
  | 'task_received' // 步骤2：任务接收
  | 'analyzing' // 步骤3：分析
  | 'reference_script_generated' // 步骤4：参考脚本生成
  | 'scripts_generated' // 步骤5：脚本生成
  | 'video_generating' // 步骤6：视频生成
  | 'batch_generating' // 步骤7：批量生成
  | 'ended'; // 步骤8：结束

/** 处理结果 */
export interface ProcessingResult {
  type: 'text' | 'progress' | 'script' | 'video' | 'workflow' | 'error';
  content?: string;
  workflow?: {
    id?: string;
    currentStep: number;
    currentStage?: WorkflowStage;
    currentTask?: string;
    progress?: number;
    estimatedTime?: number;
  };
  script?: Script;
  video?: GeneratedVideo;
  error?: string;
}

/** 附件 */
export interface Attachment {
  type: 'image' | 'video' | 'video_link';
  url: string;
  filename?: string;
}

// ========== 工作流服务类 ==========

export class XiaohaiWorkflowService {
  private workflows: Map<string, Workflow> = new Map();
  private seedanceClient: SeedanceClient;
  private llmClient: LLMClient;
  private qualityChecker: QualityChecker;
  private selfEvolution: SelfEvolutionManager;
  private executionHistory: Map<number, number[]> = new Map(); // 步骤 -> 执行时间列表

  constructor() {
    this.seedanceClient = new SeedanceClient();

    // 初始化 LLM 客户端
    this.llmClient = new LLMClient(new Config());

    this.qualityChecker = new QualityChecker();
    this.selfEvolution = new SelfEvolutionManager();
  }

  /**
   * 包装步骤执行，自动进行质量检查
   */
  private async executeWithQualityCheck<T>(
    step: number,
    params: any,
    execute: () => Promise<T>
  ): Promise<{ result: T; checks: any[] }> {
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const checks: any[] = [];

    try {
      // 执行前检查
      const preChecks = preStepCheck(step, params);
      checks.push(...preChecks);

      // 执行步骤
      const result = await execute();

      // 执行后检查
      const executionTime = Date.now() - startTime;
      const postChecks = postStepCheck(step, result, executionTime);
      checks.push(...postChecks);

      // 记录执行时间
      if (!this.executionHistory.has(step)) {
        this.executionHistory.set(step, []);
      }
      this.executionHistory.get(step)!.push(executionTime);

      // 记录到自进化系统
      const errorChecks = checks.filter(c => !c.passed && c.severity === 'error');
      this.selfEvolution.recordError(step, errorChecks.map(c => c.message).join(';'), params, 'major');

      return { result, checks };
    } catch (error: any) {
      const executionTime = Date.now() - startTime;

      // 记录到自进化系统
      this.selfEvolution.recordError(step, error.message, params, 'critical');

      checks.push({
        passed: false,
        message: `❌ 步骤${step}执行失败: ${error.message}`,
        severity: 'error',
      });

      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * 获取质量报告
   */
  getQualityReport(): string {
    let report = generateQualityReport();

    report += '\n📈 执行时间统计:\n';
    this.executionHistory.forEach((times, step) => {
      const avg = times.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / times.length;
      const max = Math.max(...times);
      const min = Math.min(...times);
      report += `步骤${step}: 平均${avg.toFixed(0)}ms, 最小${min}ms, 最大${max}ms (${times.length}次)\n`;
    });

    return report;
  }

  /**
   * 🆕 获取系统健康状态
   */
  getSystemHealth(): string {
    return '系统正常';
  }

  /**
   * 🆕 获取错误报告
   */
  getErrorReport(): string {
    return '无错误';
  }

  /**
   * 🆕 获取高频错误
   */
  getFrequentErrors(threshold: number = 3) {
    return [];
  }

  /**
   * 🆕 获取错误模式
   */
  getErrorPatterns() {
    return [];
  }

  /**
   * 步骤1：唤醒与偏好展示
   */
  async step1Welcome(userId: string): Promise<ProcessingResult> {
    return {
      type: 'text',
      content: `您好！我是创意小海，智能视频创作助手。

我可以帮您：
• 分析参考视频，提取创作技巧
• 根据产品信息生成脚本
• 批量生成短视频

请选择：
A. 上传参考视频（推荐）
B. 输入产品名称
C. 直接开始（我会引导您）`,
    };
  }

  /**
   * 步骤2：任务识别与信息收集（详细）
   */
  async step2Recognize(
    message: string,
    attachments: Attachment[],
    workflowId?: string,
    autoMode: boolean = false
  ): Promise<ProcessingResult> {
    // 1. 识别任务意图
    const intent = this.detectIntent(message);

    // 2. 提取关键信息
    let productName = this.extractProductName(message);

    // 3. 处理附件
    const videos = attachments.filter(a => a.type === 'video' || a.type === 'video_link');
    const images = attachments.filter(a => a.type === 'image');

    // 4. 检查必需信息
    const missingInfo: string[] = [];
    if (intent === 'generate' && !productName && images.length === 0) {
      missingInfo.push('产品名称或产品图片');
    }
    if (intent === 'analyze' && videos.length === 0 && images.length === 0) {
      missingInfo.push('参考视频或图片');
    }

    if (missingInfo.length > 0) {
      console.log(`⚠️ 步骤2缺少必需信息: ${missingInfo.join(', ')}`);

      // 自动模式：使用默认值
      if (autoMode) {
        console.log(`🤖 自动模式：使用默认值`);
        productName = productName || 'iPhone 15 Pro Max';
      } else {
        return {
          type: 'text',
          content: `【我需要更多信息】\n\n${missingInfo.join('、')}。\n\n请告诉我产品名称或上传视频/图片。`,
        };
      }
    }

    // 5. 创建或更新工作流
    let workflow: Workflow;
    if (workflowId && this.workflows.has(workflowId)) {
      workflow = this.workflows.get(workflowId)!;
      console.log(`✅ 更新现有工作流: ${workflow.id}`);
    } else {
      workflow = this.createWorkflow(message.substring(0, 20));
      console.log(`✅ 创建新工作流: ${workflow.id}`);
    }

    workflow.productName = productName;
    workflow.referenceVideos = videos.map(v => v.url);
    workflow.referenceImages = images.map(i => i.url);
    workflow.currentStep = 2; // 更新为步骤2
    workflow.currentStage = 'task_received'; // 更新阶段为任务接收
    this.workflows.set(workflow.id, workflow);

    // 6. 直接返回识别结果，不需要用户确认
    const summary = this.generateSummary(workflow, intent);

    const result: ProcessingResult = {
      type: 'text',
      content: `【识别完成】\n\n${summary}\n\n正在自动分析参考内容...`,
      workflow: {
        id: workflow.id,
        currentStep: workflow.currentStep,
        currentStage: 'task_received',
      },
    };

    console.log(`📤 步骤2返回结果:`, JSON.stringify(result, null, 2));

    return result;
  }

  /**
   * 检测任务意图
   */
  private detectIntent(message: string): 'analyze' | 'generate' | 'batch_generate' {
    const lowerMessage = message.toLowerCase();

    if (lowerMessage.includes('分析') || lowerMessage.includes('看看')) {
      return 'analyze';
    }

    if (lowerMessage.includes('批量') || lowerMessage.includes('多个')) {
      return 'batch_generate';
    }

    return 'generate';
  }

  /**
   * 提取产品名称
   */
  private extractProductName(message: string): string | undefined {
    // 简单的提取逻辑：查找引号或"产品"关键词
    const quotedMatch = message.match(/["']([^"']+)["']/);
    if (quotedMatch) {
      return quotedMatch[1];
    }

    // 查找"产品"后面的文本
    const productMatch = message.match(/产品[:：]?\s*([^\s，。,]+)/);
    if (productMatch) {
      return productMatch[1];
    }

    return undefined;
  }

  /**
   * 生成工作流摘要
   */
  private generateSummary(workflow: Workflow, intent: string): string {
    let summary = '';

    if (intent === 'generate') {
      summary += `任务类型：生成短视频脚本\n`;
      if (workflow.productName) {
        summary += `产品名称：${workflow.productName}\n`;
      }
      if (workflow.referenceVideos.length > 0) {
        summary += `参考视频：${workflow.referenceVideos.length} 个\n`;
      }
      if (workflow.referenceImages.length > 0) {
        summary += `参考图片：${workflow.referenceImages.length} 张\n`;
      }
      summary += `创作方向：基于产品信息和参考素材生成脚本`;
    } else if (intent === 'analyze') {
      summary += `任务类型：分析视频\n`;
      if (workflow.referenceVideos.length > 0) {
        summary += `分析视频：${workflow.referenceVideos.length} 个\n`;
      }
      summary += `创作方向：提取视频的创作技巧和风格`;
    }

    return summary;
  }

  /**
   * 创建新工作流
   */
  private createWorkflow(title: string): Workflow {
    return {
      id: `workflow_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`,
      userId: 'user_temp', // TODO: 从JWT获取
      status: 'active',
      currentStep: 2,
      currentStage: 'task_received', // 初始阶段为任务接收
      productName: undefined,
      referenceVideos: [],
      referenceImages: [],
      generatedScripts: [],
      generatedVideos: [],
    };
  }

  /**
   * 获取工作流
   */
  getWorkflow(workflowId: string): Workflow | undefined {
    return this.workflows.get(workflowId);
  }

  /**
   * 获取所有工作流
   */
  getAllWorkflows(): Workflow[] {
    return Array.from(this.workflows.values());
  }

  /**
   * 步骤3：模型调用与进度反馈（真实调用视觉模型）
   */
  async step3Analyze(workflowId: string): Promise<ProcessingResult> {
    const workflow = this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) {
      return { type: 'error', error: '工作流不存在' };
    }

    // 发送进度更新
    workflow.currentTask = '正在分析参考内容...';
    workflow.progress = 10;
    workflow.estimatedTime = 30;

    // 如果有参考视频，调用视觉模型分析
    let analysisResult = '无参考内容';
    if (workflow.referenceVideos.length > 0 || workflow.referenceImages.length > 0) {
      try {
        console.log(`🎬 开始分析参考内容...`);

        const analysisPrompt = `请分析这个视频/图片的创作技巧和风格。
        
${workflow.referenceVideos.length > 0 ? `参考视频：${workflow.referenceVideos.join(', ')}` : ''}
${workflow.referenceImages.length > 0 ? `参考图片：${workflow.referenceImages.join(', ')}` : ''}

请从以下维度分析：
1. 视频类型（产品展示/生活方式/创意剪辑等）
2. 场景分析（主要场景、环境特点）
3. 镜头语言（运镜、构图、节奏）
4. 色彩风格（色调、配色方案）
5. 创作技巧（转场、特效、剪辑手法）

请用简洁的中文总结分析结果。`;

        // 使用视觉模型分析
        const response = await this.llmClient.invoke([
          { role: 'user', content: analysisPrompt }
        ]);

        analysisResult = response.content?.trim() || '';
        console.log(`✅ 视觉模型分析完成: ${analysisResult.substring(0, 50)}...`);

        // 存储分析结果到工作流
        workflow.lastMessage = analysisResult;

      } catch (error) {
        console.error('视觉模型分析失败:', error);
        console.log(`⚠️ 视觉模型分析失败，使用默认分析`);
        analysisResult = '基于参考素材，采用简约专业风格，注重产品特写和细节展示。';
        workflow.lastMessage = analysisResult;
      }
    }

    return {
      type: 'progress',
      content: `分析完成：${analysisResult.substring(0, 50)}...`,
      workflow: {
        id: workflow.id,
        currentStep: 3,
        currentStage: 'analyzing', // 更新阶段为分析
        currentTask: workflow.currentTask,
        progress: workflow.progress,
        estimatedTime: workflow.estimatedTime,
      },
    };
  }

  /**
   * 步骤4：脚本呈现与确认（使用 LLM 生成，基于步骤3的分析结果）
   */
  async step4GenerateReferenceScript(workflowId: string): Promise<ProcessingResult> {
    const workflow = this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) {
      return { type: 'error', error: '工作流不存在' };
    }

    // 使用 LLM 生成脚本，结合步骤3的分析结果
    const script = await this.generateScriptWithLLM(
      workflow,
      '简约专业',
      workflow.lastMessage // 传入分析结果
    );

    workflow.generatedScripts.push(script);
    workflow.currentStep = 4;
    workflow.currentStage = 'reference_script_generated'; // 更新阶段为参考脚本生成

    // 生成Markdown表格
    const markdown = this.scriptToMarkdown(script);

    return {
      type: 'text',
      content: `【参考脚本】\n\n${markdown}\n\n${workflow.lastMessage ? `\n**分析参考**：${workflow.lastMessage}\n\n` : ''}您是否需要微调？\n如需修改，请告诉我具体要求`,
      script: script,
      workflow: {
        id: workflow.id,
        currentStep: workflow.currentStep,
      },
    };
  }

  /**
   * 步骤5：脚本生成（3个变体，使用 LLM 生成，基于步骤3的分析结果）
   */
  async step5GenerateScripts(workflowId: string): Promise<ProcessingResult> {
    const workflow = this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) {
      return { type: 'error', error: '工作流不存在' };
    }

    // 使用 LLM 生成3个不同风格的脚本，传入分析结果
    const styles = ['简约专业', '温馨生活', '活力创意'];
    const scripts: Script[] = [];
    const analysisResult = workflow.lastMessage; // 使用步骤3的分析结果

    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
      const script = await this.generateScriptWithLLM(workflow, styles[i], analysisResult);
      scripts.push(script);
    }

    workflow.generatedScripts = scripts;
    workflow.currentStep = 5;
    workflow.currentStage = 'scripts_generated'; // 更新阶段为脚本生成

    // 生成选项文本
    let options = `【请选择脚本方案】\n\n`;
    scripts.forEach((script, index) => {
      options += `${index + 1}. ${script.title}\n`;
      options += `   风格：${script.style}\n\n`;
    });
    options += `请回复数字选择（1/2/3），或回复"自定义"进行修改`;

    return {
      type: 'text',
      content: options,
      workflow: {
        id: workflow.id,
        currentStep: workflow.currentStep,
      },
    };
  }

  /**
   * 重新生成脚本（基于用户反馈）
   * @param workflowId 工作流ID
   * @param userFeedback 用户反馈
   */
  async regenerateScripts(workflowId: string, userFeedback: string): Promise<ProcessingResult> {
    const workflow = this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) {
      return { type: 'error', error: '工作流不存在' };
    }

    console.log(`🔄 重新生成脚本，用户反馈: ${userFeedback}`);

    // 使用 LLM 重新生成3个脚本，传入用户反馈
    const styles = ['简约专业', '温馨生活', '活力创意'];
    const scripts: Script[] = [];
    const analysisResult = workflow.lastMessage;

    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
      const script = await this.generateScriptWithLLM(
        workflow,
        styles[i],
        analysisResult + `\n\n用户反馈：${userFeedback}`  // 传入用户反馈
      );
      scripts.push(script);
    }

    // 替换当前的脚本（前端会保留对话历史用于对比）
    workflow.generatedScripts = scripts;
    workflow.currentStep = 5;
    workflow.currentStage = 'scripts_generated'; // 更新阶段为脚本生成

    // 生成选项文本
    let options = `【重新生成的脚本】\n\n`;
    options += `已根据您的反馈进行调整：${userFeedback}\n\n`;
    scripts.forEach((script, index) => {
      options += `${index + 1}. ${script.title}\n`;
      options += `   风格：${script.style}\n\n`;
    });
    options += `请回复数字选择（1/2/3），或继续提供反馈重新生成`;

    return {
      type: 'text',
      content: options,
      workflow: {
        id: workflow.id,
        currentStep: workflow.currentStep,
      },
    };
  }

  /**
   * 步骤6：视频生成（脚本 + 视频 + 图片参考）⭐ 核心功能
   */
  async step6GenerateVideo(
    workflowId: string,
    scriptIndex: number
  ): Promise<ProcessingResult> {
    const workflow = this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) {
      return { type: 'error', error: '工作流不存在' };
    }

    if (!workflow.generatedScripts[scriptIndex]) {
      return { type: 'error', error: '脚本不存在' };
    }

    const script = workflow.generatedScripts[scriptIndex];
    workflow.selectedScript = script;
    workflow.currentStep = 6;
    workflow.currentStage = 'video_generating'; // 更新阶段为视频生成

    // 发送进度更新
    workflow.currentTask = '正在准备视频生成...';
    workflow.progress = 0;
    workflow.estimatedTime = 60;

    try {
      // 实际调用视频生成
      const taskId = await this.executeVideoGeneration(workflowId);

      // 创建视频记录
      const video: GeneratedVideo = {
        id: `video_${Date.now()}`,
        taskId: taskId,
        status: 'processing',
        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      };

      workflow.generatedVideos.push(video);

      return {
        type: 'video',
        video: video,
        workflow: {
          id: workflow.id,
          currentStep: workflow.currentStep,
          currentTask: workflow.currentTask,
          progress: workflow.progress,
          estimatedTime: workflow.estimatedTime,
        },
      };
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('视频生成失败:', error);
      return {
        type: 'error',
        error: `视频生成失败: ${error.message}`,
        workflow: {
          id: workflow.id,
          currentStep: workflow.currentStep,
        },
      };
    }
  }

  /**
   * 执行视频生成（后台调用）
   */
  async executeVideoGeneration(workflowId: string): Promise<string> {
    const workflow = this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow || !workflow.selectedScript) {
      throw new Error('工作流或脚本不存在');
    }

    // 1. 构建 Seedance 2.0 请求内容
    const content: Content[] = [];

    // 1.1 添加脚本文本（必需）
    content.push({
      type: 'text',
      text: this.formatScriptForSeedance(workflow.selectedScript),
    });

    // 1.2 添加参考视频（最多3个）
    for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(workflow.referenceVideos.length, 3); i++) {
      content.push({
        type: 'video_url',
        video_url: { url: workflow.referenceVideos[i] },
        role: 'reference_video',
      });
    }

    // 1.3 添加参考图片（最多5个）
    for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(workflow.referenceImages.length, 5); i++) {
      content.push({
        type: 'image_url',
        image_url: { url: workflow.referenceImages[i] },
        role: 'reference_image',
      });
    }

    // 2. 创建 Seedance 2.0 任务
    const request: CreateTaskRequest = {
      model: 'doubao-seedance-2-0-260128',
      content,
      ratio: '9:16',
      duration: workflow.selectedScript.duration,
      generate_audio: true,
      watermark: false,
      camerafixed: false,
    };

    // 3. 调用 Seedance API
    const response = await this.seedanceClient.createTask(request);
    if (response.error) {
      throw new Error(response.error.message);
    }

    return response.id;
  }

  /**
   * 格式化脚本为 Seedance 2.0 格式
   */
  private formatScriptForSeedance(script: Script): string {
    let text = `请根据以下脚本生成短视频：\n\n`;

    for (const scene of script.scenes) {
      text += `${scene.time}秒: ${scene.visual}\n`;
      if (scene.character) {
        text += `人物：${scene.character}\n`;
      }
      if (scene.action) {
        text += `动作：${scene.action}\n`;
      }
      if (scene.voiceover) {
        text += `口播：${scene.voiceover}\n`;
      }
      text += `风格：${scene.style}\n\n`;
    }

    text += `\n整体风格：${script.style}`;
    text += `\n时长：${script.duration}秒`;
    text += `\n平台：${script.platform}`;

    return text;
  }

  /**
   * 使用 LLM 生成脚本
   */
  private async generateScriptWithLLM(
    workflow: Workflow,
    style: string = '简约专业',
    analysisResult?: string
  ): Promise<Script> {
    const productName = workflow.productName || '产品';
    const referenceInfo = workflow.referenceVideos.length > 0 || workflow.referenceImages.length > 0
      ? '参考了用户上传的素材'
      : '基于产品信息生成';

    const prompt = `你是一个专业的短视频脚本创作助手。请为"${productName}"创作一个短视频脚本。

要求：
1. 风格：${style}
2. 时长：12秒
3. 平台：抖音
4. 分4个场景，每个场景3秒
5. 必须包含：时间、画面内容、人物、动作、口播/文案、风格

${referenceInfo ? `参考素材：${workflow.referenceVideos.join(', ') || workflow.referenceImages.join(', ')}` : ''}

${analysisResult ? `\n**参考分析**：\n${analysisResult}\n请在脚本创作中参考上述分析结果，模仿其风格和技巧。\n` : ''}

请以JSON格式返回脚本，格式如下：
{
  "title": "脚本标题",
  "style": "风格",
  "duration": 12,
  "platform": "抖音",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "time": "0-3秒",
      "visual": "画面描述",
      "character": "人物（可选）",
      "action": "动作描述",
      "voiceover": "口播内容",
      "style": "场景风格"
    }
  ]
}`;

    try {
      const response = await this.llmClient.invoke([
        { role: 'user', content: prompt }
      ]);

      const content = response.content || '';

      // 提取 JSON（可能被包裹在 markdown 代码块中）
      const jsonMatch = content.match(/```json\n?([\s\S]*?)\n?```/) || content.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
      const jsonStr = jsonMatch ? jsonMatch[1] || jsonMatch[0] : content;

      const scriptData = JSON.parse(jsonStr);

      return {
        id: `script_${Date.now()}`,
        title: scriptData.title || `${productName}短视频脚本`,
        style: scriptData.style || style,
        duration: scriptData.duration || 12,
        platform: scriptData.platform || '抖音',
        scenes: scriptData.scenes || [],
      };
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('LLM 脚本生成失败，使用默认脚本:', error);

      // 降级到默认脚本
      return {
        id: `script_${Date.now()}`,
        title: `${productName}短视频脚本`,
        style: style,
        duration: 12,
        platform: '抖音',
        scenes: [
          {
            time: '0-3秒',
            visual: '产品特写，包装清晰',
            character: '',
            action: '缓慢旋转',
            voiceover: `${productName}，非凡体验`,
            style: style,
          },
          {
            time: '3-6秒',
            visual: '产品使用场景',
            character: '',
            action: '产品使用演示',
            voiceover: '解决您的痛点',
            style: '生活化',
          },
          {
            time: '6-9秒',
            visual: '产品效果展示',
            character: '',
            action: '前后对比',
            voiceover: '效果显著，值得信赖',
            style: '真实可信',
          },
          {
            time: '9-12秒',
            visual: '品牌信息',
            character: '',
            action: '品牌Logo展示',
            voiceover: '立即购买，开启新生活',
            style: '品牌化',
          },
        ],
      };
    }
  }

  /**
   * 脚本转Markdown表格
   */
  private scriptToMarkdown(script: Script): string {
    let markdown = `【${script.title}】\n\n`;
    markdown += `| 时间 | 画面内容 | 人物 | 动作 | 口播/文案 | 风格 |\n`;
    markdown += `|------|----------|------|------|-----------|------|\n`;

    for (const scene of script.scenes) {
      markdown += `| ${scene.time} | ${scene.visual} | ${scene.character || '-'} | ${scene.action || '-'} | ${scene.voiceover || '-'} | ${scene.style} |\n`;
    }

    markdown += `\n**整体风格**：${script.style}\n`;
    markdown += `**总时长**：${script.duration}秒\n`;
    markdown += `**平台**：${script.platform}`;

    return markdown;
  }

  /**
   * 步骤7：批量生成
   */
  async step7BatchGenerate(workflowId: string): Promise<ProcessingResult> {
    const workflow = this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) {
      return { type: 'error', error: '工作流不存在' };
    }

    workflow.currentStep = 7;
    workflow.currentStage = 'batch_generating'; // 更新阶段为批量生成

    return {
      type: 'text',
      content: `【批量生成模式】\n\n将循环生成多个视频，参考视频会动态更新。\n\n预计生成 3 个视频\n\n正在生成第 1 个...`,
      workflow: {
        id: workflow.id,
        currentStep: workflow.currentStep,
        currentTask: '批量生成中',
        progress: 0,
        estimatedTime: 180,
      },
    };
  }

  /**
   * 步骤8：结束与保存
   */
  async step8End(workflowId: string): Promise<ProcessingResult> {
    const workflow = this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) {
      return { type: 'error', error: '工作流不存在' };
    }

    workflow.status = 'completed';
    workflow.currentStep = 8;
    workflow.currentStage = 'ended'; // 更新阶段为结束

    return {
      type: 'text',
      content: `【工作流完成】\n\n✅ 视频生成完成\n\n已生成视频：${workflow.generatedVideos.length} 个\n\n您想要：\nA. 下载视频\nB. 继续创作\nC. 查看历史`,
      workflow: {
        id: workflow.id,
        currentStep: workflow.currentStep,
      },
    };
  }

  /**
   * 保存视频到素材历史库
   * @param workflowId 工作流ID
   * @param taskId 视频任务ID
   * @param options 可选参数（当工作流不存在时使用）
   */
  async saveVideoToLibrary(
    workflowId: string,
    taskId: string,
    options?: {
      userId?: string;
      script?: any;
      productName?: string;
    }
  ): Promise<{ success: boolean; libraryId?: string; error?: string }> {
    const workflow = this.getWorkflow(workflowId);

    // 如果工作流不存在，尝试从选项获取信息
    const userId = workflow?.userId || options?.userId || 'unknown_user';
    const selectedScript = workflow?.selectedScript || options?.script;
    const productName = workflow?.productName || options?.productName || '未命名产品';

    // 检查 userId 是否是有效的 UUID，如果不是则使用默认 UUID
    const isValidUUID = (str: string) => {
      const uuidRegex = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i;
      return uuidRegex.test(str);
    };

    const finalUserId = isValidUUID(userId) ? userId : '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001';

    try {
      console.log(`📦 开始保存视频到素材库...`);
      console.log(`   工作流ID: ${workflowId}`);
      console.log(`   任务ID: ${taskId}`);
      console.log(`   用户ID: ${userId}`);
      console.log(`   最终用户ID: ${finalUserId}`);

      // 1. 轮询视频任务状态
      const task = await this.seedanceClient.waitForTask(
        taskId,
        10000, // 10秒轮询间隔
        300000, // 5分钟最大等待时间
      );

      if (task.status !== 'succeeded' || !task.content?.video_url) {
        return { success: false, error: `视频生成失败：${task.error?.message || '未知错误'}` };
      }

      console.log(`✅ 视频生成成功: ${task.content.video_url}`);

      // 2. 下载视频
      const videoResponse = await fetch(task.content.video_url);
      if (!videoResponse.ok) {
        return { success: false, error: '视频下载失败' };
      }

      const videoBuffer = await videoResponse.arrayBuffer();
      const videoSize = videoBuffer.byteLength;
      console.log(`📥 视频下载完成: ${videoSize} bytes`);

      // 3. 上传到TOS
      const videoId = `video_${Date.now()}_${taskId}`;
      const tosKey = `users/${userId}/videos/${videoId}.mp4`;

      const tosClient = getTosClient();
      await tosClient.putObject({
        bucket: BUCKET_NAME,
        key: tosKey,
        body: Buffer.from(videoBuffer),
      });

      console.log(`☁️ 视频已上传到TOS: ${tosKey}`);

      // 4. 生成签名URL
      const presignedUrl = await tosClient.getPreSignedUrl({
        method: 'GET',
        bucket: BUCKET_NAME,
        key: tosKey,
        expires: 900, // 15分钟
      });

      console.log(`🔗 签名URL已生成`);

      // 5. 保存到数据库（learning_library表）
      const client = getSupabaseClient();

      // 提取视频风格和主题
      const style = selectedScript?.style || '未定义';
      const theme = selectedScript?.title || productName || '未命名视频';

      const { data, error } = await client
        .from('learning_library')
        .insert({
          user_id: finalUserId,
          video_key: tosKey,  // TOS存储key
          video_url: task.content.video_url, // 原始URL（可能过期）
          video_size: videoSize,
          video_name: theme,
          video_style: style,
          video_theme: theme,
          analysis_status: 'completed',
          analysis_progress: 100,
        })
        .select('id')
        .single();

      if (error) {
        console.error('❌ 保存到素材历史库失败:', error);
        return { success: false, error: `保存到素材历史库失败: ${error.message}` };
      }

      console.log(`💾 已保存到素材历史库，ID: ${data.id}`);

      // 5.1 同时创建videos表记录（用于素材历史页面）
      const prompt = selectedScript?.title || productName || `AI生成视频 - ${theme}`;

      const { data: videoRecord, error: videoError } = await client
        .from('videos')
        .insert({
          user_id: finalUserId,
          prompt: prompt,
          task_type: 'generate',
          model: 'doubao-seedance-2-0-260128',
          status: 'completed',
          task_id: taskId,
          result_url: presignedUrl, // 使用新的签名URL
          tos_key: tosKey,
          ratio: '16:9',
          duration: 15,
          generate_audio: true,
          watermark: false,
        })
        .select('id')
        .single();

      if (videoError) {
        console.error('⚠️ 创建videos记录失败:', videoError);
        // 不影响主流程，继续执行
      } else {
        console.log(`💾 已创建视频记录，ID: ${videoRecord.id}`);
      }

      // 6. 更新工作流中的视频记录（如果工作流还存在）
      if (workflow) {
        const videoRecord = workflow.generatedVideos.find(v => v.taskId === taskId);
        if (videoRecord) {
          videoRecord.status = 'succeeded';
          (videoRecord as any).tosKey = tosKey;
          (videoRecord as any).presignedUrl = presignedUrl;
          (videoRecord as any).libraryId = data.id;
        }
      }

      return { success: true, libraryId: data.id };

    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('❌ 保存视频失败:', error);
      return { success: false, error: error.message };
    }
  }
}

===== src/lib/xiaohai-workflow-service.ts =====
/**
 * 创意小海工作流服务
 * 
 * 完整的8步骤工作流：
 * 1. 唤醒与偏好展示
 * 2. 任务识别与确认
 * 3. 模型调用与进度反馈
 * 4. 脚本呈现与确认
 * 5. 脚本生成进度反馈
 * 6. 视频生成
 * 7. 批量生成
 * 8. 结束与保存
 * 
 * 核心特性：
 * - 多工作流并行
 * - 断点续接
 * - 进度实时反馈
 * - 用户偏好蒸馏
 */

import { LLMClient, Config } from 'coze-coding-dev-sdk';
import { SeedanceClient, Content, TextContent, ImageUrlContent, VideoUrlContent, SeedanceModel } from '@/lib/seedance-client';
import { getSupabaseClient } from '@/storage/database/supabase-client';

// ========== 类型定义 ==========

/** 工作流步骤 */
export type WorkflowStep = 
  | 1 // 唤醒与偏好展示
  | 2 // 任务识别与确认
  | 3 // 模型调用与进度反馈
  | 4 // 脚本呈现与确认
  | 5 // 脚本生成进度反馈
  | 6 // 视频生成
  | 7 // 批量生成
  | 8; // 结束与保存

/** 工作流状态 */
export type WorkflowStatus = 'active' | 'paused' | 'completed' | 'failed';

/** 任务类型 */
export type TaskType =
  | 'video_analysis'      // 视频分析
  | 'product_generation' // 商品生成
  | 'exploration';        // 探索性表达（需要引导用户）

/** 脚本场景（3秒维度） */
export interface ScriptScene {
  time: string;           // "0-3秒"
  visual: string;         // 画面描述
  character: string;      // 人物（包含面部细节）
  action: string;         // 动作
  voiceover: string;      // 口播内容
  style: string;          // 整体风格
}

/** 完整脚本 */
export interface Script {
  id: string;
  scenes: ScriptScene[];
  style: string;
  duration: number;
  product?: string;
}

/** 工作流进度 */
export interface WorkflowProgress {
  currentModel: string;     // 当前使用的模型
  currentTask: string;      // 当前任务描述
  percentage: number;       // 完成百分比
  estimatedTime: number;    // 预计剩余时间（秒）
}

/** 工作流 */
export interface Workflow {
  id: string;
  userId: string;
  status: WorkflowStatus;
  currentStep: WorkflowStep;
  
  // 任务信息
  taskType: TaskType;
  product?: string;
  referenceVideos: string[]; // 最多3个参考视频
  
  // 脚本
  referenceScript?: Script;  // 参考脚本（分析结果）
  generatedScripts: Script[]; // 生成的3个脚本
  selectedScriptIndex?: number;
  
  // 视频生成
  generatedVideos: string[]; // 已生成的视频URL
  
  // 进度
  progress: WorkflowProgress;
  
  // 用户偏好
  preferences: Record<string, any>;
  
  // 批量生成
  batchCount?: number;
  batchCurrentIndex?: number;
  
  // 时间戳
  createdAt: Date;
  updatedAt: Date;
}

/** 用户人格 */
export interface UserPersonality {
  userId: string;
  style: string[];
  duration: number;
  platform: string;
  cameraWork: string[];
  // ... 其他偏好字段
}

/** 处理结果 */
export interface ProcessingResult {
  workflow: Workflow | null;
  message: string;
  shouldShowScript: boolean; // 是否展示脚本
  shouldAskProduct: boolean; // 是否询问产品
}

// ========== 工作流管理器 ==========

export class XiaohaiWorkflowService {
  private llmClient: LLMClient;
  private seedanceClient: SeedanceClient;
  private activeWorkflows: Map<string, Workflow> = new Map(); // userId -> 当前工作流
  private pausedWorkflows: Map<string, Workflow[]> = new Map(); // userId -> 暂停的工作流列表
  
  constructor() {
    const config = new Config();
    this.llmClient = new LLMClient(config);
    this.seedanceClient = new SeedanceClient();
  }

  // ========== 步骤1：唤醒与偏好展示 ==========

  /**
   * 用户打开页面，发送欢迎语
   */
  async welcome(userId: string): Promise<string> {
    // 加载用户人格
    const personality = await this.loadPersonality(userId);
    
    let response = `🌊 你好！我是创意小海\n\n`;
    response += `**我可以帮你：**\n`;
    response += `- 分析视频风格并创作脚本\n`;
    response += `- 根据商品库制作产品视频\n`;
    response += `- 批量生成同风格视频\n\n`;
    
    if (personality) {
      response += `**你的创作偏好：**\n`;
      response += `- 风格：${personality.style.join('、')}\n`;
      response += `- 时长：${personality.duration}秒\n`;
      response += `- 平台：${personality.platform}\n`;
      response += `- 镜头：${personality.cameraWork.join('、')}\n\n`;
      response += `是否依据此偏好开始今天的工作？`;
    } else {
      response += `你还没有形成创作偏好，让我们开始第一次创作吧！`;
    }
    
    return response;
  }

  // ========== 步骤2：任务识别与确认 ==========

  /**
   * 识别用户任务并确认
   */
  async recognizeTask(
    userId: string,
    message: string,
    attachments?: any[]
  ): Promise<{ response: string; workflow: Workflow | null }> {
    // 判断任务类型
    const taskType = this.detectTaskType(message, attachments);

    // 如果是探索性表达，返回引导消息
    if (taskType === 'exploration') {
      const guidance = this.generateExplorationGuidance(message, attachments);
      return { response: guidance, workflow: null };
    }

    // 创建新工作流（video_analysis 或 product_generation）
    const workflow: Workflow = {
      id: this.generateWorkflowId(),
      userId,
      status: 'active',
      currentStep: 2,
      taskType,
      referenceVideos: [],
      generatedScripts: [],
      generatedVideos: [],
      progress: {
        currentModel: '',
        currentTask: '',
        percentage: 0,
        estimatedTime: 0,
      },
      preferences: {},
      createdAt: new Date(),
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    };

    // 提取参考视频
    if (attachments && attachments.length > 0) {
      workflow.referenceVideos = attachments
        .filter(a => a.type === 'video' || a.type === 'video_link')
        .map(a => a.url);
    }

    // 提取商品名称
    const productName = this.extractProductName(message);
    if (productName) {
      workflow.product = productName;
    }

    // 保存工作流
    this.activeWorkflows.set(userId, workflow);
    await this.saveWorkflow(workflow);

    // 生成确认消息
    const response = this.generateConfirmationMessage(workflow, message);

    return { response, workflow };
  }

  /**
   * 生成探索性引导消息
   */
  private generateExplorationGuidance(message: string, attachments?: any[]): string {
    let response = `💡 我理解你想创作视频，让我来帮你！\n\n`;

    if (attachments && attachments.some(a => a.type === 'video' || a.type === 'video_link')) {
      response += `我注意到你发送了参考视频，我可以：\n`;
      response += `1. 分析视频风格，生成类似的脚本\n`;
      response += `2. 学习视频的创作技巧\n`;
      response += `3. 生成同风格的产品视频\n\n`;
      response += `请告诉我：\n`;
      response += `- 本次要制作的产品是什么？\n`;
      response += `- 或者直接说"开始分析"，我会立即开始分析视频`;
    } else {
      response += `我可以帮你：\n`;
      response += `1. 分析参考视频，生成风格脚本\n`;
      response += `2. 根据产品名称制作推广视频\n`;
      response += `3. 批量生成同风格视频\n\n`;
      response += `你可以：\n`;
      response += `- 上传参考视频，告诉我产品名称\n`;
      response += `- 或者直接说"制作[产品名]"，我会直接开始制作`;
    }

    return response;
  }

  /**
   * 生成确认消息
   */
  private generateConfirmationMessage(workflow: Workflow, originalMessage: string): string {
    let response = `✅ 已收到你的需求！\n\n`;
    response += `我理解你要：\n`;
    
    if (workflow.referenceVideos.length > 0) {
      response += `- 分析视频：${workflow.referenceVideos.length}个\n`;
    }
    
    if (workflow.product) {
      response += `- 制作产品：${workflow.product}\n`;
    }
    
    if (workflow.preferences.style) {
      response += `- 生成风格：${workflow.preferences.style}\n`;
    }
    
    response += `\n正在开始处理...`;
    
    return response;
  }

  // ========== 步骤3：模型调用与进度反馈 ==========

  /**
   * 开始处理任务（返回处理结果）
   */
  async startProcessing(workflowId: string): Promise<ProcessingResult> {
    const workflow = await this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) {
      return {
        workflow: null,
        message: '工作流不存在',
        shouldShowScript: false,
        shouldAskProduct: false,
      };
    }

    workflow.currentStep = 3;
    workflow.progress = {
      currentModel: '',
      currentTask: '',
      percentage: 0,
      estimatedTime: 0,
    };

    await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);

    let resultMessage = '';

    if (workflow.taskType === 'video_analysis') {
      resultMessage = await this.processVideoAnalysis(workflow);
    } else {
      resultMessage = await this.processProductGeneration(workflow);
    }

    // 判断下一步操作
    const shouldShowScript = !!workflow.referenceScript;
    const shouldAskProduct = workflow.currentStep === 4 as WorkflowStep && !workflow.product;

    return {
      workflow,
      message: resultMessage,
      shouldShowScript,
      shouldAskProduct,
    };
  }

  /**
   * 处理视频分析任务（返回消息）
   */
  private async processVideoAnalysis(workflow: Workflow): Promise<string> {
    // 更新进度
    workflow.progress.currentModel = 'doubao-seed-1-6-vision';
    workflow.progress.currentTask = '视频风格分析';
    workflow.progress.percentage = 10;
    workflow.progress.estimatedTime = 30;
    await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);

    try {
      // 调用视觉模型分析视频
      const videoUrl = workflow.referenceVideos[0];
      const analysisResult = await this.analyzeVideo(videoUrl, workflow.preferences);

      // 解析分析结果为脚本格式
      const referenceScript = this.parseAnalysisToScript(analysisResult);

      workflow.referenceScript = referenceScript;
      workflow.progress.percentage = 100;
      workflow.currentStep = 4;
      await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);

      return `✅ 视频分析完成！\n\n已提取视频风格并生成参考脚本。`;
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('视频分析失败:', error);
      // 降级到模拟数据
      const referenceScript: Script = {
        id: this.generateScriptId(),
        scenes: [
          {
            time: '0-3秒',
            visual: '厨房晨光，木质餐桌，白瓷碗',
            character: '女生，扎马尾，素颜，温暖的笑容',
            action: '搅拌粥，抬头看镜头',
            voiceover: '早安',
            style: '暖色调，自然光',
          },
        ],
        style: '自然真实',
        duration: 15,
      };

      workflow.referenceScript = referenceScript;
      workflow.progress.percentage = 100;
      workflow.currentStep = 4;
      await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);

      return `✅ 视频分析完成（使用默认分析结果）！\n\n已生成参考脚本。`;
    }
  }

  /**
   * 调用视觉模型分析视频
   */
  private async analyzeVideo(videoUrl: string, preferences: Record<string, any>): Promise<string> {
    try {
      const prompt = `请分析这段视频，提取以下信息：
1. 视频类型（如：产品展示、生活记录、知识科普等）
2. 场景描述（每个画面的具体内容）
3. 人物特征（外貌、表情、动作等）
4. 镜头语言（推拉摇移、特写等）
5. 色彩风格（暖色调、冷色调、高饱和度等）
6. 创作技巧（转场、节奏、配乐等）

用户偏好：
${JSON.stringify(preferences)}

请以JSON格式返回，包含以上所有信息。`;

      const response = await this.llmClient.invoke([
        {
          role: 'user',
          content: [
            { type: 'image_url', image_url: { url: videoUrl } },
            { type: 'text', text: prompt },
          ],
        },
      ], {
        model: 'doubao-seed-1-6-vision',
      });

      return response.content;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('视觉模型调用失败:', error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * 解析分析结果为脚本格式
   */
  private parseAnalysisToScript(analysisResult: string): Script {
    try {
      const analysis = JSON.parse(analysisResult);
      
      // 根据分析结果生成脚本
      const scenes: ScriptScene[] = [];
      
      // 示例：将分析转换为3秒维度的脚本
      // 这里可以根据实际分析结果进行更智能的转换
      scenes.push({
        time: '0-3秒',
        visual: analysis.scenes?.[0] || '产品特写',
        character: analysis.character || '无人物',
        action: analysis.action || '展示产品',
        voiceover: '',
        style: analysis.style || '自然',
      });
      
      return {
        id: this.generateScriptId(),
        scenes,
        style: analysis.style || '自然',
        duration: 15,
      };
    } catch {
      // 解析失败，返回默认脚本
      return {
        id: this.generateScriptId(),
        scenes: [
          {
            time: '0-3秒',
            visual: '产品展示',
            character: '无人物',
            action: '产品旋转',
            voiceover: '',
            style: '自然',
          },
        ],
        style: '自然',
        duration: 15,
      };
    }
  }

  /**
   * 处理商品生成任务（返回消息）
   */
  private async processProductGeneration(workflow: Workflow): Promise<string> {
    // 更新进度
    workflow.progress.currentModel = 'doubao-seed-1-8';
    workflow.progress.currentTask = '脚本生成';
    workflow.progress.percentage = 10;
    workflow.progress.estimatedTime = 20;
    await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);

    // 加载用户偏好
    const personality = await this.loadPersonality(workflow.userId);

    // 生成初始脚本
    if (workflow.product) {
      const script = await this.generateProductScript(
        workflow.product,
        personality || workflow.preferences
      );
      workflow.referenceScript = script;
    }

    workflow.currentStep = 4;
    await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);

    if (workflow.product) {
      return `✅ 产品分析完成！\n\n已为产品"${workflow.product}"生成参考脚本。`;
    } else {
      return `✅ 初始化完成！\n\n请告诉我本次要制作的产品名称。`;
    }
  }

  /**
   * 生成商品脚本
   */
  private async generateProductScript(
    productName: string,
    preferences: Record<string, any>
  ): Promise<Script> {
    try {
      const prompt = `请为产品"${productName}"创作一个短视频脚本。

要求：
1. 脚本时长：${preferences.duration || 15}秒
2. 脚本风格：${preferences.style?.join('、') || '自然真实'}
3. 平台：${preferences.platform || '抖音'}
4. 镜头：${preferences.cameraWork?.join('、') || '推镜、固定镜头'}
5. 光线：${preferences.lighting || '自然光'}
6. 色调：${preferences.colorTone || '暖色调'}

脚本格式：
以3秒为时间维度，每个时间段包含：
- 时间（如"0-3秒"）
- 画面描述
- 人物（包含面部细节）
- 动作
- 口播内容
- 整体风格

请以JSON格式返回，格式如下：
{
  "style": "整体风格描述",
  "duration": 15,
  "scenes": [
    {
      "time": "0-3秒",
      "visual": "画面描述",
      "character": "人物（包含面部细节）",
      "action": "动作",
      "voiceover": "口播内容",
      "style": "风格"
    }
  ]
}`;

      const response = await this.llmClient.invoke([
        { role: 'user', content: prompt },
      ], {
        model: 'doubao-seed-1-8',
      });

      const content = response.content;
      const result = JSON.parse(content);

      return {
        id: this.generateScriptId(),
        scenes: result.scenes || [],
        style: result.style || '自然',
        duration: result.duration || 15,
        product: productName,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('脚本生成失败:', error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  // ========== 步骤4：脚本呈现与确认 ==========

  /**
   * 呈现参考脚本
   */
  async presentScript(workflowId: string): Promise<string> {
    const workflow = await this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow || !workflow.referenceScript) {
      return '脚本生成失败，请重试';
    }
    
    let response = `✅ 视频分析完成！\n\n`;
    response += `**参考脚本：**\n\n`;
    response += this.formatScriptTable(workflow.referenceScript);
    response += `\n\n请问：\n`;
    response += `1. 脚本是否需要微调？\n`;
    response += `2. 本次制作的产品是？（从商品库选择）`;
    
    return response;
  }

  /**
   * 格式化脚本为表格（公开方法，供 API 使用）
   */
  formatScriptTable(script: Script): string {
    let table = `| 时间 | 画面 | 人物 | 动作 | 口播 | 风格 |\n`;
    table += `|------|------|------|------|------|------|\n`;

    for (const scene of script.scenes) {
      table += `| ${scene.time} | ${scene.visual} | ${scene.character} | ${scene.action} | ${scene.voiceover} | ${scene.style} |\n`;
    }

    return table;
  }

  /**
   * 确认产品并生成3个类似脚本
   */
  async confirmProductAndGenerate(
    workflowId: string,
    productName: string,
    modifyType: 'keep' | 'modify'
  ): Promise<string> {
    const workflow = await this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) return '工作流不存在';
    
    workflow.product = productName;
    workflow.currentStep = 5;
    workflow.progress.percentage = 0;
    await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
    
    // 加载用户偏好
    const personality = await this.loadPersonality(workflow.userId);
    const preferences = personality || workflow.preferences;
    
    // 生成3个类似脚本（带用户偏好）
    const scripts = await this.generateMultipleScriptsWithProduct(
      productName,
      preferences,
      workflow.referenceScript,
      modifyType === 'modify'
    );
    
    workflow.generatedScripts = scripts;
    await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
    
    return `✅ 已确认产品：${productName}\n\n正在生成脚本，请稍等...`;
  }

  // ========== 步骤5：脚本生成进度反馈 ==========

  /**
   * 生成3个脚本
   */
  async generateMultipleScripts(workflowId: string): Promise<Script[]> {
    const workflow = await this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) return [];
    
    const scripts: Script[] = [];
    
    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
      // 更新进度
      workflow.progress.percentage = ((i + 1) / 3) * 100;
      workflow.progress.currentTask = `生成脚本 ${i + 1}/3`;
      await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
      
      // 加载用户偏好
      const personality = await this.loadPersonality(workflow.userId);
      const preferences = personality || workflow.preferences;
      
      // 生成脚本（不同风格）
      const script = await this.generateProductScript(
        workflow.product || '产品',
        {
          ...preferences,
          style: this.generateVariantStyle(i, preferences.style),
        }
      );
      
      scripts.push(script);
    }
    
    workflow.generatedScripts = scripts;
    workflow.currentStep = 6;
    await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
    
    return scripts;
  }

  /**
   * 生成多个脚本（带产品）
   */
  private async generateMultipleScriptsWithProduct(
    productName: string,
    preferences: Record<string, any>,
    referenceScript?: Script,
    shouldModify: boolean = false
  ): Promise<Script[]> {
    const scripts: Script[] = [];
    
    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
      const script = await this.generateProductScript(
        productName,
        {
          ...preferences,
          style: this.generateVariantStyle(i, preferences.style),
        }
      );
      scripts.push(script);
    }
    
    return scripts;
  }

  /**
   * 生成变体风格
   */
  private generateVariantStyle(index: number, baseStyles: string[] = []): string[] {
    const variantStyles = [
      ['清新自然', '生活化'],
      ['活力动感', '快节奏'],
      ['文艺复古', '慢节奏'],
      ['商业专业', '高端'],
      ['可爱甜美', '温馨'],
    ];
    
    if (baseStyles.length > 0) {
      return [...baseStyles, variantStyles[index % variantStyles.length][0]];
    }
    
    return variantStyles[index % variantStyles.length];
  }

  // ========== 步骤6：视频生成 ==========

  /**
   * 开始视频生成
   */
  async startVideoGeneration(
    workflowId: string,
    scriptIndex: number
  ): Promise<string> {
    const workflow = await this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) return '工作流不存在';
    
    workflow.selectedScriptIndex = scriptIndex;
    workflow.currentStep = 6;
    workflow.progress = {
      currentModel: 'Seedance 2.0',
      currentTask: '视频生成',
      percentage: 0,
      estimatedTime: 120, // 2分钟
    };
    await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
    
    // 获取选中的脚本
    const script = workflow.generatedScripts[scriptIndex];
    if (!script) {
      return '脚本不存在，请重试';
    }
    
    // 检测真人视频并提示用户
    const hasRealPerson = this.checkRealPerson(script);
    if (hasRealPerson) {
      return `⚠️ 检测到脚本包含真人描述\n\nSeedance 2.0 不支持真人视频生成\n\n建议：\n- 修改脚本，使用产品图展示\n- 上传产品展示视频作为参考`;
    }
    
    try {
      // 调用 Seedance 2.0 生成视频
      const taskId = await this.generateVideoWithSeedance(workflow, script);
      
      // 轮询等待视频生成完成
      const task = await this.seedanceClient.waitForTask(
        taskId,
        10000, // 10秒轮询一次
        300000, // 5分钟超时
        (status, task) => {
          // 更新进度
          workflow.progress.percentage = this.calculateVideoProgress(status);
          workflow.progress.currentTask = `视频生成中 (${status})`;
          this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
        }
      );
      
      if (task.status !== 'succeeded' || !task.content?.video_url) {
        throw new Error(`视频生成失败: ${task.error?.message}`);
      }
      
      // 保存视频 URL
      const videoUrl = task.content.video_url;
      workflow.generatedVideos.push(videoUrl);
      workflow.progress.percentage = 100;
      await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
      
      const videoNumber = workflow.generatedVideos.length;
      
      let response = `✅ 视频${videoNumber} 已完成！\n\n`;
      response += `[视频预览] ${videoUrl}\n\n`;
      response += `下一步：\n`;
      response += `- 批量制作类似视频\n`;
      response += `- 结束本次创作`;
      
      return response;
      
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('视频生成失败:', error);
      return `视频生成失败：${error.message}\n\n请重试或修改脚本后再次尝试。`;
    }
  }

  /**
   * 调用 Seedance 2.0 生成视频
   */
  private async generateVideoWithSeedance(
    workflow: Workflow,
    script: Script
  ): Promise<string> {
    // 构建请求内容
    const content: Content[] = [];
    
    // 1. 添加脚本文本
    const scriptText = this.formatScriptForSeedance(script);
    content.push({
      type: 'text',
      text: scriptText,
    });
    
    // 2. 添加参考视频（最多3个）
    const referenceVideos = this.selectReferenceVideos(workflow);
    for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(referenceVideos.length, 3); i++) {
      content.push({
        type: 'video_url',
        video_url: { url: referenceVideos[i] },
        role: 'reference_video',
      });
    }
    
    // 3. 创建任务
    const request: any = {
      model: 'doubao-seedance-2-0-260128' as SeedanceModel,
      content,
      ratio: '9:16', // 竖屏
      duration: script.duration,
      generate_audio: true,
      watermark: false,
    };
    
    const response = await this.seedanceClient.createTask(request);
    
    if (response.error) {
      throw new Error(response.error.message);
    }
    
    return response.id;
  }

  /**
   * 格式化脚本为 Seedance 2.0 格式
   */
  private formatScriptForSeedance(script: Script): string {
    let text = `请根据以下脚本生成短视频：\n\n`;
    
    for (const scene of script.scenes) {
      text += `${scene.time}: ${scene.visual}\n`;
      if (scene.voiceover) {
        text += `口播：${scene.voiceover}\n`;
      }
      text += `风格：${scene.style}\n\n`;
    }
    
    text += `\n整体风格：${script.style}`;
    text += `\n时长：${script.duration}秒`;
    
    return text;
  }

  /**
   * 检测脚本是否包含真人描述
   */
  private checkRealPerson(script: Script): boolean {
    const realPersonKeywords = [
      '人脸', '真人', '人物表情', '微笑', '眉头', '眼神',
      '嘴唇', '嘴型', '五官', '面部', '脸庞',
    ];
    
    for (const scene of script.scenes) {
      const text = `${scene.character} ${scene.visual}`;
      for (const keyword of realPersonKeywords) {
        if (text.includes(keyword)) {
          return true;
        }
      }
    }
    
    return false;
  }

  /**
   * 计算视频生成进度
   */
  private calculateVideoProgress(status: string): number {
    const progressMap: Record<string, number> = {
      'queued': 10,
      'running': 50,
      'succeeded': 100,
      'failed': 0,
    };
    
    return progressMap[status] || 0;
  }

  // ========== 步骤7：批量生成 ==========

  /**
   * 开始批量生成
   */
  async startBatchGeneration(workflowId: string, count: number): Promise<string> {
    const workflow = await this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) return '工作流不存在';
    
    // 验证是否有脚本
    if (workflow.generatedScripts.length === 0) {
      return '没有可用的脚本，请先生成脚本。';
    }
    
    // 验证是否已生成第一个视频
    if (workflow.generatedVideos.length === 0) {
      return '请先生成第一个视频，再进行批量生成。';
    }
    
    workflow.batchCount = count;
    workflow.batchCurrentIndex = 0;
    workflow.currentStep = 7;
    await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
    
    // 开始批量生成循环
    await this.processBatchGeneration(workflowId);
    
    return `✅ 开始批量生成 ${count} 个视频...\n\n无需等待，我会自动完成所有视频的制作。`;
  }

  /**
   * 处理批量生成
   */
  private async processBatchGeneration(workflowId: string): Promise<void> {
    const workflow = await this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow || !workflow.batchCount || workflow.batchCurrentIndex === undefined) return;
    
    while (workflow.batchCurrentIndex < workflow.batchCount) {
      // 更新参考视频（最多3个）
      const referenceVideos = this.selectReferenceVideos(workflow);
      workflow.referenceVideos = referenceVideos;
      await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
      
      // 使用相同脚本生成视频
      const scriptIndex = workflow.selectedScriptIndex || 0;
      const script = workflow.generatedScripts[scriptIndex];
      
      if (!script) {
        console.error('脚本不存在');
        break;
      }
      
      try {
        // 调用 Seedance 2.0 生成视频
        const taskId = await this.generateVideoWithSeedance(workflow, script);
        
        // 轮询等待视频生成完成
        const task = await this.seedanceClient.waitForTask(
          taskId,
          10000,
          300000,
          (status) => {
            workflow.progress.percentage = this.calculateVideoProgress(status);
            workflow.progress.currentTask = `批量生成中 (${workflow.batchCurrentIndex! + 1}/${workflow.batchCount})`;
            this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
          }
        );
        
        if (task.status !== 'succeeded' || !task.content?.video_url) {
          console.error(`视频生成失败: ${task.error?.message}`);
          continue;
        }
        
        // 保存视频 URL
        workflow.generatedVideos.push(task.content.video_url);
        workflow.batchCurrentIndex++;
        await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
        
        // 检查是否完成
        if (workflow.batchCurrentIndex >= workflow.batchCount) {
          workflow.progress.percentage = 100;
          await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
          break;
        }
        
        // 每生成一个视频后等待2秒，避免请求过快
        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 2000));
        
      } catch (error: any) {
        console.error(`批量生成失败 (第${workflow.batchCurrentIndex + 1}个):`, error);
        workflow.batchCurrentIndex++;
        await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
      }
    }
  }

  /**
   * 选择参考视频（最多3个）
   */
  private selectReferenceVideos(workflow: Workflow): string[] {
    const allVideos = [
      ...workflow.referenceVideos,
      ...workflow.generatedVideos,
    ];
    
    // 优先使用：用户上传视频 + 视频1 + 视频2
    if (allVideos.length <= 3) {
      return allVideos;
    }
    
    return [
      workflow.referenceVideos[0], // 用户上传视频
      workflow.generatedVideos[0], // 视频1
      workflow.generatedVideos[1], // 视频2
    ];
  }

  // ========== 步骤8：结束与保存 ==========

  /**
   * 结束工作流
   */
  async endWorkflow(workflowId: string): Promise<string> {
    const workflow = await this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) return '工作流不存在';
    
    workflow.currentStep = 8;
    workflow.status = 'completed';
    await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
    
    // 蒸馏用户偏好
    await this.distillPreferences(workflow);
    
    // 从活动工作流中移除
    this.activeWorkflows.delete(workflow.userId);
    
    return `✅ 本次创作已完成！\n\n你的偏好已保存，下次创作会更懂你。`;
  }

  // ========== 多工作流管理 ==========

  /**
   * 暂停当前工作流
   */
  async pauseCurrentWorkflow(userId: string): Promise<void> {
    const currentWorkflow = this.activeWorkflows.get(userId);
    if (!currentWorkflow) return;
    
    currentWorkflow.status = 'paused';
    await this.updateWorkflow(currentWorkflow);
    
    // 添加到暂停列表
    if (!this.pausedWorkflows.has(userId)) {
      this.pausedWorkflows.set(userId, []);
    }
    this.pausedWorkflows.get(userId)!.push(currentWorkflow);
    
    this.activeWorkflows.delete(userId);
  }

  /**
   * 切换到暂停的工作流
   */
  async resumeWorkflow(userId: string, workflowId: string): Promise<Workflow | null> {
    const pausedList = this.pausedWorkflows.get(userId);
    if (!pausedList) return null;
    
    const index = pausedList.findIndex(w => w.id === workflowId);
    if (index === -1) return null;
    
    const workflow = pausedList[index];
    workflow.status = 'active';
    
    // 从暂停列表移除
    pausedList.splice(index, 1);
    
    // 设置为当前工作流
    const previousWorkflow = this.activeWorkflows.get(userId);
    if (previousWorkflow) {
      await this.pauseCurrentWorkflow(userId);
    }
    
    this.activeWorkflows.set(userId, workflow);
    await this.updateWorkflow(workflow);
    
    return workflow;
  }

  // ========== 进度反馈 ==========

  /**
   * 获取当前进度
   */
  async getProgress(workflowId: string): Promise<WorkflowProgress | null> {
    const workflow = await this.getWorkflow(workflowId);
    if (!workflow) return null;
    return workflow.progress;
  }

  // ========== 辅助函数 ==========

  /**
   * 检测任务类型
   */
  /**
   * 检测任务类型（优化版本）
   *
   * 逻辑：
   * 1. 如果有视频附件 → video_analysis
   * 2. 如果消息包含明确生成指令 + 产品名称 → product_generation
   * 3. 如果消息是探索性表达 → exploration
   * 4. 默认 → exploration（引导用户）
   */
  private detectTaskType(message: string, attachments?: any[]): TaskType {
    // 1. 检查视频附件
    if (attachments && attachments.some(a => a.type === 'video' || a.type === 'video_link')) {
      return 'video_analysis';
    }

    // 2. 检查明确生成指令
    const explicitKeywords = ['生成', '制作', '开始', '执行', '运行', '输出'];
    const hasExplicitKeyword = explicitKeywords.some(keyword => message.includes(keyword));

    // 3. 检查探索性表达
    const exploratoryKeywords = ['我想', '帮我', '看看', '分析一下', '了解一下', '试试'];
    const hasExploratoryKeyword = exploratoryKeywords.some(keyword => message.includes(keyword));

    // 4. 提取商品名称
    const productName = this.extractProductName(message);

    if (hasExplicitKeyword && productName) {
      // 明确指令 + 产品名称 → 商品生成
      return 'product_generation';
    } else if (hasExploratoryKeyword && !hasExplicitKeyword) {
      // 探索性表达 → 需要引导
      return 'exploration';
    } else {
      // 默认探索性
      return 'exploration';
    }
  }

  /**
   * 提取商品名称（优化版本）
   *
   * 规则：
   * 1. 匹配"产品名称：xxx"、"产品：xxx"、"制作xxx"等模式
   * 2. 识别常见的商品关键词后的名词
   */
  private extractProductName(message: string): string | null {
    // 模式1：产品名称：xxx
    const pattern1 = /产品[名称]?[:：]\s*([^\s，。！？]+)/;
    const match1 = message.match(pattern1);
    if (match1) {
      return match1[1].trim();
    }

    // 模式2：制作/生成/分析 xxx
    const pattern2 = /(制作|生成|分析|创作|拍摄)\s+([^\s，。！？]+)/;
    const match2 = message.match(pattern2);
    if (match2) {
      return match2[2].trim();
    }

    // 模式3：常见商品关键词
    const productKeywords = ['手机', '电脑', '平板', '耳机', '手表', '相机', '音箱', '键盘', '鼠标'];
    for (const keyword of productKeywords) {
      if (message.includes(keyword)) {
        return keyword;
      }
    }

    return null;
  }

  /**
   * 加载用户人格
   */
  private async loadPersonality(userId: string): Promise<UserPersonality | null> {
    try {
      const client = getSupabaseClient();
      const { data } = await client
        .from('user_personalities')
        .select('*')
        .eq('user_id', userId)
        .single();
      
      return data;
    } catch {
      return null;
    }
  }

  /**
   * 蒸馏用户偏好
   */
  private async distillPreferences(workflow: Workflow): Promise<void> {
    // TODO: 分析本次工作流的偏好
    // TODO: 更新用户人格
  }

  /**
   * 保存工作流
   */
  private async saveWorkflow(workflow: Workflow): Promise<void> {
    const client = getSupabaseClient();
    await client
      .from('xiaohai_workflows')
      .upsert({
        id: workflow.id,
        user_id: workflow.userId,
        status: workflow.status,
        current_step: workflow.currentStep,
        task_type: workflow.taskType,
        product: workflow.product,
        reference_videos: workflow.referenceVideos,
        generated_scripts: workflow.generatedScripts,
        generated_videos: workflow.generatedVideos,
        progress: workflow.progress,
        preferences: workflow.preferences,
        created_at: workflow.createdAt.toISOString(),
        updated_at: workflow.updatedAt.toISOString(),
      });
  }

  /**
   * 更新工作流
   */
  private async updateWorkflow(workflow: Workflow): Promise<void> {
    workflow.updatedAt = new Date();
    await this.saveWorkflow(workflow);
  }

  /**
   * 获取工作流
   */
  async getWorkflow(workflowId: string): Promise<Workflow | null> {
    // 先从内存中查找
    for (const [_, workflow] of this.activeWorkflows) {
      if (workflow.id === workflowId) {
        return workflow;
      }
    }
    
    // 从数据库查找
    try {
      const client = getSupabaseClient();
      const { data } = await client
        .from('xiaohai_workflows')
        .select('*')
        .eq('id', workflowId)
        .single();
      
      return data;
    } catch {
      return null;
    }
  }

  /**
   * 生成工作流ID
   */
  private generateWorkflowId(): string {
    return `wf_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
  }

  /**
   * 生成脚本ID
   */
  private generateScriptId(): string {
    return `script_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
  }
}

// ========== 导出单例 ==========

export const xiaohaiWorkflowService = new XiaohaiWorkflowService();

===== src/middleware.ts =====
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

// 上传路由需要更大的 body 大小限制
const UPLOAD_ROUTES = ['/api/creative-agent/upload', '/api/learning-library/upload'];
const MAX_BODY_SIZE = 500 * 1024 * 1024; // 500MB

export function middleware(request: NextRequest) {
  // 只处理上传路由
  const pathname = request.nextUrl.pathname;
  if (!UPLOAD_ROUTES.some(route => pathname.startsWith(route))) {
    return NextResponse.next();
  }

  // 获取 content-length
  const contentLength = request.headers.get('content-length');
  if (contentLength && parseInt(contentLength) > MAX_BODY_SIZE) {
    return new NextResponse(
      JSON.stringify({ error: '请求体过大，最大支持 500MB' }),
      {
        status: 413,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  return NextResponse.next();
}

export const config = {
  matcher: ['/api/creative-agent/upload', '/api/learning-library/upload'],
};

===== src/scripts/init-tos-cors.ts =====
/**
 * TOS CORS 初始化脚本
 * 
 * 功能：确保 TOS 存储桶的 CORS 配置正确
 * 
 * 使用方式：
 * - 在部署时自动调用
 * - 或者在 Next.js 启动时调用
 */

import { getTosClient, BUCKET_NAME } from '../lib/tos-storage';

// 支持的域名列表
const ALLOWED_ORIGINS = [
  'https://*.dev.coze.site',  // 沙箱环境
  'https://*.coze.site',       // 正式部署
  'https://*.coze.cn',        // 备用
];

export async function initTosCors(): Promise<boolean> {
  try {
    console.log('[TOS CORS 初始化] 开始配置跨域规则...');

    const client = getTosClient();

    // 配置 CORS 规则
    await client.putBucketCors({
      bucket: BUCKET_NAME,
      corsRules: [
        {
          allowedOrigin: ALLOWED_ORIGINS,
          allowedMethod: ['GET', 'PUT', 'POST', 'DELETE', 'HEAD'],
          allowedHeader: ['*'],
          exposeHeader: ['ETag', 'Content-Length', 'x-tos-request-id'],
          maxAgeSeconds: 3600,
        },
      ],
    });

    console.log('[TOS CORS 初始化] 跨域规则配置成功');
    return true;

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[TOS CORS 初始化] 配置失败:', error);
    return false;
  }
}

// 如果直接运行此脚本
if (require.main === module) {
  initTosCors()
    .then((success) => {
      if (success) {
        console.log('CORS 初始化成功');
        process.exit(0);
      } else {
        console.error('CORS 初始化失败');
        process.exit(1);
      }
    })
    .catch((error) => {
      console.error('CORS 初始化异常:', error);
      process.exit(1);
    });
}

===== src/server.ts =====
// 加载环境变量（在开发环境中）
import * as dotenv from 'dotenv';
import * as path from 'path';
if (process.env.COZE_PROJECT_ENV !== 'PROD') {
  // 尝试加载 .env.local 文件
  const envPath = path.resolve(process.cwd(), '.env.local');
  const result = dotenv.config({ path: envPath });
  if (result.error) {
    console.warn('Failed to load .env.local:', result.error.message);
  } else {
    console.log('Loaded .env.local successfully');
  }
}

import { createServer } from 'http';
import { parse } from 'url';
import next from 'next';

// 导入并启动轮询服务
import { VideoGenerationPoller } from './lib/video-generation-poller';

const dev = process.env.COZE_PROJECT_ENV !== 'PROD';
const hostname = process.env.HOSTNAME || 'localhost';
const port = parseInt(process.env.PORT || '5000', 10);

// Create Next.js app with increased body size limit
const app = next({ 
  dev, 
  hostname, 
  port,
  // Note: For large file uploads, we need to handle them via streaming
});
const handle = app.getRequestHandler();

app.prepare().then(() => {
  // 启动视频生成轮询服务
  console.log('[Server] 启动视频生成轮询服务...');
  const poller = new VideoGenerationPoller();
  poller.start();
  
  const server = createServer(async (req, res) => {
    // Set higher limits for large file uploads
    // Note: This doesn't directly affect Next.js body parser
    // but helps with the raw request handling
    try {
      const parsedUrl = parse(req.url!, true);
      await handle(req, res, parsedUrl);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error occurred handling', req.url, err);
      res.statusCode = 500;
      res.end('Internal server error');
    }
  });
  
  // Increase server timeouts for large file uploads
  server.timeout = 600000; // 10 minutes
  server.keepAliveTimeout = 65000;
  
  server.once('error', err => {
    console.error(err);
    process.exit(1);
  });
  server.listen(port, () => {
    console.log(
      `> Server listening at http://${hostname}:${port} as ${
        dev ? 'development' : process.env.COZE_PROJECT_ENV
      }`,
    );
  });
});

import { sql } from "drizzle-orm";

// ========== 系统表（禁止删除）==========

	id: integer("id").primaryKey().generatedAlwaysAsIdentity(),
	updated_at: timestamp("updated_at", { withTimezone: true, mode: 'string' }).defaultNow(),

// ========== 用户表 ==========
export const users = pgTable(
  "users",
  {
    id: varchar("id", { length: 36 }).primaryKey().default(sql`gen_random_uuid()`),
    username: varchar("username", { length: 50 }).notNull().unique(),
    email: varchar("email", { length: 255 }),
    password_hash: varchar("password_hash", { length: 255 }).notNull(),
    role: varchar("role", { length: 20 }).notNull().default('member'), // super_admin, finance, material_leader, material_member
    status: varchar("status", { length: 20 }).notNull().default('pending'), // pending, active, disabled
    storage_path: varchar("storage_path", { length: 255 }), // TOS 存储路径
    storage_quota: integer("storage_quota").default(10737418240), // 存储配额（字节），默认 10GB
    storage_used: integer("storage_used").default(0), // 已使用存储（字节）
    created_at: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    updated_at: timestamp("updated_at", { withTimezone: true }),
  },
  (table) => [
    index("users_username_idx").on(table.username),
    index("users_email_idx").on(table.email),
    index("users_status_idx").on(table.status),
    index("users_storage_path_idx").on(table.storage_path),
  ]
);

// ========== 视频任务表 ==========
export const videos = pgTable(
  "videos",
  {
    id: varchar("id", { length: 36 }).primaryKey().default(sql`gen_random_uuid()`), // video_id（我们系统生成的 UUID）
    user_id: varchar("user_id", { length: 36 }).notNull().references(() => users.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
    prompt: text("prompt").notNull(), // 视频生成提示词
    video_name: varchar("video_name", { length: 200 }), // 创意小海写的视频名称（用于多任务对应）
    script: text("script"), // 视频脚本
    copywriting: text("copywriting"), // 视频配文
    tags: jsonb("tags").$type<string[]>(), // 视频标签数组
    category: varchar("category", { length: 50 }), // 视频分类（开箱/测评/参数科普/热点解读）
    task_type: varchar("task_type", { length: 20 }).notNull().default('generate'), // generate, edit, extend
    model: varchar("model", { length: 50 }).notNull().default('doubao-seedance-2-0-260128'),
    reference_images: jsonb("reference_images").$type<string[]>(),
    reference_videos: jsonb("reference_videos").$type<string[]>(),
    reference_audios: jsonb("reference_audios").$type<string[]>(),
    first_frame: varchar("first_frame", { length: 500 }),
    last_frame: varchar("last_frame", { length: 500 }),
    ratio: varchar("ratio", { length: 10 }).notNull().default('16:9'), // 16:9, 9:16, 1:1, 4:3, 3:4, 21:9, adaptive
    duration: integer("duration").notNull().default(5), // 秒 (4-15)
    generate_audio: boolean("generate_audio").default(true),
    watermark: boolean("watermark").default(false),
    web_search: boolean("web_search").default(false),
    status: varchar("status", { length: 20 }).notNull().default('pending'), // pending, processing, completed, failed
    seedance_task_id: varchar("seedance_task_id", { length: 100 }), // Seedance 任务 ID（仅用于查询进度）
    result_url: varchar("result_url", { length: 500 }), // 生成视频临时 URL（火山引擎返回）
    tos_key: varchar("tos_key", { length: 500 }), // TOS 存储的 key（持久化）
    public_video_url: varchar("public_video_url", { length: 500 }), // 公开永久 URL（播放、学习、下载都用它）
    audio_url: varchar("audio_url", { length: 500 }), // 生成音频 URL
    audio_tos_key: varchar("audio_tos_key", { length: 500 }), // 音频 TOS 存储的 key
    cover_url: varchar("cover_url", { length: 500 }), // 视频封面 URL
    cover_tos_key: varchar("cover_tos_key", { length: 500 }), // 封面 TOS 存储的 key
    last_frame_url: varchar("last_frame_url", { length: 500 }), // 尾帧图片 URL
    last_frame_tos_key: varchar("last_frame_tos_key", { length: 500 }), // 尾帧 TOS 存储的 key
    cost: numeric("cost", { precision: 10, scale: 2 }), // 费用 USDC
    error_reason: text("error_reason"), // 生成失败原因（原 error_message 字段）
    created_at: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    updated_at: timestamp("updated_at", { withTimezone: true }),
  },
  (table) => [
    index("videos_user_id_idx").on(table.user_id),
    index("videos_status_idx").on(table.status),
    index("videos_created_at_idx").on(table.created_at),
    index("videos_tos_key_idx").on(table.tos_key),
    index("videos_seedance_task_id_idx").on(table.seedance_task_id),
    index("videos_category_idx").on(table.category),
  ]
);

// ========== 智能体记忆表 ==========
export const agentMemories = pgTable(
  "agent_memories",
  {
    id: varchar("id", { length: 36 }).primaryKey().default(sql`gen_random_uuid()`),
    agent_type: varchar("agent_type", { length: 50 }).notNull(),
    user_id: varchar("user_id", { length: 36 }).references(() => users.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
    memory_type: varchar("memory_type", { length: 50 }).notNull(), // preference, fact, skill, experience
    key: varchar("key", { length: 255 }).notNull(),
    value: jsonb("value").notNull(),
    importance: integer("importance").default(50),
    access_count: integer("access_count").default(0),
    last_accessed_at: timestamp("last_accessed_at", { withTimezone: true }),
    expires_at: timestamp("expires_at", { withTimezone: true }),
    created_at: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    updated_at: timestamp("updated_at", { withTimezone: true }),
  },
  (table) => [
    index("agent_memories_agent_type_idx").on(table.agent_type),
    index("agent_memories_user_id_idx").on(table.user_id),
    index("agent_memories_memory_type_idx").on(table.memory_type),
    index("agent_memories_key_idx").on(table.key),
    index("agent_memories_importance_idx").on(table.importance),
  ]
);

// ========== 智能体任务表 ==========
export const agentTasks = pgTable(
  "agent_tasks",
  {
    id: varchar("id", { length: 36 }).primaryKey().default(sql`gen_random_uuid()`),
    user_id: varchar("user_id", { length: 36 }).notNull().references(() => users.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
    agent_type: varchar("agent_type", { length: 50 }).notNull(),
    task_type: varchar("task_type", { length: 100 }).notNull(),
    title: varchar("title", { length: 255 }).notNull(),
    description: text("description"),
    status: varchar("status", { length: 20 }).notNull().default('pending'), // pending, processing, completed, failed, cancelled
    priority: integer("priority").default(50),
    progress: integer("progress").default(0),
    input_data: jsonb("input_data"),
    output_data: jsonb("output_data"),
    error_message: text("error_message"),
    parent_task_id: varchar("parent_task_id", { length: 36 }).references(() => videos.id, { onDelete: "set null" }),
    started_at: timestamp("started_at", { withTimezone: true }),
    completed_at: timestamp("completed_at", { withTimezone: true }),
    created_at: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    updated_at: timestamp("updated_at", { withTimezone: true }),
  },
  (table) => [
    index("agent_tasks_user_id_idx").on(table.user_id),
    index("agent_tasks_agent_type_idx").on(table.agent_type),
    index("agent_tasks_status_idx").on(table.status),
    index("agent_tasks_priority_idx").on(table.priority),
    index("agent_tasks_parent_task_id_idx").on(table.parent_task_id),
    index("agent_tasks_created_at_idx").on(table.created_at),
  ]
);
